name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: An important number for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, there’s a
historic grassroots movement rising up in Kentucky we’ve never seen
before.

Take a look at how many counties in Kentucky have chipped in to support
our campaign:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12839?refcode=em20211110-1218&t=1001&akid=1218%2E346206%2EZPMS3Y ]GIF of all 120 counties that supported Charles Booker

We’re proud to share that we’ve received support from ALL 120 counties in
our Commonwealth — and 98% of all our donations are from small dollar
donors, with our average donation at $24.50 and 49% of donors donating $10
or less at a time.

This is one of the truest representations of our grassroots,
people-powered movement,
Peter. In every county, there’s
an incredible enthusiasm for us to take on Rand Paul and end this chapter
of failed leadership in our Commonwealth. It’s proof that something
special is happening in Kentucky.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12839?refcode=em20211110-1218&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1218%2E346206%2EZPMS3Y ]Kentucky is ready for big, transformative change — and we know that
sending Charles to the U.S. Senate is the first step. But our work goes
beyond any one election or campaign; we’re building a movement to create a
brighter future for us all, starting now. Will you please chip in $24.50
(our average donation) or whatever you can afford?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12839?refcode=em20211110-1218&t=1022&akid=1218%2E346206%2EZPMS3Y ]Contribute $24.50

The more momentum we continue to build across all 120 counties, the
stronger our message and mandate will be in the coming election year.

NOW is the time to make these critical investments and ensure that
Charles’ message continues to reach every corner of our Commonwealth.
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12839?refcode=em20211110-1218&t=1023&akid=1218%2E346206%2EZPMS3Y ]We hope you can help chip in towards that mission today.

More soon,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211110-1218-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1218_346206_ZPMS3Y&akid=1218%2E346206%2EZPMS3Y

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1218%2E346206%2EZPMS3Y

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Ryan
subject: the GOP frontrunner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1409%2E3611125%2ElO7ShR ][IMG]

Folks --

Let’s talk about Tim’s extremist opponent and the Republican frontrunner
who believes the 2020 election was stolen from Donald Trump -- Josh
Mandel.

Recently, Mandel said, “there's no such thing as separation of church and
state” and called to shut down public schools and “put schools in
churches.”

No such thing as separation of church and state? As Tim would say, Josh
ain’t living in reality.

Josh also compared President Biden’s administration to Nazi Germany and
said the Gestapo would show up at people’s doors to enforce mask mandates.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5894?t=1007&akid=1409%2E3611125%2ElO7ShR ]If you’re too disgusted to read any further, we get it. Can you chip in
right now to make sure Mandel never represents Ohio in the Senate? >>

Mandel’s comments on immigrants are equally appalling. He’s said that he
believes “George Soros is funding, Obama is coordinating, and Biden is
enabling an invasion of our country.” Oh, and he also compared immigrants
to alligators.

Folks, these dangerous comments are just a small sample of Mandel’s
radical and inflammatory statements. He doesn’t deserve to represent Ohio
and has no place serving in the Senate.

But Mandel is the only Republican beating Tim in the polls. And he has the
backing of not one, but TWO super PACs that have already spent $1 million
on TV ads to ensure he wins the GOP primary.

We urgently need our grassroots supporters to step up and counteract the
big money flooding into this battleground Senate race. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5894?t=1008&akid=1409%2E3611125%2ElO7ShR ]Can we count on
you to rush $25 (or more!) to stop Mandel in his tracks? We need to raise
another $1,392 by midnight tomorrow. Anything you can give makes a
difference.

-- Team Ryan

body:

subject: requesting your immediate response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **We have one critical question for you:**
**Will you commit to supporting Democrats up-and-down the ballot, all across the country?**
| [YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---
* * *

We are less than one year out from one of the most important elections we've ever faced.

**And at this make-or-break moment for Democrats nationwide, President Biden knows that EVERYTHING is on the line.**

That's why he just delivered a STIRRING call to action for grassroots Democrats all across the country:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

President Biden could not be more right.

We worked too hard to win our Democratic Majorities to let the Republicans crush them.

And there's too much progress at stake to give this fight anything less than our all.

**So we need to know: Will you answer President Biden 's call and commit to supporting Democrats up-and-down the ballot, all across the country?**
[YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45921868&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMTE5MTY4NAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45921868&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMTE5MTY4NAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA**
body:
Here is the Biden incentive to risk your life and surge our border: Step 1: Cross border illegally. Step 2: Get caught. Step 3: Get paid! | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3ede898c6cac4a919f8f9c5c4401b76d&_e=bIPfs_ioc6Dq0rw9r-ebCE_e4n8gvtlbarlmlfG_NiaHfMXWa1a3iTtkhrdSfUYdasHBuvjOMwEjUxChbE0vwFhTZOjvBdTBReSyxlOAsa2_9M1E-GqqPJVSRQKL1Q9CqZM-Jr396aMnBg_ZoA6-T52Uq6LyVBKbKKYaF-uSoCdIU_I09AuZvP2XjlbhcTpgx6NAXdbS4qlrvLwIDqyI183O1q4D84Sul5qN3Y2iJJ_u9egZlPqhSi9zFURhXVdvqqDoBpP6ReSFK1_kLxfqyMlgidauxUVsT7NN9yEBPe5A3TFPL_hchHejOjyB6Y82mBPuriIw4QUU5gsGIehh_g21iyt5yY1a6NMa2Guu-4N4F32HZ7xIQQq64C4XZ-IZ3CWXADs3wBSuCIz4guPUlrySYXrzz21AoPSCa0XF1mPoeMCFAinnZWiWgvNTcwObSZCSFhpo-hf-oW9-p5XmhWaf44eKPNNG6EaJmYD01PY%3D)

Peter,

Biden is planning to use your taxpayer funds to potentially hand out **$450,000 to each undocumented immigrant** that has filed a claim after crossing our border illegally.

Republicans in Congress introduced a bill to stop it, but my opponent – far-left Democrat **Katie Porter – voted to allow Biden to proceed with yet another incentive for migrants to continue to surge toward our border.**

Under Biden's and Porter's plan, an undocumented family could cross into our country illegally, then file a claim against our country and potentially receive close to $1 million of your tax dollars!

**Here is the Biden incentive to risk your life and surge our border:**
Step 1: Cross border illegally
Step 2: Get caught
Step 3: Get paid!

**Meanwhile, Americans are still trying to recover from devastating economic shutdowns that killed millions of jobs, closed countless small, medium & family-owned businesses for good, and destroyed livelihoods.**

_**And this is on top of the rising cost of living and insane gas prices that are also the result of their failed policies.**_

_We can't allow this to continue!_

[**I'm a black conservative Republican and Navy veteran with Afghanistan combat experience, and I'm running for Congress to defeat Katie Porter in California's 45th District and hold her and Biden accountable for their failed leadership.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3ede898c6cac4a919f8f9c5c4401b76d&_e=bIPfs_ioc6Dq0rw9r-ebCE_e4n8gvtlbarlmlfG_NiaHfMXWa1a3iTtkhrdSfUYdasHBuvjOMwEjUxChbE0vwFhTZOjvBdTBReSyxlOAsa2_9M1E-GqqPJVSRQKL1Q9CqZM-Jr396aMnBg_ZoA6-T52Uq6LyVBKbKKYaF-uSoCdIU_I09AuZvP2XjlbhcTpgx6NAXdbS4qlrvLwIDqyI183O1q4D84Sul5qN3Y2iJJ_u9egZlPqhSi9zFURhXVdvqqDoBpP6ReSFK1_kLxfqyJ1CKnz0-1PUhaBMrPYomjLV0JQolJgZJKcVMwBZfCZhVHEniPeTvsHFLedzhirNhMYRCiUANLie66zxreQm0kOSwr9-HlNEjMGnH-7JATERb-RrKeklMlwY8YH60xCx7WHpyCjsl35ATBpBBqc89xuNIVgtutsx7jPgNQsLdMRKFAbjLHTb09Lnta9uD4mHZ2gb_YftUDapYZ4dY4em26k%3D)

With your help, we can eliminate far-left Democrats from Congress, restore a Republican majority in the House, and be able to stand up and stop Biden from doing any more damage to our suffering nation.

[**Will you help me defeat their failed leftist agenda and restore real leadership in America by backing my campaign with a contribtuion of $25, $50, $100 or more today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3ede898c6cac4a919f8f9c5c4401b76d&_e=bIPfs_ioc6Dq0rw9r-ebCE_e4n8gvtlbarlmlfG_NiaHfMXWa1a3iTtkhrdSfUYdasHBuvjOMwEjUxChbE0vwFhTZOjvBdTBReSyxlOAsa2_9M1E-GqqPJVSRQKL1Q9CqZM-Jr396aMnBg_ZoA6-T52Uq6LyVBKbKKYaF-uSoCdIU_I09AuZvP2XjlbhcTpgx6NAXdbS4qlrvLwIDqyI183O1q4D84Sul5qN3Y2iJJ_u9egZlPqhSi9zFURhXVdvqqDoBpP6ReSFK1_kLxfqyK9CErxQGz27m4CSk38davR0a_5R8kLrHmZ4PEOpiX4zYr3lNmTkQMrRYjTgpr2oCv8gcTTKKBvH6lgnITjT5WN6LZEh_hvh0xYcLnv4mIEG8cgAnEEWsuPX_l_PzK3iPSAMM_A3KhBPCXm6pzrOl0yWy8lobf7qw1eTd88ryz1mzV3PnEwKmrw8XkM3l2SrhQQ421AV9DMZ3qM503hF_L0%3D)

My wife is a LEGAL immigrant from wore-torn Lebanon who waited 16 years to receive her American citizenship because she chose to obey the law.

**It's unacceptable that Biden and Katie Porter refuse to stop people from cutting in line ahead of people like my wife, but now they are incentivizing this behavior with money that's paid out from our taxes.**

We need to rid Congress of Democrats like Katie Porter who are rubber stamping Biden's failed agenda, and we need a Republican Congress with the power to stop it.

[**I'm running to give America the conservative, veteran leadership it needs in Congress. Will you contribute $25, $50, $100 or more to help me defeat Biden pawn Katie Porter in CA-45 and win back the House?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3ede898c6cac4a919f8f9c5c4401b76d&_e=bIPfs_ioc6Dq0rw9r-ebCE_e4n8gvtlbarlmlfG_NiaHfMXWa1a3iTtkhrdSfUYdasHBuvjOMwEjUxChbE0vwFhTZOjvBdTBReSyxlOAsa2_9M1E-GqqPJVSRQKL1Q9CqZM-Jr396aMnBg_ZoA6-T52Uq6LyVBKbKKYaF-uSoCdIU_I09AuZvP2XjlbhcTpgx6NAXdbS4qlrvLwIDqyI183O1q4D84Sul5qN3Y2iJJ_u9egZlPqhSi9zFURhXVdvqqDoBpP6ReSFK1_kLxfqyOE4AT5JEp1-3acaCrv50IuwncC2xJdrBkxQVt56WoGPyQIOEbK3nMjUCXhu5zp1GHjSinx9PvQH8OKIFjp4jQq6snS1OkoMbEKVzVB7CU8cY-Mq8Je6EcisP4myNebzB9qnP0N5tEyHPRAoeixaB1JITD7kJsi1l3mpyJj-3wcrpleMHjrLFW4-DLyCEQq4oPSStFFjjRrelEH_V-BPEhM%3D)

clean_body: Here is the Biden incentive to risk your life and surge our border: Step 1: Cross border illegally. Step 2: Get caught. Step 3: Get paid! | Peter, Biden is planning to use your taxpayer funds to potentially hand out $450,000 to each undocumented immigrant that has filed a claim after crossing our border illegally. Republicans in Congress introduced a bill to stop it, but my opponent – far-left Democrat Katie Porter – voted to allow Biden to proceed with yet another incentive for migrants to continue to surge toward our border. Under Biden's and Porter's plan, an undocumented family could cross into our country illegally, then file a claim against our country and potentially receive close to $1 million of your tax dollars! Here is the Biden incentive to risk your life and surge our border: Step 1: Cross border illegally Step 2: Get caught Step 3: Get paid! Meanwhile, Americans are still trying to recover from devastating economic shutdowns that killed millions of jobs, closed countless small, medium & family-owned businesses for good, and destroyed livelihoods. And this is on top of the rising cost of living and insane gas prices that are also the result of their failed policies. We can't allow this to continue! With your help, we can eliminate far-left Democrats from Congress, restore a Republican majority in the House, and be able to stand up and stop Biden from doing any more damage to our suffering nation. My wife is a LEGAL immigrant from wore-torn Lebanon who waited 16 years to receive her American citizenship because she chose to obey the law. It's unacceptable that Biden and Katie Porter refuse to stop people from cutting in line ahead of people like my wife, but now they are incentivizing this behavior with money that's paid out from our taxes. We need to rid Congress of Democrats like Katie Porter who are rubber stamping Biden's failed agenda, and we need a Republican Congress with the power to stop it. Thanks, LCDR Shawn Collins, US Navy (Ret.) Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. Having served in Afghanistan, Shawn has spent his life fighting for the Constitution he swore to uphold and defend. He will take that same fighting spirit to the halls of Congress. ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Shawn Collins is a former member of the US Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy. | PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA Don't want to receive any more of our emails:

Friend, **_I’m no stranger to the dangers of Big Tech’s overreaching power. _** Big Tech freely and openly disregards the right to FREE SPEECH that is _explicitly_ outlined in the First Amendment of the Constitution. This weekend, the Big Tech company Twitter made conservative Indiana Congressman **Jim Banks** its newest target. [](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNULty5CAQ_Bo2YwsN6BUo8N2eo3PiwIETFY-RFlkgFSC71l9vJG_50puiKOhuZpo2HYhacDzZDhgUezHORAnnQbZaoTQlCFMyZYhgTo5S6mQXL2cM6awXd7p2DTZKtG0DhZBS8koJyRusYOADq8sST3N3TWmNhD8QeMwrot4Cnj-sD2j2JhmbrKNK-rdIhyVQvfgxYIzUep1JlegU6HEk_HFLro_LFjQSflnDElfMnvxIoNoph8ZuLlNXSdFJO99xLd0q7egz8_1TBj2yXA2nk-qPGf0-41u9-IQ-ZfEBhd1y2IfwSwobZqj3szX5Gl39ctOvJT4fYDxAACiANzUtKzBUqAqo0rqlAze6ECilKNgpdGb9sPNsY1XndMfd7JFpdjrb4daR-hcB2LbcEuCID_6n8S6G33m_WhN_Xo4v79P2DJ9PiT61b_TP5P7-U6bbij_K-_jzPT0g9eULar2oXw) You’re reading that right, Friend. name: Steve Chabot
subject: What a Week!
body:
A real wake-up call for the left! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-trtkjtil-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtkjtil-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtkjtil-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [What a Week!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtkjtil-kujkulhluu-j/)
A lot to talk about in this week's blog. As always, I'll try to make it informative, and interesting. Let me know if I succeeded! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtkjtil-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtkjtil-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Another Brilliant Democrat Idea](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtkjtil-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Democrats have given the American people a lot of reasons to vote them out of office at the next opportunity. Read about one more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtkjtil-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtkjtil-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Defending Taiwan](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trtkjtil-kujkulhluu-u/)
China's actions against our critical ally Taiwan have gotten more and more provocative lately. Our goal is to defend Taiwan, but avoid a military confrontation with China if at all possible. How to accomplish both? Read about it in this week's blog. | | As the November general elections wrap up, all eyes are turning towards the midterm elections and I couldn't ask for a better team! This election is about opportunity - an opportunity to lift the weights that have suffocated our inspiration and left us demoralized. We understand that healthcare is a human right. We understand education yields opportunities. We understand that protecting the planet is a moral obligation. We understand that the world is a better place when we look out for each other. Roll up those sleeves and let's bring these messages to the voters! Head on over to our website and scroll to the bottom to register for campaign events!

When I was first elected to public office, I learned quickly that you can’t take anything for granted in politics.
This poll may have Steve up, but it’s not by a lot. And Nevada is a competitive enough state that Republicans are going to throw all their money at this race.

clean_body: Let’s get to work | | | | | Folks, I had to readjust my glasses to make sure I read this poll right. Steve Sisolak is only leading Dean Heller by 2 points. Are you as awake now as I am? Good, because we have a lot of work on our hands. | | | | | | | | | | | | | When I was first elected to public office, I learned quickly that you can’t take anything for granted in politics. This poll may have Steve up, but it’s not by a lot. And Nevada is a competitive enough state that Republicans are going to throw all their money at this race. It’s you versus their millions of dollars, folks. So, who’s going to win? I’m placing my bets on YOU. | | | | | | | | | | | | Don’t let me lose this betteam! I’m counting on you. Are you one of the millions of Americans opposed to Biden's tyrannical vaccine mandate?

_If you are, read this:_

**We’re not complying with Biden’s new COVID vaccine mandate. Here’s why:**

[](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJyNUMtugzAQ_BpzA5G1jc2BQ9s0h0pVm1N6Q34BrjAgMEXk62simko91bJW2tmZfYwuJOUqyyNbQAqH7aUkzQlOdJVrRbAETCsjqUYkdatwZrRKdIPwo-190o911BQ0A8YMISwXDBQ_EK5ApoRIYTJpWBW1ReP9MCH8gOAU_rIsydrPfpYmUb3bEOFVg_DpC-HjR_zp3vzEX8YUQTZ7Vzqj7exCyThh2x2c-nlUJoBScyEIFzTuVFsKN7S2WneSCqmwdRdo-31pvIVysW1bhh3KMH9o11L2o7Fd_SPrO286H1ShZYzx-_Vyrl7pJZTLrrU6FP6A0w3klGoiFI9xzkxMKm5iSTSEUBmQOs-YYdFY6GEbb6eMBVfr7abNhmhfvUDsEQHMc2gJcDMN_tN4I8NTiI3V0135685Zuvg6ds93nl8Hc-ftw5PdYkDs-A3sHKXt)

Our movement of non-compliance is already sending ripples throughout the federal appeals court. **Last weekend, the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals granted an emergency suspension of the mandate, saying it raises “ _grave statutory and constitutional issues._ ”**

While this is a clear win — the fight is nowhere near finished. We want to turn these ripples into a **WAVE**.

Here at The Daily Wire, we will NOT comply with Joe Biden’s new federal vaccine mandate. This is absolutely government overreach and the latest tyrannical action of the Biden administration.

**_[We need every person on board to tell the Biden admin: WE WILL NOT COMPLY!](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJyNkMtuhCAUQL9GdxhFUFy4aDudTVdNmm4nyAUlkUcQO7FfX5hMZ9FVCbmLk3OfME6UiW4o9Yhr3ORXk3ogbQVqAEHaCbdUyYlCQWpzcCODFtx6HoN2sXJhLpeUKWs59IQrYFPTU8wYHjo2qEZBDZSW67jE6LeifSrwOf3VV8D1elx1kJVwJiG3LRx5GXXUzmarPe_RXIwEvZuiPXmuocBdZpvbg5CJRT7fkeAmCbNNMBe6gLMupsJ-PX4NZ6O0MQn3PWv010SeByEialLKxa6pX3sSb1fy8nneP75ucLtBRikQLhhqh14iophEEwGcgpJ4gqHrZV-GEfxVr6veuj7dbjZp4bxrmUZdtTrGon8uMN73vBe-nQb_p3CW8UuKi4btkTkB45wwTtH7ZNB3sK8PLx5ePrx780rmcTLtTz_vHJ9i)_**

[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJyNkLtuwyAUhp_G3rAoBgODh7Zu9kjdI26OkcxFGDdyn74QpRk6FaEzfPrOOfzoURKmBt7aEUH0Ug_EkOO-0zPXCvcS9WQ2kugGQ3cIZ5JVwkeRkw25C-naLiOhRkGJGZVczpyTAWMuNB80xwzOHLbruOQct6Z_bdCp3DV2Wtj1uNlkOhVcQWFbBIgm22yDr1Z_2rO7OKPt7pp-isLqBg2VbWFPyhSWxfWBlHBFuPoC66CLDj7kMjiux68RfDY-F-GRE4K_JogiKZXBS2m5-LXs66evM_q8TXJR-Q63O2SEaCwUAz2nBuCZGSCxRqXMBskSnBraplHHm11Xuw20_N3VlcA1a1ueutr5GBv61iC07zUXun8N-s_gKqP3Uhert2en1EwIzAQBZ-nAd_IfTy8f0Ty9x_LO1OdUSqcfOjCfpQ)
Joe Biden announced **last week** that the vaccine mandate will be enacted in January. We are working tirelessly to prepare for our day in court because **it’s time for a showdown with the federal government.** We’re committed to doing all we can to stop this authoritarian action and continue doing what The Daily Wire does best — delivering the truth with reliable reporting and investigative journalism.

Will you join us in saying **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH? We can’t do it alone** — **_[sign the petition today.](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJyNkLtOwzAUQL8m2RwZP_IYMhRKBzYYKsRS-XGdWIpjK3FUha_HrkoHJizrDkfnPnUveavqrrQ9weQpP8xwx2ilTacVo5JQbkByXTDsduFgsUrMQcTF-lj5ZSjHHtNOMiANJooLMDWT0HEusGKyNoaJcurHGMNa0ENBTulPodLCTvvVLlAp7xLy6yhQgGij9XO26GmL7uJA280V9BiE1QWpM1v9tihILIrhjpRwSRjmBHOhi_azj6lwmPZfw88R5piE-54Y_TVREItSET2llMs8pX70CIfz55l9vX2cb3C9wZZzzYRqEe0aQMy0gCTTJAUDROqubqApl16Hq50mu9ZNut3g0sJ51zKNOlmz90XzXBCybXkvcjsN-U_hLJOXFEer10em1K0QrBUcvUuHvpf59eHFPcDDuzevII-TaXP8Ab01n7s)_**

Too much is on the line right now and riding on this fight. We can’t be complacent. **The Biden administration is on its heels, but we’re making every necessary preparation to defend employees’ rights in our day in court._This cannot stand!_**

This mandate is an unprecedented use of administrative power to coerce individuals into forcing their employees to get a COVID-19 injection or subject themselves to weekly testing and mask-wearing. This is what we’d expect in an authoritarian country — not in the United States. It’s time to fight back — join us.

We’re committed to doing all we can to stop this authoritarian action and continue doing what The Daily Wire does best — delivering the truth with reliable reporting and investigative journalism. name: Winsome Sears, VA Lt. Governor
subject: A black conservative woman just won in Virginia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

You may have seen me in the news this past week, or even on Sean Hannity's show.

**The reason why I 'm suddenly showing up everywhere is simple: [I was just elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia -- living proof that everything the Democrats try to sell voters on is a lie.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58737757:Jz9vrX2NM:m:1:3253819041:B0573154C9EF65DFC1A971D23957C899:r "I was just elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia — living proof that everything the
Democrats try to sell voters on is a lie.")**

_I 'm a Jamaican immigrant who legally immigrated to the United States and became a citizen of this country because I wanted the American Dream for myself _--_**and I did just that.** I'm a small-business owner and a U.S. Marine. _

And now, as the first black woman elected Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, I'm thrilled to start working alongside strong, conservative leaders putting our country FIRST again.

The Left has put American citizens on the back burner for far too long.

**[It's time that we revive the America First Agenda in our states, and ensure we continue electing more conservative leaders who will help me do just that.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58737757:Jz9vrX2NM:m:1:3253819041:B0573154C9EF65DFC1A971D23957C899:r "It’s time that we revive the America First Agenda in our states, and ensure we continue electing more conservative leaders who will help
me do just that.")**

I'm confident that with your help, we'll continue to chip away at the Left's control in our country and save our states.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Do you support this mission, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738018:JkB91X2eN:m:1:3253819041:F757E98A3FFA0111D701205741BCC47B:r)
---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I 'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That's why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I'm traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

_**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**_

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I'm staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738018:JkB91X2eN:m:1:3253819041:F757E98A3FFA0111D701205741BCC47B:r "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738018:JkB91X2eN:m:1:3253819041:F757E98A3FFA0111D701205741BCC47B:r)
---

My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again._ That's made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

_**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **_

That's why I am hoping you will _**[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738018:JkB91X2eN:m:1:3253819041:F757E98A3FFA0111D701205741BCC47B:r "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First
conservatives.")**_ The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738018:JkB91X2eN:m:1:3253819041:F757E98A3FFA0111D701205741BCC47B:r)
---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738018:JkB91X2eN:m:1:3253819041:F757E98A3FFA0111D701205741BCC47B:r)
---

Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to _**WIN BIG**_ for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. _**[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738018:JkB91X2eN:m:1:3253819041:F757E98A3FFA0111D701205741BCC47B:r "Will you chip in to
help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**_

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

body:
It's official. Joe Biden just ENDED all border Wall contracts. And it gets worse -- much worse...
Drop whatever you're doing, Peter!
**It's official. Joe Biden just ENDED all border Wall contracts. And it gets worse -- much worse...**
Fox News just confirmed that millions of dollars worth of unused border materials are WASTING AWAY in the hands of the Biden Administration.
This is an emergency, so we'll cut to the chase:
**[**Before midnight -- we're BEGGING for all Patriots to help us build The Wall, defeat the open-borders Democrats, AND save America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738511:64jAmX2Nw:m:1:3298722022:840DAA43F8EB22091BA60DCE6E199A2B:r)**
Will you hold the line, or will you let the open-border Democrats destroy what President Trump fought so hard to build?
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738511:64jAmX2Nw:m:1:3298722022:840DAA43F8EB22091BA60DCE6E199A2B:r)

If Joe Biden and his Democrats get away with their open-borders agenda, it's all over. **The future of our great country is hanging in the balance.**

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I 'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That's why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I'm traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

_**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**_

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I'm staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738483:Jvd_yX2cN:m:1:3299561967:A5F4899AFB39175ADD045B5463947466:r "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again._ That's made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

_**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **_

That's why I am hoping you will _**[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738483:Jvd_yX2cN:m:1:3299561967:A5F4899AFB39175ADD045B5463947466:r "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First
conservatives.")**_ The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,

name: Newsmax Finance
subject: The Government’s New 50% Retirement Tax Trap. Are You at Risk?
body:
The government has set a sneaky 50% tax trap for retirees as they near the finish line.
_Sponsored message_
| Please read this message from our sponsor Newsmax Finance.

| **Your Retirement Savings Could Be in Jeopardy!** **The government has set a sneaky 50% tax trap for retirees as they near the finish line. Keep reading to see how you can protect yourself.** Dear Friend, If you or any of your loved ones are planning to retire in the next couple of years, please pay close attention. The government has changed the rules on you, midgame. One wrong move now could trigger a 50% tax on your retirement accounts. Which is why _Barron's_ called this rule change "the most sweeping retirement legislations in more than a decade." And _Forbes_ simply called it a "ticking time bomb." Millions of Americans are unprepared for what's about to come. That's why Newsmax has teamed up with some of the nation's top IRA experts to put together a FREE special report, **_The New Hidden Land Mines Set to Blow Up Your Retirement Savings._** [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt3mn53l9k15bb2rrud3f5bjp8phhidplh6rdlo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdh61ob4clh2bs)The 50% tax is just the beginning of all the sneaky traps that Congress has laid out for you in this new legislation. [**Click here to claim your FREE copy today**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvusmn77mqf8tr2ftrhfbiolb4em8lrslgebs7io_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdh61ob4clh2bs) _._ Inside this brand-new special report, you'll discover: ✔ **"Uh oh... we owe the IRS now..."** Your beneficiaries might be saying this, if you don't read the fine print on your retirement account. But you can protect them from headache and hassle by including this one word... on this one form. Page 27. ✔ **The 20% tax trap.** 1 in 2 Americans make a simple money transfer move every year. But now, this same move could give you a surprise tax bill. But you can avoid this altogether with the simple "triple t" strategy. It's easy to do and it won't sound alarms at the IRS. Page 22. ✔ **WARNING: What never to do with your IRA.** This honest mistake among family members can make every dime taxable and become the kiss of death for your retirement account. See how you can avoid it. Page 27. ✔ **The sneaky IRS move that could cost you dearly.** Did you know that proposed IRS rules - years away from becoming official - could impact your taxes THIS YEAR? It's true. But you can navigate this gray area easily and avoid big surprises. Page 15. ✔ **The simple dispute that can cost you $5,000 to $10,000 or more... plus a year of your valuable time!** Read this warning before you decide to dispute anything with the IRS. Or even ask them for clarification on issues. Page 30. Everything is spelled out in detail in **_The New Hidden Land Mines Set to Blow Up Your Retirement Savings._** [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhc0dogib8jermf84n7ph80t3p5cv3h9uq6tmd9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdh61ob4clh2bs)With your retirement savings at stake, this is the most important briefing you'll read in your lifetime. The stakes are higher than ever. A 50% tax could cut your savings in half. But it's 100% avoidable. This new special report from Newsmax Finance has the solution. [**Claim your FREE copy today**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1oriq46stbsa9cg37leqqr4jb3jev2f9tanvdg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdh61ob4clh2bs). Sincerely, Newsmax Finance
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1raujl8b18v66dj2guamu96acl7j75t5vj7uq7g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uth3csrmmhprcp1ksqqb4o73ckqj8pr36mpr8t5im3hradbgcloe2or4sgp66s77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0slmcooj1cr4cup30pjlc2p64dji46h22sh2s8i66pj3cdh61ob0s5h2bs)
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8ldk58oiakpq8crtmnbp17umitsqpkde6p65eh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdh61ob0s5h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.

name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Kinzinger retired because of my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738901:JzuzCX26N:m:1:3298722022:CBDD8CF4CDEF7CF8F588F62F6FAD45B0:r) | |
---
Peter,

**You might've already heard the big news: cry baby Adam Kinzinger has decided he's not running for Congress anymore.**

I'm sure I'm not the only one who's thinking this: GOOD!

Americans are sick and tired of an elitist political class that doesn't understand kitchen table issues - and we're MORE THAN HAPPY to say goodbye to RINOs like Adam.

That's what I told Fox News when they asked...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738901:JzuzCX26N:m:1:3298722022:CBDD8CF4CDEF7CF8F588F62F6FAD45B0:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738901:JzuzCX26N:m:1:3298722022:CBDD8CF4CDEF7CF8F588F62F6FAD45B0:r)
The thing is, Kinzinger has been wasting our time for far too long.

Even in his last days...

He couldn't even be bothered to fight against the radical progressives, instead, he was fighting WITH them.

He couldn't be bothered to defend parents, teachers, or first responders against Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandates, instead, he insisted they should not have choices.

He couldn't be bothered to concern himself with the crisis on our border while millions of illegal immigrants overwhelmed our system.

_Instead, this guy was on MSNBC_ , attempting to boost his profile, because he cares more about being a part of the fake news than he cares about defending those who gave him his opportunity in Congress.

I've had enough of Adam Kinzinger and I think we're glad to see him go.

This is our chance to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE by electing REAL leaders who understand the issues affecting the average American - leaders like me.
[**I AGREE: SUPPORT CATALINA LAUF >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738901:JzuzCX26N:m:1:3298722022:CBDD8CF4CDEF7CF8F588F62F6FAD45B0:r)
**Peter, trust me I know the left is already scared of what I 'm bringing to the table.**
* I'm an unapologetic MAGA conservative.
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants.
* I'm a former Trump administration official.
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

_And unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have an R by their name, I proudly stand by my conservative values. _

While RINOs like Adam Kinzinger - and the long line of fakers who want to replace him - will happily masquerade as Republicans, they will do nothing to actually fight the liberal agenda that is destroying our nation.

**_But I will._**

_I 've had enough of the out-of-touch, Nancy Pelosi-led Congress. And unlike those who refuse to upset the status quo, I'm willing to do what it takes to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE._
[**JOIN ME: CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738901:JzuzCX26N:m:1:3298722022:CBDD8CF4CDEF7CF8F588F62F6FAD45B0:r)
_And my record proves it. _

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce.

As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress.

And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

As your member of Congress, I'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for a chance to sit at the table with the political elites.** **

**I 'll TAKE BACK THE HOUSE for the people - not for more power. **

And trust me - I'm in this thing to WIN. And though I may not be running against Kinzinger anymore - I'm still running FOR YOU.

I hope you'll show your support for me today by making a small donation.
[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738901:JzuzCX26N:m:1:3298722022:CBDD8CF4CDEF7CF8F588F62F6FAD45B0:r)
Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58738901:JzuzCX26N:m:1:3298722022:CBDD8CF4CDEF7CF8F588F62F6FAD45B0:r)

Catalina Lauf

body:

| Friend, **Biden wants to give illegal immigrants $450,000 per parent for being split up from their family at our Border!** Biden purposefully obliterated a secure southern border earlier this year. Creating a crisis that has exposed America to millions of illegal immigrants, allowed cartel crime to flood through Texas, and ensured our national security is weaker than ever before! If that wasn’t enough, now he wants to give illegal immigrants more money than most Americans make in multiple years of hard work! I am not standing by as Biden further bankrupts America by giving illegal immigrants $450,000! **Americans are facing tough times, and with a host of other crises affecting our nation, Biden has once again chosen to put America Last!**

name: Financial Alerts (via House Republicans)
subject: Are the Dems spying on your bank account?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

The Democrats have managed to find another way to take away your freedoms. They're pushing to allow the IRS to see _everything_ in your bank account. If passed, every transaction above $600 will be visible to the government.

How much more can they take away? Our privacy is being stripped away layer by layer. **[Join House Republicans& stop the government from taking control over YOUR life >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58739199:60E-bX2eN:m:1:3298722022:AABDDDD2F3061256BC56155E5AE34AB5:r "Join House
Republicans & stop the government from taking control over YOUR life >>>")**
---
| | | [PROTECT YOUR RIGHTS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58739199:60E-bX2eN:m:1:3298722022:AABDDDD2F3061256BC56155E5AE34AB5:r "Generic Button")
---
Imagine what the government would do with all the information they could access through the IRS. It's unconstitutional and unethical. **[If we don't act NOW, the Democrats will continue to abuse their power to take away our rights as American citizens.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58739199:60E-bX2eN:m:1:3298722022:AABDDDD2F3061256BC56155E5AE34AB5:r "If we don’t act NOW, the Democrats will continue to abuse their power to take away our
rights as American citizens.")**
---
| | | [JOIN THE FIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58739199:60E-bX2eN:m:1:3298722022:AABDDDD2F3061256BC56155E5AE34AB5:r "Generic Button")
---
We don't have much time to put a stop to this, Peter. **True patriots will step up ASAP to ensure we maintain our right to privacy.**
---
| | | [ACT NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58739199:60E-bX2eN:m:1:3298722022:AABDDDD2F3061256BC56155E5AE34AB5:r "Generic Button")
---
If we don't get ahead of them now, your rights will continue to be thrown out the window. **[Don't let them win this fight. Step up & chip in today >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58739199:60E-bX2eN:m:1:3298722022:AABDDDD2F3061256BC56155E5AE34AB5:r "Don’t let them win this fight. Step up & chip in today >>>")**

Thank you,

House Conservatives

name: American Defense News
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znkeau51l45f8hki7bgv2n1iahksrqe3kosae5ho_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdj64o34c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tth6iomcplgs1qmbdpiedg72sbjcor76s5m6dhm2tbi66obbd5h65gb6clkm1g6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbcphh6apm2ptmc5j39o5ic8r749fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1f94qai1sfhh6av864ohhi7mdphgek8qiuqftuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdj64o34c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2hnfhl9rtikn03gcddpke61gereapb82oh7bm98_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdj64o34c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq4cislcca8sg2km26b8k8g70pdnn5i1co4s8h2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdj64o34c9h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: BREAKING NEWS: My race is declared “toss up” as we move to end Schumer’s majority
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
body:
Republicans are ready to FLIP the Senate!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58739616:6GiLlX2Nu:m:1:3253819041:B778844396235807B1BC89BA2FE80F0E:r)
Peter,

In the wake of historic victories in formerly deep-blue Virginia, Nevada Republicans are ready to flip the Senate as momentum shifts toward our movement.

The University of Virginia's Center for Politics - one of the most well-known political analysis organizations in the nation - has moved Nevada's Senate race from "Leans Democrat" to "Toss-up." Because I represent the biggest threat to their majority, Democrats are already focusing their false attacks on me.

This is a major sign of momentum and a clear recognition by the national media that Catherine Cortez Masto is on the ropes. [**Whatever you can give -- even just $1 -- we need your help to keep this huge momentum going.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58739616:6GiLlX2Nu:m:1:3253819041:B778844396235807B1BC89BA2FE80F0E:r) [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58739616:6GiLlX2Nu:m:1:3253819041:B778844396235807B1BC89BA2FE80F0E:r)
---

Virginia showed what we've known for a long time - especially here in Nevada - that parents are stepping up to fight for their children's education. They won't stand for critical race theory indoctrinations or efforts by radical liberals to get between them and their kids.

The results last Tuesday are no surprise to those of us but if we want change, we must continue the fight and make sure our voices are heard loud and clear next November, just as Virginians made their voices heard last Tuesday.

I am thankful for your continued support as we fight to protect Nevada. With your help - along with leaders like President Trump and Governor DeSantis who have endorsed my candidacy - we will be victorious.

Best,
Adam Laxalt

\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58739617:6GiLlX2Nu:m:1:3253819041:B778844396235807B1BC89BA2FE80F0E:r) A note for Peter, from Adam Laxalt:

Peter, thank you for your support as I take on the Democrat establishment to FLIP Nevada and the U.S. Senate. Our movement is off to a great start, but the battle has just begun.

Even CNN has rated my race one of the MOST LIKELY blue to red flips for 2022. It's clear, the road to the Senate majority runs through Nevada, but I need your immediate help to fight back against the Democrats' fundraising machine.

[**Help restore a Republican majority**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58739617:6GiLlX2Nu:m:1:3253819041:B778844396235807B1BC89BA2FE80F0E:r)
Thank you for all your support,
Adam Laxalt
Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Honoring our Veterans Today
body:
With deepest gratitude
| | | |
---
|
---
November 11, 2021
Today is a sacred day in our country; the day we celebrate our Veterans and the many sacrifices they and their families have made in defense of this great nation.
From the brave revolutionaries who joined the Continental Army under Washington, right here in Massachusetts in June of 1775... to those heroes in uniform who protect us on land, sea and in the air every day - We owe them a debt of gratitude we can never repay.
But we can make sure that we fulfill our promise to care for those who put their lives on the line by dedicating the resources they need to live their post-service years with the dignity they deserve. Safe and secure housing, career placement, top notch physical and mental healthcare... Our Veterans deserve nothing less.
In recent years, we've fallen short of that commitment. Our state Soldier's Homes have not been managed properly and the handling of the Covid pandemic in those care facilities, tragically, cost many retired military members their lives. There was a lot of "passing the buck" on where responsibility fell and it's clear that we're going to need to reprioritize how our Veterans are cared for by the state.
In the Diehl administration, we will build on Geoff's commitment during his time in the legislature to the brave service men and women of the Commonwealth, to assisting their Blue Star families during times of deployment, and to those Gold Star families who carry on the legacy of their loved ones.
On this day, let's remember to thank those who are willing to proudly put themselves in harm's way to maintain our freedoms and let's commit to making sure they know we will support them on the home front in every way possible. May God bless our Veterans, this wonderful Commonwealth and these United States of America!
---
|

---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
[Diehl for Massachusetts ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hr07bFAq_Pm8L5eOro3-zD8h4WBWRH1h7Mnnx_5nfM3boQv3cKw9KDbAbQ-EiAuSx-nNhjcC-4MfLpYL41n-lb9wgo3uQijAUzSanYjmggHXU688oHPfWtdlblcfzW2eej1Np8_dPrveiZy5IEwoE_mDRLiYEBLFsrRh97qMwFtFd0jF2ZUcgw==&c=U6QKyJUVTfwbxw69tQ-vpGsEtSU-pHmUVif3BULLwnpswylXG8_aVQ==&ch=jEPWRi2EJKl79hFawLLu_xCsbQuR5V-Z01CPlXYH8P9d8zm3V3Gudw==)

name: Charlie Crist
subject: This Veterans Day we remember and honor our nation's veterans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
I want to take today to thank and honor our veterans and their families here in Florida and all across the country for their service. Our country is eternally grateful for their commitment and sacrifice. |
---

| | |
---
This Veterans Day we remember and honor our nation's veterans.

We remember and celebrate the brave men and women who dedicated their lives and made the ultimate sacrifice in order to defend our great nation and keep our families and communities safe. Our country thanks all who have served honorably for their tireless, selfless contributions.

Today, we also remember the sacrifices made by the families and loved ones of our veterans, who have supported our servicemembers every step of the way, and played a critical role in the defense of our nation. Lastly, we remember the values and principles these men and women fought and died for — equality, freedom, liberty, and justice for all.

Today and always, we must all honor that service and sacrifice with action and gratitude.

Like so many Americans, I am proud to have a veteran in my family that dutifully served our country in its time of need. My grandfather, Adam Christodoulous, was a WWI Veteran who fought honorably alongside his fellow servicemembers for our nation and for our allies. I have always admired his commitment and sacrifice to our country when America needed it most.
---
I want to take today to thank our veterans here in Florida and all across the country for their dedication and honorable service to our nation. Our country is eternally grateful.

God Bless,
Charlie

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---
Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg, FL 33731
United States

name: Sen. Rob Ortt
subject: Today we recognize Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
The brave men and women who have served in our United States Military.
| | | |
---
---
|
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,

Today we recognize Veterans Day and the brave men and women who have served in our United States Military.
As a Veteran of the War in Afghanistan, today is a deeply personal day. I want to thank all of my brothers and sisters who put on the uniform to defend our great nation, including those I served with during Operation Enduring Freedom.
No matter who's in charge of our country, we must Never Forget America is an exceptional nation - born on the idea that all men are created equal and entitled to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. We must also Never Forget that our rights and liberties have been secured with the blood, sweat and tears of our veterans - it is because of them that we live freely in the greatest nation on the globe.
It is not enough to show our appreciation on one day - every single freedom loving patriot should show gratitude to our veterans each and every day. If you see someone in uniform today, or any day, the simple act of thanking them will go a long way.
So to all those who have served, and continue to serve: Thank you. Your family, friends, and neighbors appreciate and recognize your contributions and sacrifice on behalf of our state and nation. God bless you all. Happy Veterans Day.
---
|

---
|
---
| |
---

| | Folks, It’s Veterans Day -- a day to celebrate and remember the contributions and sacrifices folks in the service make for us and our freedom. It’s also a day that I like to reflect upon the ways in which we can better serve our veterans. All too often, veterans come home ready to continue serving their country in the workforce, only to find that there are no opportunities for them and very few resources to help them re-acclimate. If elected to Congress, protecting and expanding resources for veterans will be one of my top priorities. They risk their lives to protect us -- the least we can do is provide them with resources and opportunities when they make it home. Thank you,
Charles

name: Matt Castelli
subject: This Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
| Team,

Today, we honor those who sacrificed so much to protect our country. Throughout our history, our veterans have stepped up to serve in times of war and peace, and many have made the ultimate sacrifice. They have served our country, exemplifying what it means to be a true patriot: putting aside self-interest to serve a greater good.

This Veterans Day, I am reflecting specifically on the sacrifice of the 9/11 generation of veterans. For 20 years, this generation answered the call of our nation with the highest form of service - putting their lives on the line in defense of our freedom on the battlefields of Afghanistan and Iraq, at home, and at posts around the world.

As a CIA officer serving overseas alongside our servicemembers, I saw firsthand the service and sacrifice of brothers and sisters in uniform. Today, I want to share my deep appreciation for every veteran and military family in NY-21, in New York, and across the country.

Our veterans are the very best of us and set forth the example for each of us to follow as we strive to create a more perfect union. We owe our veterans more than our gratitude. We owe them a renewed commitment and intensified efforts to serve them and their families here at home as well as they have served our country.

I hope you’ll take time out on this Veterans Day to honor a special veteran in your life and thank them for what they’ve done to ensure our country’s security and freedom.

With gratitude,

Matt Castelli

clean_body: | Team, Today, we honor those who sacrificed so much to protect our country. Throughout our history, our veterans have stepped up to serve in times of war and peace, and many have made the ultimate sacrifice. They have served our country, exemplifying what it means to be a true patriot: putting aside self-interest to serve a greater good. This Veterans Day, I am reflecting specifically on the sacrifice of the 9/11 generation of veterans. For 20 years, this generation answered the call of our nation with the highest form of service - putting their lives on the line in defense of our freedom on the battlefields of Afghanistan and Iraq, at home, and at posts around the world. As a CIA officer serving overseas alongside our servicemembers, I saw firsthand the service and sacrifice of brothers and sisters in uniform. Today, I want to share my deep appreciation for every veteran and military family in NY-21, in New York, and across the country. Our veterans are the very best of us and set forth the example for each of us to follow as we strive to create a more perfect union. We owe our veterans more than our gratitude. We owe them a renewed commitment and intensified efforts to serve them and their families here at home as well as they have served our country. I hope you’ll take time out on this Veterans Day to honor a special veteran in your life and thank them for what they’ve done to ensure our country’s security and freedom. With gratitude, Matt Castelli | = | Matt Castelli is a former CIA officer and Director for Counterterrorism at the National Security Council who served in both the Obama and Trump White Houses. He lives in Saratoga County and is running to represent the people of NY’s 21st Congressional District. | ** Paid for by Castelli for Congress Castelli for Congress PO Box 2341 Wilton, NY 12831 United States **

name: Elaine Luria
subject: Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38520137/315818590/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTFiYzZhNS1mNzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vvaxozV-QAdA68Lkreo8N0l3_XdEyOfoWNH06mprR2k=)

| | Folks, As a 20-year Navy veteran, Veterans Day means a lot to me. I like to reflect on my own time in the service, and think about all the wonderful, hard-working folks I met along the way. This day is also always a reminder of the work that needs to be done to better serve our veterans when they return from their service -- mental health resources, affordable housing, and desirable job opportunities all come to mind. While we can never fully repay our veterans for their service to our country, we can fight to live up to the promises we’ve made to them. That’s why protecting veterans and expanding their rights are chief among the reasons I decided to run for office -- and I take pride in being one of the foremost champions for veterans’ rights in the House. I hope you get some time today to reflect on the sacrifices veterans have made for this country, and thank any veterans that you have in your life. Serving veterans in Congress is an honor, and I will always fight to make sure you have the support they deserve. Thank you,
Elaine
---

name: Jasmine
subject: Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38520073/315818490/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTFiYzZhNS1mNzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cIIEjwxfTZ6eCDm9RkVXHNwp142E0uiZ2TmIGAKaMhg=)

| | Peter, Today is about honoring the brave service members who have sacrificed so much to protect our nation and our democracy. While words of gratitude are important, it’s just as essential that we take care of those who’ve made the personal sacrifice to serve our country. When veterans return home, they need help readjusting -- and we owe it to them to ease their transition back to civilian life. It is critical that we invest in veterans’ mental health, help them find jobs, and ensure they have access to affordable housing. This is just one part of the process to thank our veterans for everything they’ve done. I support investing in our veterans just like they’ve invested in us. Thank you to all of the veterans who served from WNC and beyond. \-- Jasmine
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: This hurts to say honestly...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
It hurts me to write this, Peter.
|
---
| | |
It hurts me to write this, Peter.

I just can't believe that after everyone reached out, we still failed to reach my goal.

_Mike Pence reached out.
Mike Pompeo reached out.
Donald Trump Jr. reached out.
Mark, my Campaign Manager, reached out._

We are on the doorstep of making history, Peter. But by continuing to miss goal after goal after goal, we are now putting my campaign in jeopardy -- these goals aren't arbitrary. These are REAL goals and REAL numbers that we REALLY need to hit in order to have a shot at competing with the Democrats here in Florida.

**[Because of this, I have NO CHOICE but to activate a 3X match for the next 60 minutes to try and save my campaign.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58742243:6i_7VX2hN:m:1:3298722022:6011AB053FF8676F4422FC217947622F:r "Because of this, I have NO CHOICE but to activate a 3X match for the next 60 minutes to try

name: Special Election Alerts (via Team Ellzey)
subject: This is how it ends, Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
Texas turning blue eliminates any chance at taking the House majority and the Presidency.
**★★★ DEMOCRATS TO WIN IN TEXAS ★★★ **
Patriot - We can't believe this:

name: Unite the Country
subject: Our Veterans put their lives on the line for our country’s values.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, unitethecountry
body:
Unite the Country [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/EA/EA005/1/78987/images/utc-web-logo.png]
Peter,

Happy Veterans Day!

Today, we thank our Veterans for putting their lives on the line for our country’s values. It’s because of your selfless service that we enjoy the liberty and democracy that we all too often take for granted.

That’s why we want to recommit to ensuring that all of our Vets and their families have access to good education, health care, and job opportunities when they return home.

Our Vets never gave up on us, and we will never give up on them.

Thanks for all that you do,

Unite the Country
Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment.
Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage.

Paid for by Unite the Country, unitethecountry.com [https://unitethecountry.com/], and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Unite the Country
1200 PENNSYLVANIA AVE NW
#4383
WASHINGTON, DC 20044

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Courage and Sacrifice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:
body:
Today we celebrate those in the armed forces | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38522969/315831020/-1431549694?refcode=EM_FR_211111veterans_N_ED_TE_6_NG_N_testa_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzVkMmEwOS1mYzQyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-R6gc_tiQ4a10vzFXFXDaed1GoD6JVoQcAHRnZQ_GA=)
---
Team, I wanted to take some time today to send a Happy Veterans Day to all members of our nation’s armed forces. As the son of a Vietnam Veteran, I saw the dedication and courage my father had to serve his country overseas. But I also saw how we have left behind generations of Americans. Overprescribed opioids, homelessness, servicemen and women who get sick on the job, there’s big problems facing veterans today. It’s going to take all of us working together, across political lines, to help build them a better future. But I believe we can, and we should. I can’t wait to celebrate this day next year, with all the people of this district, as we finally push out Scott Perry’s failed leadership and forge forward into a new day. Once that happens, we can finally start putting the priorities of veterans first. But for every Veterans Day before and after that, I want to say thank you for the courage, bravery, and dedication that all members of the Armed Forces have shown to our country and our communities. Happy Veterans Day

Eugene
---
---
**** | **** | Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58742818:6sByvX2QN:m:1:3298722022:0B98E30F63EF6F839C5AC1F29E813551:r)
---
Peter,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this, Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58742818:6sByvX2QN:m:1:3298722022:0B98E30F63EF6F839C5AC1F29E813551:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58742818:6sByvX2QN:m:1:3298722022:0B98E30F63EF6F839C5AC1F29E813551:r)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58742818:6sByvX2QN:m:1:3298722022:0B98E30F63EF6F839C5AC1F29E813551:r)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58742818:6sByvX2QN:m:1:3298722022:0B98E30F63EF6F839C5AC1F29E813551:r)

name: Ben Downing
subject: Veterans have risked their lives, so that we may live ours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Downing Committee
body:
Throughout Massachusetts' history, folks in our state have signed up to serve our country and protect our freedoms. They have risked their lives, so that we may live ours.

They have come from every community and region, offering their talents in service of the greater good.

Often, they have been new immigrants: Irish and Italian, Colombian, Cape Verdean, and so many others seeking to give back to their new home.

There is no legislation, speech, or parade that can begin to repay or honor their service. Words are not enough.

Celebrations — no matter how grand — feel small when measured against their willingness to lay down their lives for others.

I hope you’ll join me in committing today and every day to build a Massachusetts and a United States worthy of the sacrifice our veterans are willing to make and have made for generations.

Happy Veterans Day,

BenPaid for by the Downing Committee
Downing Committee
PO Box 120
Lowell, MA 01853
United States

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: your monthly contribution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Your monthly contribution now can double or triple in impact later.
#
Derek,
Now that we’re officially less than one year out from the general election, we’ve got a lot of work ahead to protect our razor-thin Democratic majority.
Last week’s results in Virginia underscore the importance of creating strong organizing infrastructure for both rural, suburban, and urban counties. **And in order to reach Pennsylvania voters in all 67 counties by Election Day, we need to make critical investments now — not later.**
The only thing that is holding us back from scaling our campaign as fast as possible? Dollars in the door. Without monthly contributions, our campaign can’t plan ahead and I can’t sign off on investments for more campaign offices, organizers, flyers, supplies, or advertising budget.
But enough people, giving $5, $10, or $25 every month, gives me the confidence that we have enough contributions we can count on to make early investments now. [**That’s why I’m respectfully asking if you would set up a monthly, small-dollar donation of $5, $10, $25, or any amount to our campaign. Setting up a monthly contribution is easy and secure, and you can cancel at any time if your budget changes.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37217?t=1&akid=3414%2E434096%2EL6fFx5)
[**__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37217?t=2&akid=3414%2E434096%2EL6fFx5)__
**[Donate Monthly »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37217?t=3&akid=3414%2E434096%2EL6fFx5)**
CNN has consistently rated Pennsylvania as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Democratic seat in the country, and according to the latest polling, voters overwhelmingly see our campaign as the ONLY campaign that can win statewide in Pennsylvania.
**And here’s the thing, Derek. A monthly contribution to our campaign is one of the single greatest ways to support us in the coming year and fuel the organizing infrastructure needed to reach voters across the commonwealth.** With less than a year to get John elected and grow the Democratic majority, there has never been a better time to make a small-dollar monthly contribution to our campaign.
We know that this race is going to be the most competitive of 2022, and in order to win, we’ll have to go ALL in to organize and mobilize supporters in all 67 counties. But we can’t do that without your support. [**So please, can you set up a monthly, small-dollar donation of $5, $10, $25, or any amount to our campaign?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37217?t=4&akid=3414%2E434096%2EL6fFx5)
We can do so much more with your donation if we start now. We have a lot of offices to open, staff to hire, and advertisements to launch in the year ahead.
With gratitude,
Eric Stern 💙
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211111-3414-footer&t=5&refcode2=3414_434096_L6fFx5&akid=3414%2E434096%2EL6fFx5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=3414%2E434096%2EL6fFx5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=3414%2E434096%2EL6fFx5)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Veterans Day
body:
Today, we honor the veterans who served our nation.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013H9_wECVsS4Y4Rz4cn77zMTgaskdVzV07dXdjE36TirFeHNAwEjAypNsuQ2XA_cL8GsUKhyVAhdJH4jQTrmqr8EdkDnumQDmVdTstB2ZGQQlLj6aSNFvQka6UfOWwRD8AuRkW5eFAaGMudV-_GCklAfLswyGEszz&c=deeiKORua4OvIrQcNiNexn92pAV3JehhVJGeQ-rEJ-JTg7CkMPr59g==&ch=mzpaOqoukGVJHU_9RSkimL5vDmvd2wWINYNZ-wJWc0tCnaqxQq2Ubw==)
---
| Friend,
Today, we honor the veterans who served our nation. The brave men and women who tirelessly protected American freedom and liberty deserve our utmost gratitude. Were it not for them, we would not be here today.
Our veterans remind us of what it truly means to be an American. Thanks to them we can truly say that we live in the Land of the Free.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013H9_wECVsS4Y4Rz4cn77zMTgaskdVzV07dXdjE36TirFeHNAwEjAypNsuQ2XA_cL8GsUKhyVAhdJH4jQTrmqr8EdkDnumQDmVdTstB2ZGQQlLj6aSNFvQka6UfOWwRD8AuRkW5eFAaGMudV-_GCklAfLswyGEszz&c=deeiKORua4OvIrQcNiNexn92pAV3JehhVJGeQ-rEJ-JTg7CkMPr59g==&ch=mzpaOqoukGVJHU_9RSkimL5vDmvd2wWINYNZ-wJWc0tCnaqxQq2Ubw==)
---
| For any veterans who might be reading this, I would like to say thank you for all you have done in the defense of our great Nation. Your service will always be valued and, certainly, never forgotten.
If you are not a veteran, be sure to take the time today to thank those that risked their own safety in defense of ours.
Thank you, Kat Cammack
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013H9_wECVsS4Y4Rz4cn77zMTgaskdVzV07dXdjE36TirFeHNAwEjAypNsuQ2XA_cL8GsUKhyVAhdJH4jQTrmqr8EdkDnumQDmVdTstB2ZGQQlLj6aSNFvQka6UfOWwRD8AuRkW5eFAaGMudV-_GCklAfLswyGEszz&c=deeiKORua4OvIrQcNiNexn92pAV3JehhVJGeQ-rEJ-JTg7CkMPr59g==&ch=mzpaOqoukGVJHU_9RSkimL5vDmvd2wWINYNZ-wJWc0tCnaqxQq2Ubw==)

name: Team Cheri Beasley
subject: Jackie Gordon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We’re reaching out today to ask you to split a donation between our campaign and Jackie Gordon’s campaign for NY-02.
#

Hey team -
We’re reaching out today to ask you to split a donation between our campaign and Jackie Gordon’s campaign for NY-02.
Jackie is an immigrant, combat veteran, and educator who came within striking distance of flipping NY-02 blue last year. She is an inspiring candidate who can finish the job this time!
Just like North Carolina’s Senate seat, it’s important to flip seats like NY-02 in order to protect and expand our majorities in Congress.
**[Will you split a donation between our campaign to send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate and Jackie Gordon’s campaign for NY-02 today? Special interests are going to spend millions trying to hold these seats for Republicans, so we’re counting on grassroots support to help us fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38525998/315844696/-472384554?refcode2=56c7fbd0-0043-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211111-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmM3ZmJkMC0wMDQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=85G_IR2_s1WyQxrugKaxCDrbAAo5gpp-Cbm_KhA8T4E=)**

Jackie spent 29 years in the U.S. Army and was deployed four times over the course of her career. As an educator and school guidance counselor, she worked with her students to seize every opportunity available to them.
Together, we can help Cheri and Jackie replace Republican politicians who are putting special interests before their constituents. We can count on them to champion the needs of our families in Congress.

clean_body: We’re reaching out today to ask you to split a donation between our campaign and Jackie Gordon’s campaign for NY-02. Hey team - We’re reaching out today to ask you to split a donation between our campaign and Jackie Gordon’s campaign for NY-02. Jackie is an immigrant, combat veteran, and educator who came within striking distance of flipping NY-02 blue last year. She is an inspiring candidate who can finish the job this time! Just like North Carolina’s Senate seat, it’s important to flip seats like NY-02 in order to protect and expand our majorities in Congress. = = Jackie spent 29 years in the U.S. Army and was deployed four times over the course of her career. As an educator and school guidance counselor, she worked with her students to seize every opportunity available to them. Together, we can help Cheri and Jackie replace Republican politicians who are putting special interests before their constituents. We can count on them to champion the needs of our families in Congress. \- Team Beasley = * Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
