name: Marco Rubio
subject: This hurts to say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
It hurts me to write this, Peter.
|
---
| | |
It hurts me to write this, Peter.

I just can't believe that after everyone reached out, we still failed to reach my goal.

_Mike Pence reached out.
Mike Pompeo reached out.
Donald Trump Jr. reached out.
Mark, my Campaign Manager, reached out._

We are on the doorstep of making history, Peter. But by continuing to miss goal after goal after goal, we are now putting my campaign in jeopardy -- these goals aren't arbitrary. These are REAL goals and REAL numbers that we REALLY need to hit in order to have a shot at competing with the Democrats here in Florida.

**[Because of this, I have NO CHOICE but to activate a 3X match for the next 60 minutes to try and save my campaign.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743155:69Gu7X2NG:m:1:3253819041:193C364496833F08931A94FFBB95974A:r "Because of this, I have NO CHOICE but to activate a 3X match for the next 60 minutes to try

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Happy Veteran's Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter,
I’m writing today to share my deepest appreciation for all of our nation’s veterans. Growing up on army bases and in a family full of veterans, I learned discipline very early on and that service is meant to be selfless.
Today, we want to honor members of the Armed Forces that have defended our nation’s freedom and protected our country's future.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88943/images/Image%20from%20iOS%20%2851%29.jpg]Today also reminds us that we must do more to protect our veterans when they re-enter civilian life. After returning home many veterans are not given adequate support. GA-14 has a considerable veteran population yet we only have one VA hospital in the district and no veterans’ cemeteries . We must do better. We will do better. That's why I'm running to change the way that we treat our veterans when they return home.
We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices.
Sincerely,
Holly McCormack.

name: Amanda Milius
subject: [Exposed] Dem’s plot against President Trump!
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744152:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r)
---
| Peter,
If you don't know my name, I can tell you everything you need to know about me in one sentence:
**I 'm truly a one-of-a-kind filmmaker as...a principled conservative and proud Trump-supporting activist working in radical far-Left Hollywood!**
I know from personal experience that identifying as a conservative in this leftwing-dominated industry IS NOT for the faint of heart.
And as a conservative warrior, I've doubled down by making films that expose the Left's corruption and defend our values from anti-American propaganda.
I'm writing to ask you to [support Kash Patel, a fellow conservative fighter](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744152:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r) who: ****
****
* **STOLE** the show in my hit documentary, _**The Plot Against the President**_ , AND

* **PLAYED** a CRUCIAL role in helping Congressman Devin Nunes uncover and expose the truth about Hilary Clinton's Russia-Collusion Hoax!

Before I tell you more about Kash's fight against the Deep State, I urge you to:
**[Stand with Kash and his LEGAL OFFENSIVE against CNN, the New York Times and other Fake News media outlets with a generous gift!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744152:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r)**
The Kash Patel Legal Offense Fund gives everyday Americans who've been unfairly smeared by the Fake News Media or censored by the Big Tech tyrants an opportunity to fight back!
_[_As a special thanks for donating $50 or more to support Kash 's effort_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744152:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r), I'll send you a free digital copy of my new, hit documentary, **The Plot Against the President!**_
**(And if you give[$250 or more](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744153:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r), Kash will sign it for you!)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744152:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r) I first met Kash when I interviewed him for my recent documentary, _The Plot Against the President_ , and I'm extremely proud to call this brilliant patriot my friend.
If you haven't seen the movie, I spoke with all the major conservative heroes who risked their careers and reputations to expose the Russia-collusion Hoax, including (to name just a few):
* Donald Trump Jr,
* Former Acting Director of National Intelligence Ric Grennell,
* Congressman Devin Nunes, and
* Roger Stone

**Without Kash 's relentless pursuit of the truth, the scandalous story of the un-American alliance between Democrats, Deep State operatives, and Fake News "journalists" working to destroy Donald Trump's presidency before he even took the oath of office NEVER would have come to light!**
| | | | [DONATE NOW!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744152:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r)
---

Making matters worse, after exposing their false and ridiculous stories about President Trump, Fake News CNN, the New York Times, and many others repaid Kash by...

**... doing everything in their power to drag his good name through the mud and assassinate his character!**

Like you, I'm deeply angered by the sleazy and unconscionable hit job by major American TV networks and newspapers to railroad this great patriot.

**[That's why I hope you'll join me in supporting Kash's work today with a generous gift to help fund the fight to help ALL Americans who have experienced defamation and silencing from the media and big tech!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744152:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r)**

_Don 't forget, as a special token of my appreciation for standing with my good friend Kash in this all-important fight against the leftwing media..._

**[>> I'll send you a complimentary copy of my hit documentary, The Plot Against the President for your gift of $50! <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744152:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r)**

If you're in a financial position to make a larger contribution, I hope you'll do so right now.
| | | [Chip in $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744154:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r)
---
| | | [Chip in $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744153:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r)
---
| | | [Chip in $500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744155:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r)
---
No matter what amount you choose to give, I urge you to [please make your contribution immediately](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744152:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r) before you close this email and move on with your day.

Thank you for supporting Kash's legal offensive campaign to help Americans who've experienced defamation from the media and big tech fight back!

Yours in the fight to expose the Left,

Amanda Milius
Conservative Filmmaker

| | | | [Donate to Help Kash Fight the Fake News Media! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744152:JAJlcX2NG:m:1:3298722022:F7EB9491206D3517E2524C3964CAABB5:r)

name: Culp for Congress
subject: The RINO's Need to Go!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=By4AXk&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=Ew9tJDN&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/e8363788-35dd-492b-af66-1032e8b315a3.png]

13 House Republicans Voted with the Biden Administration on the $1.2 Trillion "Infrastructure Bill!"

I'm angry. Every American should be.

We vote Republicans into office only to have them vote against us when we need them most. Americans are tired of being stepped on by their elected public servants! Representatives are meant to represent the people in their communities, districts, and states, as well as to fulfill the oath they swore to uphold the constitution.

But we don't have to keep putting up with RINO's. We know who the RINO's are, Dan Newhouse and the 10 Republicans who voted to impeach President Trump [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SLzn7X&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECBKyVO&], and now these 13 Republicans who again sided with the Radical Left. (Some of them are the same who voted for impeachment.)

They'll continue to vote with the Radical Left and put America Last.

Not only must we vote them out of office but we need to closely verify and scrutinize the people who'll be replacing them

We the people can Stand Up for America by voting for and supporting "America First" candidates. Americans are wide awake to what's happening. We will remember who the RINO's are and get them out of office in 2022. But we have to make sure that we're not voting in more RINO's.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/a4a4e41b-9c73-4e25-80a8-33f29302e62b.jpg]

How do we know if we're electing a RINO or not?

A great way to do this is to get out and meet the candidates. It's evident once you start asking questions if they will uphold their oath and stand for the constitution. Another way is to look at what they've done in the past and if they have taken a stand to protect the laws of our land and to defend the American people.

I will always uphold and defend the Constitution.

I have shown I'll defend our rights and protect our freedoms. I promise you I'll continue to do the same as your Congressman.

Honored to ser [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SLznqE&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EJ8bCAR&]ve,

Loren

PS: We do need your support to keep up with our opponents who are dumping huge amounts of special interest money or funding their own campaigns.

I have news for them: We the People's vote isn't for sale.

I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SLzngU&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ESmgFyQ&]

THIS IS IMPORTANT. I CAN DO $100! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SLznDJ&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EI1MhI4&]

I CAN PLAY BIG LEAGUE AND DO $250! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SLzna7&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EQYFIdC&]

I WANT TO GO ALL IN FOR $2,900 TO GET RID OF NEWHOUSE [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SLznAZ&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECewwvM&]

PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS

, 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States

You may unsubscribe [https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=By4AXk&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EyMYhjK&pt=unsubscribe] or change your contact details [https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=By4AXk&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EConheQ&pt=change_details] at any time.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: Veterans Day
body:
This Veterans Day, we thank the brave men and women of our military who have protected our great nation... |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=37579dc569&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, This Veterans Day, we thank the brave men and women of our military who have protected our great nation from those who threaten to strip us of our liberties and freedoms. It’s simple: if not for our Veterans, America as we know and love her would not exist today. ****
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=ab7bf6ee1e&e=c2296cffff)
---
| In my opinion, our Veterans embody what it truly means to be an American. Their self-sacrifice, courage, and deep commitment to the red, white, and blue represent the best our country has to offer. Thanks to them, we can truly say we live in the greatest country in the world. If you are one of the brave Americans who served our nation, I would like to thank you deeply for your service. **God bless you all,**

_Amanda Makki_
---

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer
body:
In service.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38535664/315880718/-532505380?refcode=EM_C_211111VeteransDay_H_MTO_90DO_3_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjM3NzU0My0xOTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qIjhfYRzwkm8w8kOBlIK11bDBMCIw9eaxK5kKf8xKEg=)
To all of our veterans,

Today I want to take a moment and thank all of you. Without you, we would not enjoy living in a democracy where we get to vote for those who represent us in government.
I thank you from the bottom of my heart for your service to our state and our country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38535666/315880721/-532505380?refcode=EM_C_211111VeteransDay_H_MTO_90DO_3_G_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjM3NzU0My0xOTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qIjhfYRzwkm8w8kOBlIK11bDBMCIw9eaxK5kKf8xKEg=)
You protect the freedoms that allow us to vote in elections, run for office, and live up to the values we all believe in. Thank you for the sacrifices you have made.
In service to our country,

Maggie
_ _
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >>**_ _**______[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38535668/315880723/-532505380?refcode=EM_C_211111VeteransDay_H_MTO_90DO_3_G_N_BIO&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjM3NzU0My0xOTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qIjhfYRzwkm8w8kOBlIK11bDBMCIw9eaxK5kKf8xKEg=)**_

clean_body: In service. = To all of our veterans, Today I want to take a moment and thank all of you. Without you, we would not enjoy living in a democracy where we get to vote for those who represent us in government. I thank you from the bottom of my heart for your service to our state and our country. = You protect the freedoms that allow us to vote in elections, run for office, and live up to the values we all believe in. Thank you for the sacrifices you have made. In service to our country, Maggie Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! name: Doug Gansler
subject: Honoring our veterans 🇺🇸
body:
Our military men and women, from all of the services, make our state stronger and today, we honor their remarkable sacrifices. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jumq2oOJq5fWbUdAsY5u6_MXN1fd_H0oq44EUh5kZ0LaAT0FDJCDBH00OKtsh3bIeYq7UTTMzdfdue0pi5QmlrJUu5KsV1n8U-OWCIgKut41A704z8SfbwrNJrR19XWUoqJZXVpJsHtH854kDDtKmFYcOVXnw2-PisofCZKbve491bz412McWPF1EXyBQy8wogqg9n-_L21_yuc5UF1FQs/3gx/mPje1JhzTISVRpln_bJl-w/h0/2pgP-5QqjHqFyuLv9c3QacQVRUDUJVWyaeKgJzC62vY)
---
Hi friends, **Our military men and women, from all of the services, make our state stronger and today, we honor their remarkable sacrifices.** Veterans make up 8% of Maryland's total population, and all over our state, we have major military installations that are vital to our country's national security -- from Fort Meade to Andrews Air Force Base, and from Walter Reed to the United States Naval Academy. Veterans and military installations are vital for the economies of towns like Bethesda, Patuxent River, Waldorf, and Annapolis, as well as for our state's economy as a whole. Maryland owes a tremendous debt to the brave men and women who have served our country in the Armed Forces, from the Revolutionary War to the global war on terrorism and all of the conflicts, crises, and wars in between. Through them all, our veterans have defended our rights, freedom, and way of life. **As Governor, my Administration will honor their service by making Maryland the the most veteran-friendly state in the nation by enacting policies to:**
---
* **[Support military families](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jumq2oOJq5fWbUdAsY5u6_MXN1fd_H0oq44EUh5kZ0LaAT0FDJCDBH00OKtsh3bId7pkvjlMrlh_jIlH4gogNfq1X6ko-aVlTrjN4TbXt8ZLf7EUeobk6ihyXR7m8TaIBEtxPZknV-xhzL5y7mXRJ0QtdT0TKkNimZec2jjj89hZtvrWDaMrdbbMxdDnM1NTgEBZLB4C0fnDQSiZQDLa1Q/3gx/mPje1JhzTISVRpln_bJl-w/h1/FOTH2JOANK2Tfff_va-fSW70ZlBfjx9l4oidi4Wl2bY)** by allowing occupational licensing reciprocity, waivers, and telework options for military spouses, while also extending employer tax credits for hiring military and veteran spouses.
* **[Reduce pension taxation](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jumq2oOJq5fWbUdAsY5u6_MXN1fd_H0oq44EUh5kZ0LaAT0FDJCDBH00OKtsh3bIc3aCuiSQuCrFsDFymhXtuvzBAyuv_xLZNJdc6HOKJtlbAtIt8dUs82w6f2m-qf4uiiWh_Vly99o1pXVNvFLllG21S_xJbf2SrHxyT6V90KNB7WUqX1j9nmDm4LB8kETe9vPlT5Map9XFSl6kkO49e8/3gx/mPje1JhzTISVRpln_bJl-w/h2/pYnxfH85-uqp3NTUApKOb5n66ktXJPSw0I6GtU2IomY)** by increasing the subtraction modification on military retirement income to $20,000.
* [**Combat veteran homelessness**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jumq2oOJq5fWbUdAsY5u6_MXN1fd_H0oq44EUh5kZ0LaAT0FDJCDBH00OKtsh3bISvos00f2iVDoN84vsSJ0iYzCjdmKfxsv6PqrpyVeeaJ6X9n95WPijIb6u_huRPgwL5ivAA3rY8OnhCUTEKDjsnInmvNjG8EEEVioL0s_ijjKn-M4XktpRBMZD7Jp_5TB9wavvH32Ji2iQp8qjXb21g/3gx/mPje1JhzTISVRpln_bJl-w/h3/BdY5ffnijqrGTpG8lwcNyOAWLzgkc70JlnOw8ewDXH4) by expanding programs and housing supervised by the Maryland Department of Veterans Affairs.
* [**Expand mental healthcare access**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jumq2oOJq5fWbUdAsY5u6_MXN1fd_H0oq44EUh5kZ0LaAT0FDJCDBH00OKtsh3bIXIZHVxLbgDQJnn2lIwC1d7P33B-gGo8_dJ_sAY0lv-y8PBLTyBjU5jtRwcwnQkY7pwps85gj5_BdnRRWB_FA638gVxdgVnapRXBas9pCebziRVcnU1Dv8xcZDMpioABEyzORLW-Eabe4IrmEY43nbk/3gx/mPje1JhzTISVRpln_bJl-w/h4/FwjBrezF6B-lmf5akeKRAZQnK-tCUrnsoenMjvBrNq8) by instituting a voluntary reduction of access to highly lethal means of suicide policy and increasing the use of veteran treatment courts.
* [**Provide employment opportunities**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jumq2oOJq5fWbUdAsY5u6_MXN1fd_H0oq44EUh5kZ0LaAT0FDJCDBH00OKtsh3bIS-U7gzKPv8km6LhqwJ9fRtkPQf4vodzEebwTZvPrjd-mslTOlxqla7EHBUbD_us8LIZeAznAYTKEeMK9TWs_YekCPpDi67Sbf89IKlUipUxQDIjVaiyssW0t1rkc6b7ynVdfeSDOkp7CuqakCf844M/3gx/mPje1JhzTISVRpln_bJl-w/h5/j2zqaNdLLWL06fH6FKFwH0QBtQ5Luu02McsWhBlqkqQ) by connecting veterans with great training and resources to get jobs in our state, while also supporting veteran-owned small businesses and enacting hiring incentives for returning veterans.

---
[ **READ THE FULL PLAN ON MY WEBSITE ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jumq2oOJq5fWbUdAsY5u6_MXN1fd_H0oq44EUh5kZ0LaAT0FDJCDBH00OKtsh3bIdXiOFCyCAhMQKvkfettC77pJzTnC2i3fNKBW9ZP_-2hyTQyhUYkPNOwQmjlD8MQ9fKLVhhPGdZNYFkJh-JXT2VtGpjbSJXl_TZMCM2rKJ71jg6Jwe1KVQkBH-r3UQbHya_JO_Wf_gt2Yr-FkBJpXs4/3gx/mPje1JhzTISVRpln_bJl-w/h6/iGuH3WY7h7pP2TmKQsxL2Y3iHfEOsFdGnn-FRi_Z-q0)
---
My Administration will have a message that rings loud and clear to veterans everywhere: **Maryland wants you.** **You 've put our country first; and Maryland recognizes that by putting you first in return. ** Thank you to all who have served. Doug
---
[ **DONATE**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzuqS2zhcb4vGUwJa3b16K-zHu5nnQ9hiRa2bN2-coLESqZEzNBKUm4Zy4h8KUB1fN032XOzaFuYvVfZiJSepcxoQsf6rf-QU-xjTfJebvghAIx1ws5-pbHkI4WNw-fc2DvdByEGM5UyfHNC9FSafSMIm5T01ZFhj3GNLPX3J8nP1zUzhjSXab3-8EKHNsc8qU2j67wTC0bWfXQFQH7PYtgbtFrsbrOtX3sxdFGvHaN3Tdnz-sW01J2py3R29PvS_L2FnsPjX3zlwtzyGq6pNhaI8/3gx/mPje1JhzTISVRpln_bJl-w/h7/0TdiINme_yTQw0vHsQ8qNau3izQSqWa4NRpfmcfLfvA)
---

name: Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate
subject: Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Malcolm knows the profound sacrifices made by our soldiers and their loved ones
#

Happy Veterans Day.
My name is Tristan, and I'm reaching out to you today to tell you why I'm supporting my friend Malcolm Kenyatta's campaign for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.
Honestly, I'm not even big on politics, but I support Malcolm because I know what kind of person he is — which is something I think is often overlooked.
I met Malcolm in 2013 when I was in college at the University of Illinois, and we've been friends ever since.
The thing that struck me most about him was the incredible love he has in his heart for his community and his country.
When my wife and I were deployed to Kuwait in January 2020, Malcolm wrote us one of the most heartfelt letters I've ever received, wishing my wife and me a safe trip and offering to help us in any way we might need.
He even came to the last-minute wedding my wife and I had due to our deployments, and he helped me wordsmith my vows before the ceremony.
That's why I know he'll make an excellent United States Senator. He's the kind of person who would go the extra mile even for a stranger, and he says what he means and means what he says.
As the grandson of a Korean war veteran, Malcolm also knows the profound sacrifices made by our soldiers and their loved ones, and he'll honor that in all the work he does in Washington.
In the Senate, Malcolm will fight for policies that lift up our service members and their families.
He'll be one of the loudest voices in the room against privatizing the Department of Veterans’ Affairs health care, and he'll fight for an economy that works for working-class veterans like my wife and me.
That's exactly the kind of person we need working for us in the Senate, and that's why I am proud to stand with Malcolm on his way to victory.
Thank you,
Tristan Monroe, 1LT Illinois Army National Guard

_Tristan is a first lieutenant in the Illinois Army National Guard. Use of his military rank does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or the Illinois Army National Guard._

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC
---
Malcolm PAC
PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/bdc1bc8e-1243-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/2b377543-1943-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjM3NzU0My0xOTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JFvjf3JTCMcp0sOoRqywzSha97M7_Hk4tzB8gUxFW00=&id=120380453) to unsubscribe. name: Quaye Quartey, Commander, U.S. Navy (ret.)
subject: On this Veterans day 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Quartey for Congress Quartey for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38535982/315881879/-1689843803?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGY1ZjQ4YS0xOTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQgQEqNm72xCU4NU4UzMbsylEHVgGq79vJLJsxyNkUg=&emci=c4a07b37-5c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7df5f48a-1943-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14505483)
---
Friends, I wanted to take a moment to honor and recognize my fellow veterans for their service and sacrifice for our country. As a veteran who served for over two decades, I can tell you that our veterans should be honored for their service on this day and every other. November is also Military Family Appreciation Month, a time when we recognize the unique challenges families face in support of their service members. As a husband and father of two, I have seen the will and strength of families dedicated to staying together abroad and what it is like for others to leave their loved ones behind in order to defend their country far from home. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38535984/315881882/-1689843803?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGY1ZjQ4YS0xOTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQgQEqNm72xCU4NU4UzMbsylEHVgGq79vJLJsxyNkUg=&emci=c4a07b37-5c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7df5f48a-1943-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14505483) During my time in the Navy, I served in combat in Kosovo and Iraq while also supporting counterterrorism and cyberwarfare operations around the globe. Then, I served as a military diplomat on five continents, commanding special forces to combat ISIS-inspired terrorists and protect American interests. I hope to continue serving this country and honoring our veterans in Congress, which is why I’m honored to be endorsed by VoteVets, a leading veterans advocacy group. I want to say again thank you for your service to this country, and I hope you’ll join me today in reflection and gratitude. \-- Quaye Quartey, Commander, U.S. Navy (ret.)
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38535985/315881884/-1689843803?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGY1ZjQ4YS0xOTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQgQEqNm72xCU4NU4UzMbsylEHVgGq79vJLJsxyNkUg=&emci=c4a07b37-5c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7df5f48a-1943-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14505483)
---
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [_**click here**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38535986/315881885/2122512103?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGY1ZjQ4YS0xOTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQgQEqNm72xCU4NU4UzMbsylEHVgGq79vJLJsxyNkUg=&emci=c4a07b37-5c42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7df5f48a-1943-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14505483). clean_body: Friends, I wanted to take a moment to honor and recognize my fellow veterans for their service and sacrifice for our country. As a veteran who served for over two decades, I can tell you that our veterans should be honored for their service on this day and every other. November is also Military Family Appreciation Month, a time when we recognize the unique challenges families face in support of their service members. As a husband and father of two, I have seen the will and strength of families dedicated to staying together abroad and what it is like for others to leave their loved ones behind in order to defend their country far from home. During my time in the Navy, I served in combat in Kosovo and Iraq while also supporting counterterrorism and cyberwarfare operations around the globe. Then, I served as a military diplomat on five continents, commanding special forces to combat ISIS-inspired terrorists and protect American interests. I hope to continue serving this country and honoring our veterans in Congress, which is why I’m honored to be endorsed by VoteVets, a leading veterans advocacy group. I want to say again thank you for your service to this country, and I hope you’ll join me today in reflection and gratitude. \-- Quaye Quartey, Commander, U.S. Navy (ret.) | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Marisa Wood
subject: Veterans Day
body:
I come from a long line of veterans who proudly served our country. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38536063/315882134/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzYxYzU5YS0xOTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6p5uijKzXlkYdzkfA6y31udCU18IpZSirfBB_kBrRSc=)
Happy Veterans Day, friend.

You may not know this, but I come from a long line of veterans who proudly served our country -- my dad was a Master Sergeant in WWII, my brother Gary was a Staff Sergeant who served in Vietnam, and my brother Gian was a Colonel who served two tours in Iraq.

I'm proud of the contributions they made to our country and their role in keeping us safe so we can enjoy the freedom and opportunity we have.

All too often, I've heard stories of service members and veterans who struggle with the transition back to civilian life. They need increased support for dealing with PTSD, mental and other health issues, job placement, and housing.

**No veteran should come home and have to fight for housing, health care, or a dignified wage. In Congress, I will fight to ensure we continue to support our service members during and after their time in uniform.**

Thanks for reading this note, and for your continued support of our campaign.

Marisa

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Paying tribute to our military
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Veterans Day Sisters and Brothers,

The strength of our nation rests proudly on the shoulders of the United States Armed Forces. So, on this Veterans Day, let us pause to remember and remain forever proud and always grateful to those military men and women who put their lives on the line to protect our great nation. Throughout our history, U.S. military members and veterans from all wars have proudly secured the safety of our democracy. As the Congresswoman representing Wisconsin’s Fourth Congressional District, I’m proud to say it is our active-duty service men and women, reserves and our veterans who continue to make this country strong. As our nation stands secure on the shoulders of these brave men and women at home and overseas, let us pay tribute and salute their brave service, courage, and sacrifice. Come, let us stand alongside them, today and every day, and thank them for their service. Thank you!

Together #WeRepresent, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38536672/315885133/-1802529380?refcode=101521&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjI1ZWRlYS0xYjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qu71zHTYFL60Z_Y1kosnQzJCDCw5bg28dNBhx-BH9wg=)
Gwen Moore
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: Veterans Day
body:
Before I took an oath to protect our community and our values as a police officer and Sheriff, I took another oath to protect our country as a U.S. Army soldier.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010FWGnDAFYPetfQ9Qn4U7m0cuZIdcsuZyxW41H8D-qCZYakrnnuI-SmJEssn9MNuRHRF-mSbjuTs76ydUeU7_JXG878DIZQwWTmln7gDUFhsGOo4hYdipW66ts19S_PZeJn8IaClgT3YNlHUOV-c_N92W6M_P5--c&c=pfS1g5ikAaYp2frES7BYktQ_8BS9X7whXM795AzRzUO7aQI-K81imw==&ch=xUPw52mvbLOTDG9EdHoaiQor4AhbZaM0-8QlwlPbvJZpLSnVZWNLdw==)
---
|
---
| Peter,

Before I took an oath to protect our community and our values as a police officer and Sheriff, I took another oath to protect our country as a U.S. Army soldier.
So as a veteran myself, I know just how much we owe to those who risk life and limb to defend our rights and keep our country safe.
We are the land of the free because of the brave - I hope you'll take the time to thank a veteran in your life today.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010FWGnDAFYPetfQ9Qn4U7m0cuZIdcsuZyxW41H8D-qCZYakrnnuI-SmJEssn9MNuRHRF-mSbjuTs76ydUeU7_JXG878DIZQwWTmln7gDUFhsGOo4hYdipW66ts19S_PZeJn8IaClgT3YNlHUOV-c_N92W6M_P5--c&c=pfS1g5ikAaYp2frES7BYktQ_8BS9X7whXM795AzRzUO7aQI-K81imw==&ch=xUPw52mvbLOTDG9EdHoaiQor4AhbZaM0-8QlwlPbvJZpLSnVZWNLdw==)
---
| As the only candidate in this race who has served in the Armed Forces, my entire team and I would like to send our most sincere thanks to all who have served and the families that make that service possible.
May the heroes who risk their lives for the Stars and Stripes always get the care and recognition they deserve.
Sincerely, Sheriff Joe Lombardo
---
|
---
| Lombardo for Governor | [Visit our website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010FWGnDAFYPetfQ9Qn4U7m0cuZIdcsuZyxW41H8D-qCZYakrnnuI-SgXL5Z2d0FP_MQUBJV9Mh4PexsNFSOiwegCMzv4uMaRmjqXdIcmrM_zz1VkHw3_DUVu0uYU1nbaBdG7hTpNv8UPKgHWnbJPrbg==&c=pfS1g5ikAaYp2frES7BYktQ_8BS9X7whXM795AzRzUO7aQI-K81imw==&ch=xUPw52mvbLOTDG9EdHoaiQor4AhbZaM0-8QlwlPbvJZpLSnVZWNLdw==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010FWGnDAFYPetfQ9Qn4U7m0cuZIdcsuZyxW41H8D-qCZYakrnnuI-SjwUauE1c3n5PazJf9fU_HE3AXK4fZIysGZBxE-S4fi72GackJRUVm-mKtENCaoMpi4uoCQRvK_Bx8XxFpa1Gwhu-GSR2Kxp3YGX1B-Mk5C4&c=pfS1g5ikAaYp2frES7BYktQ_8BS9X7whXM795AzRzUO7aQI-K81imw==&ch=xUPw52mvbLOTDG9EdHoaiQor4AhbZaM0-8QlwlPbvJZpLSnVZWNLdw==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010FWGnDAFYPetfQ9Qn4U7m0cuZIdcsuZyxW41H8D-qCZYakrnnuI-SjwUauE1c3n56E_Wy1CrKWbFfR8SxMkOcOjTlq828sEKcDj7UX-b-4sE5lhsEawT7NN3S2J_d7cikbxRqCXugZh8cvzlwXJ3vHO9wBWl4Ra6&c=pfS1g5ikAaYp2frES7BYktQ_8BS9X7whXM795AzRzUO7aQI-K81imw==&ch=xUPw52mvbLOTDG9EdHoaiQor4AhbZaM0-8QlwlPbvJZpLSnVZWNLdw==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010FWGnDAFYPetfQ9Qn4U7m0cuZIdcsuZyxW41H8D-qCZYakrnnuI-SjwUauE1c3n5NLTZn2rsU1KwKGr1FxqdGMAN_QkU6K9sOLFtND7LLymLa7ydSr80ecT8Q2mzGihy45PKxBouHsLXI1urL70ebcUPc8uhC3JYyUnNWa7FMrM=&c=pfS1g5ikAaYp2frES7BYktQ_8BS9X7whXM795AzRzUO7aQI-K81imw==&ch=xUPw52mvbLOTDG9EdHoaiQor4AhbZaM0-8QlwlPbvJZpLSnVZWNLdw==)

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: Honoring our veterans today and every day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2020, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38536838/315886106/-2113420158?refcode=JP_EM_OT_FL_211111_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzgxYjVmZi0xZDQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mo5RQnvlqZlFDxcn4CZJQ9fhftcukoiYbgGqwJL5Uy8=&emci=bbf8db97-3042-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=ec81b5ff-1d43-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6108787) | Peter, today is Veterans Day, and I hope you will join me in taking a moment to honor and appreciate those who stepped up and served our country.

If you know a veteran, make sure you take the time today to thank them for their service. If you are a veteran, I’d like to take this moment to thank you for your service.

Today, I’m also reflecting upon my commitment to crafting legislation in the House of Representatives that will benefit the lives of American soldiers, veterans, and their families. As a veteran myself, I appreciate the sacrifices made by the men and women who have worn the uniform of our nation and their families.

Thank you for joining me in honoring those who sacrificed so much for our freedom.

Sincerely,

U.S. Representative Jimmy Panetta
---

clean_body: | Peter, today is Veterans Day, and I hope you will join me in taking a moment to honor and appreciate those who stepped up and served our country. If you know a veteran, make sure you take the time today to thank them for their service. If you are a veteran, I’d like to take this moment to thank you for your service. Today, I’m also reflecting upon my commitment to crafting legislation in the House of Representatives that will benefit the lives of American soldiers, veterans, and their families. As a veteran myself, I appreciate the sacrifices made by the men and women who have worn the uniform of our nation and their families. Thank you for joining me in honoring those who sacrificed so much for our freedom. Sincerely, U.S. Representative Jimmy Panetta If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2020, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States ** **

body:
Peter,
Today provides an opportunity for all of us to reflect on the essential nature of the service of our veterans. We are fortunate to have a uniquely strong bond between Americans in, and out, of uniform built through centuries of service and sacrifice in defense of the nation. Thank you for all you have done.
Your fellow veteran,
Stewart Navarre

name: Patrick J. Murphy
subject: Help us honor veterans on Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xWzjFYP9v8BBZEwljC2lEL3cRLc1qRQ1YL5n6lNJjzU=/XAevRmFHpirbPX3WR_njeYw6cKYjc7yHEWw74nSGmKc=)

Peter,

To all who have served - and all who have loved or sacrificed for someone who served - Happy Veterans Day.
15 years ago, I had just won my first election to the US House of Representatives. I was honored to become the first Iraq War veteran elected to Congress.
Since then, my mission has not wavered. [_**Veterans deserve fair representation in Congress from representatives of honor and integrity.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/xWzjFYP9v8BBZEwljC2lEL3cRLc1qRQ1YL5n6lNJjzU=/IbMpMxDIV9WfdpADR6V7aKkP8grFxfLTRag2aZrm0HE=)
And yet, on this Veterans Day, our _**[Congress has never had fewer veterans in its ranks](https://act.myngp.com/el/xWzjFYP9v8BBZEwljC2lEL3cRLc1qRQ1YL5n6lNJjzU=/IbMpMxDIV9WfdpADR6V7aKkP8grFxfLTRag2aZrm0HE=)**_. And, as those who profit from polarization try to divide us, honor and integrity seem to be scarce resources in the halls I once walked.
That's why I started [_**Taking the Hill PAC**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/xWzjFYP9v8BBZEwljC2lEL3cRLc1qRQ1YL5n6lNJjzU=/IbMpMxDIV9WfdpADR6V7aKkP8grFxfLTRag2aZrm0HE=). Our mission is to support and elect veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress. We're not just fundraising for them - we are supporting our candidates through access to mental health resources, campaign infrastructure assistance, and a community of veterans in political public service who will have their backs no matter what.
On this Veterans Day, I invite you to [_**join us by chipping in what you can today**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/xWzjFYP9v8BBZEwljC2lEL3cRLc1qRQ1YL5n6lNJjzU=/IbMpMxDIV9WfdpADR6V7aKkP8grFxfLTRag2aZrm0HE=). We are seeking out the best from our veterans community to represent the best of our country in Congress. And, as our service in uniform has taught us, [_**we know we cannot do it alone**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/xWzjFYP9v8BBZEwljC2lEL3cRLc1qRQ1YL5n6lNJjzU=/IbMpMxDIV9WfdpADR6V7aKkP8grFxfLTRag2aZrm0HE=). That's why we need you.
As we think of the veterans in our lives - including my Navy veteran pop and Air Force veteran brother - let's recommit our work to achieving fair representation for veterans of all backgrounds, everywhere.
_**Happy Veterans Day!**_
In solidarity,
Patrick

_The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy_
_32nd Under Secretary of the Army_
_Former Congressman, PA-01
[@PatrickMurphyPA](https://act.myngp.com/el/xWzjFYP9v8BBZEwljC2lEL3cRLc1qRQ1YL5n6lNJjzU=/zD5fWlAEqNNdKMx7R04Edw0euyVdiowQuGuVGdZEIzI=)_

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/xWzjFYP9v8BBZEwljC2lEL3cRLc1qRQ1YL5n6lNJjzU=/6IId6OcC2q13DK5Yk6e3BFBsf5GW3iCN7J-7oFfzNI8= "https://act.myngp.com/el/xWzjFYP9v8BBZEwljC2lEL3cRLc1qRQ1YL5n6lNJjzU=/6IId6OcC2q13DK5Yk6e3BFBsf5GW3iCN7J-7oFfzNI8=").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

name: Gary Black
subject: Our nation's heroes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | |
# **Friend — Today, we pause to celebrate and remember our nation’s veterans, who have served our country with honor and defended freedom around the world.**

---
My father, Master Sergeant John A. Black (pictured in the left photo, first from left on the back row), served in the U.S. Army. He retired from Fort McPherson in Atlanta in 1962. My father-in-law, First Lieutenant Carrol M. Beavers (pictured in the right photo on the left side) served on the frontlines in Korea.
---
---
---
We’re thankful for them, their service, and the lessons they taught me. We’re thankful for all of our veterans, including the more than 690,000 who call Georgia home. And we’re thankful for their families and their sacrifices, too. May God Bless our nation’s heroes and their families, and may God continue to bless the United States of America.
---
---
Gary Black
---

name: Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down
subject: One More Tour of Duty: U.S. Senate 2022
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE
body:
I've served before, and I'm ready to serve again.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744939:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)
---
Patriot,

My name is Mike Durant, and I'm running to be your next U.S. Senator from Alabama. I'm a former Black Hawk pilot, Prisoner of War, a successful business owner, and a Pro-Trump conservative. **Most importantly, unlike my opponents, I 'm not a Career Politician.** I'm a 22-year Army veteran and a father of six. I've served our nation before and I've got one more tour of duty left - one to serve you in the Senate. **[Are you ready to join my team?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744939:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)**
| [**JOIN MY TEAM**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744939:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)
---

**I 'd like to tell you a little bit about my story and how one event has changed my life forever:**

In October 1993, I piloted Super Six Four, a Black Hawk Helicopter in the Battle of Mogadishu, Somalia. **You might recognize my story from the movie Black Hawk Down.** Here's a photo of the crew of Super Six Four, just one month before the battle of Mogadishu.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744939:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)

On October 3rd, 1993, during Special Operations combat Operation Gothic Serpent in Mogadishu Somalia, my helicopter was hit by an RPG and crashed in the city.

My helicopter was the third one to get shot down. Me and my crew, Ray Frank, Bill Cleveland, and Tommy Field, were all badly injured and fighting for our lives as a violent mob approached.

**Here 's the crash site:**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744939:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)

Witnessing what was about to happen from above, two members of the elite Special Operations unit Delta Force - MSG Gary Gordon and SFC Randy Shughart - who were also part of this mission, volunteered to be inserted to defend us. Vastly outnumbered, they too were eventually overcome by the mob.

They were true American heroes who sacrificed everything.**_Heroes who knew, unlike Joe Biden, that you don 't leave your brothers behind._**

The heroic actions of Gordon and Shughart - who were both posthumously awarded the Medal of Honor - are the reason I am alive today.

**I was captured and held as a POW by Somali General Mohamed Farrah Aidid.**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744939:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)

**I only had one mission while in captivity: survive with honor, and I did so.** I was kept in a concrete room, beaten, and shot while held captive. But, I never lost hope that I'd be freed and see my family again. Thankfully, 11 days later, I was released unconditionally.

**Now, I 'm signing up for one more tour of duty to serve our country and state in the United States Senate.**

**I see our freedoms at risk.** Radical Leftists are threatening every core American ideal and our conservative values. Our nation is under attack, and we need people willing to fight for it again. I can't sit back any longer. I WILL work tirelessly to defend our great state and our great nation. I WILL commit to making America a freer and more prosperous place. I WILL commit to advancing President Trump's America First agenda.

**I have fought for freedom before, and I 'll do it again. Let's do this together >>>**

It's time to get serious about taking this country back. **[Chip in any amount now to join my campaign!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744939:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)**

[**$10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744940:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)
---
[**$25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744941:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)
---
[**$50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744942:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)
---
[**$100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744943:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)
---
[**$250**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744944:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)
---
[**$500**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744945:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)
---

I didn't fight for America and put my life on the line for nothing. I fought for an America that cherishes and defends its freedoms. Not one that fails to secure its borders, cowers to foreign adversaries, and lets the woke mob and cancel culture rule our lives. **[I need you on my team to take back America from the Radical Left.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744939:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)**

[**JOIN THE TEAM**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744939:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)
---

Thank you and God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58744939:J2AMaX2zN:m:1:3299561967:CD608E2FAE777F17BC0049FCFBBD938D:r)
Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down

PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE
Not authorized by any other candidate.
---

Huntsville, AL 35814

name: Salud Carbajal for Congress
subject: This Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5M0-dw4yFqYsxt7DB4WozvplkP64eGzR-PsB_dye9AI=/gwHO94NmQl3g0KTHnU92y4dXL8L4rotv9yv33tUQu-M=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
This Veterans Day, please join me in recognizing and thanking my fellow veterans for their many sacrifices, made to protect our freedoms and defend our great nation.

As a member of the House Armed Services Committee, I am honored to continue to fight for the benefits our service members and veterans deserve, including increasing access to VA healthcare and affordable housing.
Most recently, Rep. Tony Gonzalez and I introduced a bipartisan bill, the _Childcare Expansion for Military Families Act,_ to improve and increase childcare services for military families. I was also pleased to pass the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) to enhance our national security and keep Americans safe. This bill included a 2.7% pay increase for our service members and provided a basic needs allowance to qualified service members.
There is no greater sacrifice than serving one's country and our nation would not be the same without the dedication and service of these brave men and women. Thank you for taking a moment today to recognize and thank them for all they do.
Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress

name: Conor Lamb
subject: Honoring our veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38537584/315890195/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjczN2YwMy0yMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DYTeMzI179NMTZ_4lvB1CGOoAWxgfV68B7LAejSx9EY=)

Happy Veterans Day, friend --

Today, we honor the great personal sacrifice and commitment of our fellow Americans who answered the call to serve our country.

I was honored to serve as an officer in the Marine Corps, and I will never forget the men and women I served with. I've also had the opportunity to serve on the Veterans' Affairs Committee in Congress, where I've gotten to meet veterans of all ages from all over the country and continue to learn about the challenges veterans face in our society.

We make a promise to every person who steps up to join the military -- that if they serve honorably and keep their oath, our government will be there when they get out to provide the health care, support and opportunities they've earned. Veterans aren't looking for charity or a handout -- they just expect us to keep that promise. And too often, for too many veterans, we don't.

I will never stop working to change that and ensure that our government truly keeps their end of the deal. In the House, I've gotten several bipartisan bills signed into law, including legislation to improve mental health care and suicide prevention efforts within the VA, to extend GI Bill benefits for veterans in apprenticeship programs, and to eliminate student loan debt for permanently disabled veterans. I helped pass the VA Mission Act, which is helping to ensure that all veterans can access the health care services they need, even if that requires them to go outside the VA system. And I am continuing to work on legislation to ensure that veterans exposed to Agent Orange and other toxins get the automatic compensation and care that they deserve.

We have a lot more work to do -- on veterans suicide and homelessness, unemployment, supporting veterans who suffered toxic exposure, helping younger veterans get into the VA system as soon as they separate from the military -- and that work will always be a priority for me.

But today, I just want to say thank you to all of our veterans -- for your service, for your advocacy, and for your relentless commitment to our country and to your fellow veterans.

\-- Conor Lamb

clean_body: | = Happy Veterans Day, friend -- Today, we honor the great personal sacrifice and commitment of our fellow Americans who answered the call to serve our country. I was honored to serve as an officer in the Marine Corps, and I will never forget the men and women I served with. I've also had the opportunity to serve on the Veterans' Affairs Committee in Congress, where I've gotten to meet veterans of all ages from all over the country and continue to learn about the challenges veterans face in our society. We make a promise to every person who steps up to join the military -- that if they serve honorably and keep their oath, our government will be there when they get out to provide the health care, support and opportunities they've earned. Veterans aren't looking for charity or a handout -- they just expect us to keep that promise. And too often, for too many veterans, we don't. I will never stop working to change that and ensure that our government truly keeps their end of the deal. In the House, I've gotten several bipartisan bills signed into law, including legislation to improve mental health care and suicide prevention efforts within the VA, to extend GI Bill benefits for veterans in apprenticeship programs, and to eliminate student loan debt for permanently disabled veterans. I helped pass the VA Mission Act, which is helping to ensure that all veterans can access the health care services they need, even if that requires them to go outside the VA system. And I am continuing to work on legislation to ensure that veterans exposed to Agent Orange and other toxins get the automatic compensation and care that they deserve. We have a lot more work to do -- on veterans suicide and homelessness, unemployment, supporting veterans who suffered toxic exposure, helping younger veterans get into the VA system as soon as they separate from the military -- and that work will always be a priority for me. But today, I just want to say thank you to all of our veterans -- for your service, for your advocacy, and for your relentless commitment to our country and to your fellow veterans. \-- Conor Lamb = = *

body:
Hey Peter,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745099:JYe2PX2QN:m:1:3298722022:397F49D528D484137B56C86EACD76E91:r)

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38537972/315891808/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGYyYWRiMy0yMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GW2e9MvsTzPKpb0f0bjSkHQqpZu9yac_D7eILzWltDw=)
Happy Veterans Day, friend.

You may not know this, but there are more veterans per square mile in the Austin and Central Texas area than the rest of the state. Many struggle to receive benefits that were promised to them. This Veterans Day, thanking veterans means a commitment to stop denying them their earned benefits which include retraining programs, and delivering health care that addresses their physical and mental health. That's what I'm committed to doing.

**Today, I'll be livestreaming at 7 pm CT** to discuss what happens after the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework passed. I’ll also discuss what needs to happen for the Build Back Better Act to pass and why the content will decide the country's future. You can watch live **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38537974/315891810/116796648?sub_confirmation=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGYyYWRiMy0yMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GW2e9MvsTzPKpb0f0bjSkHQqpZu9yac_D7eILzWltDw=&emci=a909fff2-1243-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=bdf2adb3-2243-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=7168977)**

clean_body: | = Happy Veterans Day, friend. You may not know this, but there are more veterans per square mile in the Austin and Central Texas area than the rest of the state. Many struggle to receive benefits that were promised to them. This Veterans Day, thanking veterans means a commitment to stop denying them their earned benefits which include retraining programs, and delivering health care that addresses their physical and mental health. That's what I'm committed to doing. Today, I'll be livestreaming at 7 pm CT to discuss what happens after the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework passed. I’ll also discuss what needs to happen for the Build Back Better Act to pass and why the content will decide the country's future. You can watch live Please email me any questions that you would like me to answer on my show. Or if there is a specific topic you'd like me to cover, reply to this email. Yours, Donna | = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. name: Greg Lopez
subject: Honoring Our Veterans
body:
From a Fellow Veteran
| | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
# We Honor You Today
---
| God bless our veterans and God bless our troops. The sacrifices our bravest men and women have made are honored and remembered today. We are grateful for the sacrifices of our veterans which have provided us the freedom and peace we enjoy and too often take for granted.
As a disabled veteran, Greg understands the sacrifice veterans make to protect our Constitution. He will see that their sacrifice is honored and never forgotten.
Thank you does not begin to express the gratitude we owe to our veterans and their families.
Happy Veterans Day!
Take a moment to remember our rights and our peace would not exist without them.
---

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Coyote-in-Chief
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

It's true. The U.S. government really did charter
secret flights to relocate illegal immigrants into our country in
the middle of the night.

Just as the chaos in southern Texas IS Joe Biden's
border policy, smuggling illegals into the country IS his
immigration policy.
At this point, Biden is nothing more than
Coyote-in-Chief.

His Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas
finally admitted what everyone knew: the illegal immigrants Biden
is letting into the country are bringing Covid-19 with them.

And his Vice President, Kamala Harris, who is
supposedly IN CHARGE of getting the border under control, is too
busy auditioning child actors for her TV ads to bother.

Nor have Democrats in Congress lifted a finger to
secure the border. They think the border is racist. They think
immigration enforcement is racist. They think America is racist!

Take a stand and help stop the Coyote-in-Chief!

Democrats are still in charge of our government for
at least another year and a half. And they won't give up their
anti-American bigotry unless we give them the political defeat of
a lifetime next year.

But we all know, it's not enough to turn blue Senate
seats red. We need true conservative fighters like:

✅ Mo Brooks in Alabama✅ Josh Mandel in Ohio✅
Mike Lee in Utah✅ Ron Johnson in Wisconsin✅ Ted Budd in North
Carolina✅ Rand Paul in Kentucky, and✅ Adam Laxalt in Nevada.

We need them ALL in the Senate!

They are not just Republicans and conservatives.
They are patriots, ready to fight and sacrifice to rescue America
from the woke, socialist fanatics leading us into inflation,
crime, censorship, election corruption, defeat, and racist
indoctrination.

Senate Conservatives Fund has already done so much
to impact these Senate races and, with your help, we're going to
win back the Senate not for a party, but for our nation.

Please join us by making a split contribution to our
endorsed Senate candidates today!

Together, we can build an earthquake election that
fills the Senate with true conservatives who will fight for our
future.

Thank you for considering this important request.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Happy Veteran’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
Today we pause to celebrate the hard work and service of our nation’s service members. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2uxzgeXNJ1tOjTBLZo-mutk-gIlw2evlXllOjbcFC4aBC2Zf-BIDGfipvCOELsZSGHct5t7CT1gRBgQnrDGpwqDGHWvv4RLp2gPFRJ3knOTxIFh55Lkqy9t8yBa548dOBdsnh4opHtNbXvtQx1dzJhl5ghr5I8UehAMi78xiHboilx_ivxjVgjbd0M9LhoGNlW6rwPAPEPNtPDk8Lg9uKR6ijqT9ZzLb9xUSMzjVQdGxlPQq1-kb4qqrg7MVhP3ANIPip7jDRluw9otAVj0r0Z-B8dG1_lv75oDMivWM5nO7FuA82XLk7Zyt43NCuChndn58L6RrOkRAns-ZYrx9mabcA/3gx/JeS3DrQIR1GI0584oPQyJw/h0/9Ch-1G70k7TFoAzLOsefymme1_L0A9_sbcOR931NPB0)

| | Happy Veteran’s Day, team!

Today we honor the brave men and women who sacrifice so much to protect our nation and ensure our safety.

**The history and spirit of our nation are rooted in the service and experiences of our veterans.**

Their courage and commitment to our freedom and wellbeing are beyond admirable, and I am so grateful for their hard work and dedication to duty, honor, and service.

Charged with protecting our nation, veterans deserve our utmost consideration and respect, and I will continue using my voice to uplift their concerns and ensure their continued safety and success.

I am humbled by the opportunity to serve each and every one of you. May today be full of joy, celebration, and praise in your honor.
With gratitude,

\-- Marcy Kaptur

name: Eddie Gallagher, Navy SEAL Chief (Ret.)
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs. We must act.
body:
I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. After nearly 20 years of decorated se
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvuae9bkf4l3slv1623bh96v1kg9et6ahkq49id8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdim1oj2c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongccq67d1lm5h60p3mcpqn8cr2e9i76cj5e1qn8ctgmloectb0saobcohnm6pr1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dj664qbbd37map6cd70m9h3csh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zebaihqb4tgb2lvq6taef5p6uhamv1p4tsd6hb1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdim1oj2c9h2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. **

After nearly 20 years of decorated service as a Navy SEAL, I was arrested and charged with the murder of an ISIS terrorist in Iraq. I was facing not only life in prison, but an endless campaign of slander and misinformation from our corrupt media.

Thankfully my family fought back publicly and fearlessly, caught the attention of President Trump, and I was freed from the brig and allowed to properly prepare for trial. I was found not guilty and allowed to keep my trident – but our life was a living hell for a long time.

**Now, Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs and I refuse to sit back.** As I've watched his trial, it's become crystal clear that Kyle acted in self-defense.

**[I'm emailing you now because through FreeKyleUSA, Kyle's mother Wendy has been furiously working to raise money for his legal defense, and they urgently need our help. Will you make a donation right now?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4daun3r7aificktj9r40a974jhvb7iiasu749n0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdim1oj2c9h2bs)**
|
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbf8cjqujirckbohus01ra4ot277kb8g4re8h5dg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdim1oj2c9h2bs)
|
---
More and more nowadays, if you're considered a political enemy of the powers-that-be, the rule book gets thrown out and anything goes.

The media, politicians, tech companies and other powerful interests band together to try and crush you financially and personally. The "narrative" takes precedence over the truth, and people's lives can be forever ruined.

**That is not the America that I dedicated my life to defend.**

It shouldn't have to be this way, but I know from my own experience that if enough people stand up and push back, justice can still prevail. And right now, justice means a "not guilty" verdict and Kyle Rittenhouse getting his life back.

**It can happen, but his legal defense is incredibly costly and he needs the support of millions of patriotic Americans across this country.**

**[I'm calling on you to help because believe it or not, your donation will make a difference. So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now, and let's pray that Kyle gets the justice he deserves.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjhtrbgpfqvpmaacudhassjangouj9j345csn6ag_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdim1oj2c9h2bs)**

The truth, and our God-given right of self-defense still mean something in this country, and we have the power, today, to stand up for both.

Thank you for your time.

Steadfast,
Eddie Gallagher
Navy SEAL Special Operations Chief (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z31ng8506hsio74jenon6vdv1cge7uof293rv8io_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdim1oj2c9h2bs)

name: Max Steiner
subject: What Veterans Day means to me.
body:
This is the first Veterans Day since I began my service that the country is not at war. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38538408/315893883/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTljZDI1YS0yNTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xa3OfRtul7w4ahkubDjciwsZN-3Ymx4pfgrQH_J8vXQ=)
Friend,

I've served in the US Army in some capacity for the past 15 years. I'm currently a reservist, and this is the first Veterans Day since I began my service that the country is not at war.

_Training at the LA VA Hospital._
I know I speak for many veterans when I say peace is the ultimate victory. However, even though we may presently be in a time of peace, many veterans are still struggling as the burden of everlasting war falls on the small minority of the population served.

From PTSD to other mental and physical wounds, to a lack of good job opportunities, health care, and housing -- it's long past due for this country to protect and support our veterans when they arrive back on US soil.

As a veteran running for Congress, with more than a decade of experience in the military and multiple combat deployments to the Middle East, I'm more than ready to fight for our service members and veterans when in office. I took an oath to this country and our Constitution to protect my fellow service members while in uniform, and I'd be honored to take that same oath when in office.

**I will not stop working for veterans and their families and am confident that together, we can fight for better jobs, health care, and housing.**

And as we attend parades and community events on this day, let's all remember those who have come before us.

Thanks,

Max
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38538409/315893884/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTljZDI1YS0yNTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xa3OfRtul7w4ahkubDjciwsZN-3Ymx4pfgrQH_J8vXQ=)
Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by [making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38538410/315893885/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTljZDI1YS0yNTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xa3OfRtul7w4ahkubDjciwsZN-3Ymx4pfgrQH_J8vXQ=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/72aab253-2543-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/299cd25a-2543-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTljZDI1YS0yNTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xa3OfRtul7w4ahkubDjciwsZN-3Ymx4pfgrQH_J8vXQ=&id=113269053).

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Taking care of our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Today we take time to honor the bravery and selflessness of the service members who risked their lives to defend our nation. Washington State is home to more than 500,000 veterans with nearly 50,000 residing in the 8th District. These are our friends, family, and neighbors who made personal sacrifices to keep us safe and protect our democracy, and we are forever indebted to them. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38538476/315894309/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTFjMTFkNi0yNTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V37njVgmrKWUrqjh1j8BhCmYl7CRVtIaVnMgkWToFKI=&emci=86bc98c4-0043-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d91c11d6-2543-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15820338)
---
Happy Veterans Day, Peter.

Today we take time to honor the bravery and selflessness of the service members who risked their lives to defend our nation.

Washington State is home to more than 500,000 veterans with nearly 50,000 residing in the 8th District. These are our friends, family, and neighbors who made personal sacrifices to keep us safe and protect our democracy, and we are forever indebted to them.

The challenges that our veterans face don't end when their service does -- many of them live with wounds that we cannot see. It's crucial that we not only support them while they're in the armed forces, but we continue to support them when they return home.

This Veterans Day, we must recommit ourselves to taking care of the people who put everything on the line to serve our country. From medical and mental health treatment to housing and education, I'm working to ensure our nation's veterans and their families have access to the resources and care they deserve.

To all the veterans here in the 8th and across the country: thank you for your service. I will continue to work on your behalf every day in Congress.

Thank you,

Kim

| Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
---

name: Alex Stovall
subject: Black conservatives are under attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743987:JuD5fX23N:m:1:3253819041:1372E9210E9E32D38482C8B590403AF1:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Alex Stovall and **I 'm a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress** in Arizona's 9th Congressional District. **I 'm the left's worst nightmare and let me explain why...**

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I 've experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we've been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I 'm SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743987:JuD5fX23N:m:1:3253819041:1372E9210E9E32D38482C8B590403AF1:r) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I 'm in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative
To The House of Representatives » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743987:JuD5fX23N:m:1:3253819041:1372E9210E9E32D38482C8B590403AF1:r)
The Left isn't shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **" You ain't black"** if you don't vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it's the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn't imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I'm a doer. I'm a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor's degree in Theology and master's in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it's why I'm asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn't popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - **I need to raise $250,000 in the next month.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743987:JuD5fX23N:m:1:3253819041:1372E9210E9E32D38482C8B590403AF1:r)

[** Help Alex Hit His $250,000 Goal » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743987:JuD5fX23N:m:1:3253819041:1372E9210E9E32D38482C8B590403AF1:r)
The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it's time the truth came out. The left's socialist government programs are crippling our communities and [**I need your help.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743987:JuD5fX23N:m:1:3253819041:1372E9210E9E32D38482C8B590403AF1:r)

Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left's oppression of our communities.

I can WIN this race, but **I must raise $250,000 in the next month.**

The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - [**can I count on you to support my efforts?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743987:JuD5fX23N:m:1:3253819041:1372E9210E9E32D38482C8B590403AF1:r)

For Freedom,
Alex Stovall

[** DONATE » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743987:JuD5fX23N:m:1:3253819041:1372E9210E9E32D38482C8B590403AF1:r)

Get the latest by following me on social media.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743988:JuD5fX23N:m:1:3253819041:1372E9210E9E32D38482C8B590403AF1:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743989:JuD5fX23N:m:1:3253819041:1372E9210E9E32D38482C8B590403AF1:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743990:JuD5fX23N:m:1:3253819041:1372E9210E9E32D38482C8B590403AF1:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743991:JuD5fX23N:m:1:3253819041:1372E9210E9E32D38482C8B590403AF1:r)

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Today is Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

Today is Veterans day, a time to honor the millions of Americans who have served our country with dignity and pride.

Please take a moment with me to appreciate the tremendous sacrifices our veterans have made to ensure our safety and freedom. I hope you and your families join us on this important occasion in advocating for veterans all across the country.

It is my utmost priority to ensure veterans have proper access to social services and programs. My colleagues and I in Congress will continue to fight to expand programs veterans rely on most, including access to health care, financial resources, access to housing, and more.

It is also imperative to reflect on the invisible war millions of veterans endure with their mental health due to trauma and isolation during their service. I will continue to work for increased resources for mental health programs to serve this courageous community.

I hope you’ll take time out on this Veterans Day to honor veterans across the nation and thank them for what they’ve done to ensure our country’s security and freedom.

Thank you,

Mike Thompson

clean_body: [#] Peter, Today is Veterans day, a time to honor the millions of Americans who have served our country with dignity and pride. Please take a moment with me to appreciate the tremendous sacrifices our veterans have made to ensure our safety and freedom. I hope you and your families join us on this important occasion in advocating for veterans all across the country. It is my utmost priority to ensure veterans have proper access to social services and programs. My colleagues and I in Congress will continue to fight to expand programs veterans rely on most, including access to health care, financial resources, access to housing, and more. It is also imperative to reflect on the invisible war millions of veterans endure with their mental health due to trauma and isolation during their service. I will continue to work for increased resources for mental health programs to serve this courageous community. I hope you’ll take time out on this Veterans Day to honor veterans across the nation and thank them for what they’ve done to ensure our country’s security and freedom. Thank you, Mike Thompson Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa, CA 94581 United States

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: To my fellow veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Thank you for your service and sacrifice

Derek, today we honor the millions who served in our armed services.

During my service on the ground in the Iraq War and my deployments at sea, through the many tours and sacrifices of so many of my friends and classmates, I know deeply what we ask of those who wear the uniform and the families behind them. t My generation of veterans (like so many before us) have borne an unconscionable burden through two decades of endless wars.

I promise each and every one of you this: if I am serving in the Congress, I will never vote to send young Americans (your children, as well as my own) to war unless absolutely critical to our national security, and I will never be afraid to ask the tough questions and to demand answers from those beating the drumbeat of war.

And to my fellow veterans, I will never break faith with you, to whom our government has a sacred obligation to care for through a fully funded and staffed VA. You deserve nothing less, and if I’m your representative in Washington, I’ll fight like hell for us.

Happy Veterans Day,

Chris Deluzio

Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
Chris Deluzio for Congress
PO Box 16210
Pittsburgh, PA 15242
United States

subject: On Veteran’s Day, let’s seek peace through strength
body:
Our leaders have been flippant and unwise

# Only those who have served in war understand its terrible costs
---
I was a senior at West Point when the attacks of 9-11 occurred. Fighting in the global War on Terror, from 2003-2004, I led a Tank Platoon in Iraq, then from 2009-2010, I commanded a Stryker Reconnaissance Troop in Spin Boldak, Afghanistan. There I was responsible for the second largest border crossing point between Afghanistan and Pakistan. On this Veteran's Day, I want to acknowledge the less than 1% of our society who has been willing to risk it all in defense of Freedom. Though in certain instances we service members have been unwisely and flippantly used by our political leaders, we took the oath with a deep desire to serve our country and to go wherever we were called. Shame on those in positions of political power who dishonored us by sending us off to misbegotten causes that had nothing to do with protecting American sovereignty. Nevertheless, our hearts were pure and remain so.
I give veterans my sincerest thanks and deepest gratitude for their willingness to risk it all on behalf of this great country. From a fellow veteran, welcome home and thank you for your service.
Now I call on the citizens of Colorado and Americans everywhere to elect leaders who understand the terrible burden of war. Only those who have served in war understand its terrible costs. We need more combat veterans elected to office to prevent the abuse of power that sends soldiers, marines, seamen, and airmen off to die for the wrong reasons. We need wise leaders who have experienced the psychological, physical, and emotional trauma of war so that they may understand the need for judicious use of force, and have a strong reticence to putting men and women in harm's way. We must elect leaders who will only resort to violence as a last resort, when the cause is Just.
Please watch below:
