| Like President Reagan, President Trump demonstrated that strength and the judicious, precise use of force leads to sustained peace. The American military should not be the World Police Force, though a global presence is necessary at times to dissuade bad actors. War should always be a last resort. Peace through strength should always be our guiding foreign policy principle. Now I am once again honoring the oath I took to support and defend the U.S. Constitution by running for the United States Senate in Colorado. Join me in creating a world of peace grounded in strength

Fighting in the global War on Terror, from 2003-2004, I led a Tank Platoon in Iraq, then from 2009-2010, I commanded a Stryker Reconnaissance Troop in Spin Boldak, Afghanistan. There I was responsible for the second largest border crossing point between Afghanistan and Pakistan. On this Veteran's Day, I want to acknowledge the less than 1% of our society who has been willing to risk it all in defense of Freedom. Though in certain instances we service members have been unwisely and flippantly used by our political leaders, we took the oath with a deep desire to serve our country and to go wherever we were called. Shame on those in positions of political power who dishonored us by sending us off to misbegotten causes that had nothing to do with protecting American sovereignty. Nevertheless, our hearts were pure and remain so. I give veterans my sincerest thanks and deepest gratitude for their willingness to risk it all on behalf of this great country. From a fellow veteran, welcome home and thank you for your service. Now I call on the citizens of Colorado and Americans everywhere to elect leaders who understand the terrible burden of war. Only those who have served in war understand its terrible costs. We need more combat veterans elected to office to prevent the abuse of power that sends soldiers, marines, seamen, and airmen off to die for the wrong reasons. We need wise leaders who have experienced the psychological, physical, and emotional trauma of war so that they may understand the need for judicious use of force, and have a strong reticence to putting men and women in harm's way. We must elect leaders who will only resort to violence as a last resort, when the cause is Just. Please watch below: | | | | | == | | | | == | Like President Reagan, President Trump demonstrated that strength and the judicious, precise use of force leads to sustained peace. The American military should not be the World Police Force, though a global presence is necessary at times to dissuade bad actors. War should always be a last resort. Peace through strength should always be our guiding foreign policy principle. Now I am once again honoring the oath I took to support and defend the U.S. Constitution by running for the United States Senate in Colorado. Join me in creating a world of peace grounded in strength | | == | Together we can stand against the corruption and needless chaos contrived by a heartless Biden administration. I need your support today | | | == PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (303) 903 1985 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Senate | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

name: Kina Collins
subject: Thank you to our Veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
They deserve more. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s3SPn1Op6-248AXB5B69Ady-Gauep-_Enf75NQ9xKQ4U6ItvPXFTuLpLge0VDiJ3J3Pqdhjt3J1R4DM-eOau9HOh6IWAGiSYjSH4IcD8eAAVURBlJjsffyGPW0WUxAMu5lQGUosg_Gd473FYvu3p3HmSKL8z3qK2005kSdAdP9dTLfvzWXj0dz13HN4zf5EZPUEpgWzMvpWjSqn5jUaV2es/3gx/1-ljLTvPSmOzL8U0qglTOw/h0/-gpBXH1uGZP8cDZ_pcMD2WFJf_HBqYznRNouYC7QeoM)
Team, Today is Veterans Day and I want to take a moment to thank all those who have served us--including members of my own family. That’s usually where the messages, tweets, or Facebook posts stop from our politicians. But on this Veterans Day, I want us to think about everything we aren’t doing for our vets. On any given night, about 40,000 veterans are unhoused. Black vets make up about one-third of those veterans, even though they’re only 12% of the total veteran population. Veterans make up about 6% of the US population, but 8% of the country’s unhoused population. Why are veterans disproportionately likely to experience homelessness? Because they lack access to affordable housing, steady incomes, access to healthcare, among many other things. Our vets dealing with PTSD or substance abuse often have little to no resources available and end up unhoused, without a job, and without healthcare. That is unacceptable. Every year, we spend over $700 billion on our defense budget to line the pockets of corporate defense contractors who profit off the endless wars, all while we’re failing our veterans at home. I believe that healthcare and housing are human rights and everyone deserves to have them--including our veterans. So when I go to Congress, I won’t be fighting for bottomless Pentagon budgets, I’ll be fighting for the veterans our Pentagon shipped off overseas and never thought about again. For their healthcare, their housing, their jobs, their education, and their survival, because it’s the least we can do. Our veterans deserve better. Thank you, Kina Collins | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: They deserve more. | | | Team, Today is Veterans Day and I want to take a moment to thank all those who have served us--including members of my own family. That’s usually where the messages, tweets, or Facebook posts stop from our politicians. But on this Veterans Day, I want us to think about everything we aren’t doing for our vets. On any given night, about 40,000 veterans are unhoused. Black vets make up about one-third of those veterans, even though they’re only 12% of the total veteran population. Veterans make up about 6% of the US population, but 8% of the country’s unhoused population. Why are veterans disproportionately likely to experience homelessness? Because they lack access to affordable housing, steady incomes, access to healthcare, among many other things. Our vets dealing with PTSD or substance abuse often have little to no resources available and end up unhoused, without a job, and without healthcare. That is unacceptable. Every year, we spend over $700 billion on our defense budget to line the pockets of corporate defense contractors who profit off the endless wars, all while we’re failing our veterans at home. I believe that healthcare and housing are human rights and everyone deserves to have them--including our veterans. So when I go to Congress, I won’t be fighting for bottomless Pentagon budgets, I’ll be fighting for the veterans our Pentagon shipped off overseas and never thought about again. For their healthcare, their housing, their jobs, their education, and their survival, because it’s the least we can do. Our veterans deserve better. Thank you, Kina Collins | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: | | Sent via . name: From the Desk of Marco Rubio
subject: Your response was AWESOME!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Patriot, I've been looking over the answers to the Biden Approval Poll my team sent out yesterday and I've gotta say: I LOVED what you had to say.
|
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745366:6zNZzX2CN:m:1:3299561967:1D1FF7AE8DB4A1E2AE59887A30AD068F:r "Header")
---
Patriot, I've been looking over the answers to the Biden Approval Poll my team sent out yesterday and I've gotta say: I LOVED what you had to say.

If I could have thousands of patriots like you, Patriot, that recognize how bad the Biden Administration is, I would. Your commitment to wanting to restore conservative values and principles in this country is second to none and I want to thank you for that. Biden is ruining this country and I'm happy you agree.

But, I need the resources to be able to find thousands of people just like you. I need your help with my outreach program.

---
| | | [HELP MARCO REACH MORE PATRIOTS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745366:6zNZzX2CN:m:1:3299561967:1D1FF7AE8DB4A1E2AE59887A30AD068F:r "HELP MARCO REACH MORE PATRIOTS")

name: Tom Fitton
subject: It’s Vitally Important that I Hear from You!
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch is carrying a massive legal caseload into 2022, and **_[your help is essential](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57102&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMTExNTI4NDQ=)_** to maintaining our readiness to respond _quickly and decisively_ to meet the challenges posed by corrupt politicians and secretive government bureaucrats.
Do you support Judicial Watch:

* Vigorously pressing forward with all our investigations and lawsuits to combat unlawful secrecy, corruption and threats to the constitutional rule of law from government bureaucrats who think they are above the law?
* Holding corrupt politicians in both parties accountable to the law?
* Continuing to fight for honest elections?
* Challenging and exposing unlawful sanctuary policies and Biden's border lawlessness?

I ask you **_[to give Judicial Watch your personal support,](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57102&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMTExNTI4NDQ=)_** and your approval for us to continue our investigations and lawsuits into 2022 and launch new investigations and lawsuits to fight government corruption.
I also ask you to back up your approval with **_[a special tax-deductible donation to Judicial Watch.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57102&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMTExNTI4NDQ=)_**
Right now, Judicial Watch is working on multiple, very important fronts...

* _Our election integrity team is working through federal government and public voter registration data to identify states and counties with registered voters whose numbers exceed their counts of eligible voters_. Dirty voting rolls can mean dirty elections.

We anticipate filing more lawsuits against state and county officials who fail to take legally required actions to take reasonable steps to clean their voter rolls!

* _We are moving forward with our lawsuit in Santa Clara County (San Jose), California, challenging the county 's deadly sanctuary policy_.

Our multi-year litigation up the road in San Francisco, _which included forcing the release through discovery of stunning documents detailing the massive number of criminal illegal aliens_ _released on to the streets by the San Francisco Sheriff 's Department_, led directly to positive policy practices there.

* _We are in federal court right now with a new lawsuit against the Biden administration to force the release of government documents related to the incompetent and deadly surrender in Afghanistan_.

The American people have a right to learn what led to one of the biggest foreign policy disasters in recent U.S. history... _and we won 't let Deep State government bureaucrats keep the truth from us_!
**So, you can see how**** _[joining Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57102&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMTExNTI4NDQ=)_**** _now_ will help us continue using the courts to reaffirm our motto _and_ motivation, "Because no one is above the law!"**
We're currently pursuing _thousands_ of open Freedom of Information Act requests and a record number of lawsuits against several branches of the federal government, which is why your **_[approval and special contribution](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57102&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMTExNTI4NDQ=)_** are so important. 2022 will be just as challenging as 2021.
**_[Your support and commitment will mean so much to us](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57102&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMTExNTI4NDQ=)_** , _and I pledge to honor your trust in us every day_.
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57102&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMTExNTI4NDQ=)
---
|
---
|

Washington, DC 20024

name: Ken Russell
subject: Respecting our veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA
body:
Peter,
Today is a very important day for me. Today we honor those who made the greatest sacrifice. People like my dad who served his country in World War II. Thank you, dad!
http://kenrussellforflorida.com/ [http://kenrussellforflorida.com/]
Florida is the home to 1.5 million veterans, and we are honored that they all call the Sunshine State their home. This Veterans Day, I would like to take a moment to talk about the reality of veterans in our country.
When citizens voluntarily join the military, they make the brave choice to do work that is both dangerous and thankless. They put their bodies and their minds on the line in the name of freedom. Their service is fundamental to the security of our nation, but too often these individuals come home to circumstances that are less than ideal. Too many veterans experience homelessness, PTSD, and drug addiction. A lack of proper investment in the VA health system leaves these brave women and men without the resources they need.
I am running for the United States Senate because I know we can do better than that. We must support our troops both while they are abroad and when they return. It is vital that we care for those who have done so much to care for us. When I get to the Senate, ensuring the safety and security of veterans will be a top priority.
Today is a day when we reflect on the sacrifices that have been made in the name of the pursuit and survival of freedom and democracy. It is also a time to contemplate how we take care of those who have risked everything for us. I will be attending the American Legion’s Veterans this year in Miami Beach. I hope to see you there!
Happy Veterans Day,
Ken Russell
Candidate for U.S. Senate
PAID FOR BY KEN RUSSELL FOR FLORIDA
Ken Russell for Senate
328 Crandon Blvd.
Suite 119
#157
Key Biscayne, FL 33149
United States

name: =?utf-8?b?Um96YSBDYWxkZXLDs24sIEZ1dHVyZSBHZW5lcmF0aW9ucw==?=
subject: What you don’t know about Native veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Future Generations PAC
body:
| | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIxeDWqAtfj4Fn87VuYfG4Xt4DQgNWFgDCOefFWaI9Dp_O6IxexNATE7cITP5W1rXb8BlbLHOFxWdi6Nh2hNxFp1kZwC200z8OdsT3_3o5NCSpjh8oIUZrZZTC1SJnkf3hYA2Sv9uY4F_vrBIMafL2ZLYMcWE5pZJj3sk3rxaK5R9yCSBnwET_BsnN0fRxJn5645WcRgDifh4_XtzN3_kwl4y-MgYG7whpeLqRnVQ2Ru2rw5zpVt_Sp9Lc0uJRYuRryJ8InRlEfpcNeQYm0bUsI/3gx/pTacVmaBQdWJckMcX6LNZg/h0/ySPl8wkk7UPjEx6uJOVAmfQOMEWUiemAlvfiQ73-AFs)
---
Peter -- Veterans Day is an important day of reflection, and an opportunity to express our heartfelt gratitude for all who have served our country in every branch of the armed services, both past and present. November is also American Indian Heritage Month, and in light of this, I would like to take a moment to highlight a little-seen, but powerful group of service members: **Indigenous people.** According to the National Indian Council on Aging (NICOA), American Indians and Alaska Natives have the highest record of military service -- serving at five times the national average. Indigenous people have served in the U.S. military with distinction in every major conflict for over 200 years. You may have heard about the native warriors who served as code-talkers in World War II -- transmitting coded military messages in native languages the Axis powers were never able to break. But did you know that 44,000 of a total American Indian population of 350,000 served in that war? **Today, Native service members are predominantly women, and predominantly younger.** Leaving the military, Native veterans have fewer opportunities than their white counterparts. Despite their distinguished service, they contend with higher rates of poverty, struggling with housing insecurity and lack of healthcare. All veterans continue to be drastically underserved by our government. We are told it is necessary to send our service members overseas to "fight for our freedom," yet so many come home and they are not free themselves. Freedom means safe and stable housing. Freedom means a living wage. Freedom means healthcare for absolutely everyone. Freedom means a livable planet. Freedom means racial justice and dismantling systems of oppression that deny opportunities to all Black, Indigenous, and people of color. Without those things, we can never truly be free, and those who have sacrificed so much for our freedom will have done so in vain. Let us honor our veterans by keeping our promises, and join together in the fight for justice for all. In solidarity, Roza

clean_body: | | Peter -- Veterans Day is an important day of reflection, and an opportunity to express our heartfelt gratitude for all who have served our country in every branch of the armed services, both past and present. November is also American Indian Heritage Month, and in light of this, I would like to take a moment to highlight a little-seen, but powerful group of service members: Indigenous people. According to the National Indian Council on Aging (NICOA), American Indians and Alaska Natives have the highest record of military service -- serving at five times the national average. Indigenous people have served in the U.S. military with distinction in every major conflict for over 200 years. You may have heard about the native warriors who served as code-talkers in World War II -- transmitting coded military messages in native languages the Axis powers were never able to break. But did you know that 44,000 of a total American Indian population of 350,000 served in that war? Today, Native service members are predominantly women, and predominantly younger. Leaving the military, Native veterans have fewer opportunities than their white counterparts. Despite their distinguished service, they contend with higher rates of poverty, struggling with housing insecurity and lack of healthcare. All veterans continue to be drastically underserved by our government. We are told it is necessary to send our service members overseas to "fight for our freedom," yet so many come home and they are not free themselves. Freedom means safe and stable housing. Freedom means a living wage. Freedom means healthcare for absolutely everyone. Freedom means a livable planet. Freedom means racial justice and dismantling systems of oppression that deny opportunities to all Black, Indigenous, and people of color. Without those things, we can never truly be free, and those who have sacrificed so much for our freedom will have done so in vain. Let us honor our veterans by keeping our promises, and join together in the fight for justice for all. In solidarity, Roza | | Future Generations is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, fighting for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats. We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. Join our people-powered movement in the fight for the future. | | Connect with us by clicking on the links below: | | | Future Generations PAC P.O. America just hit a HUGE milestone in the fight to end this pandemic, team.

According to newly-released figures, more than 80% of Americans have gotten at least one shot of their COVID-19 vaccine, **_and more than 70% are fully-vaccinated!_**

This NEVER would have been possible without the Biden administration's historic efforts to clean up Donald Trump's disastrous vaccine rollout. But that hasn’t stopped Republican senators from **spreading blatant lies** about President Biden, Dr. Fauci, and even these life-saving vaccines themselves.

**We need to stand up to the far right and stand WITH President Biden -- but we’re missing your response and our deadline is MIDNIGHT. Please, answer now:**

subject: shocked and disappointed

body:
Hey Peter,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743946:6HT1BX2Nm:m:1:3253819041:84A9FB7B4150A5CF0B589A721CE81372:r)
Please choose one of the following options:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743946:6HT1BX2Nm:m:1:3253819041:84A9FB7B4150A5CF0B589A721CE81372:r) | **[YES: I STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743946:6HT1BX2Nm:m:1:3253819041:84A9FB7B4150A5CF0B589A721CE81372:r)** **[NO: I STAND WITH THE DEMOCRATS >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743946:6HT1BX2Nm:m:1:3253819041:84A9FB7B4150A5CF0B589A721CE81372:r)**
---|---
I know you're busy so I'll wrap this up, but I really hope you'll respond.
I'll be going over our final results in about 10 minutes. [**Can I be on the lookout for your answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58743946:6HT1BX2Nm:m:1:3253819041:84A9FB7B4150A5CF0B589A721CE81372:r)
Thanks in advance for your quick response.
\-- Olivia

body:
[](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=81c2647ce89e48f3939bfba9d320f15d&_e=21a7zhZRluBuwcPYMT1Zbloj2ZJ_BXEl6NmfJ3_hpbtMlDC0HfvZfMb1jmL5xVpFNGFRfpJRl_goLauf0_g_RCZs38nTTTF0HDn9tOidoaMzdRrC3VbqbFw_br0Guq_xKEtQcRwBZiB7A6CK_HC8V4jPU5a8IpnPeULc1oKhEHQZoEoJBLfBh0eFBxZXD5n5i4ixSgxjpi_gB-xAAVCXrv1e3z9gHP7Gjv-KbJuHcoxNWwOuVm9ZTmIDXKZujF6i5rpvxmHGqah4ZBGf_YAwDjjQGxr7QM3h58O8glcnEMk%3D) Friend, Veterans Day is a very meaningful one for me and for my family. As an Iraq War veteran, having served four tours in the Middle East, having been deployed in support of Operation Enduring Freedom and three times in support of Operation Iraqi Freedom, **my family and I know the sacrifices that every single veteran makes for their country.** Today, it's worth taking a moment to honor our loved ones, friends, neighbors, and generations of Americans who served in our armed forces, keeping us safe. These men and women are the patriots who proudly served our country in its hours of greatest need, and who continue to serve our communities in different ways. Today, I hope you join us in heartfelt appreciation for the men and women who made it possible for us to celebration Veterans Day in a free, open, and prosperous country. Thank you, **Roger Roth** Paid for by Roth for Wisconsin [Please click here to unsubscribe](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_s=81c2647ce89e48f3939bfba9d320f15d&_t=J3hqvXemYZy2sKOcQF5Rv_K2WOVgPwzGjFDSNilHIvF81sslXXR4lS_oF45LssLK-61m2zBV4D197Spb3XFfat8igKa_RZ30mK5a0S708uYs4TP50HrcTzReHYFjfj2DEr8CqbTkvMoUECgUk2MoRPKZP6uAYS3vi-Tz13UPuG0%3D) [**Learn More**](http://links.rothforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=02b27e2d3ee04bddb740d46a229389f1&_m=81c2647ce89e48f3939bfba9d320f15d&_e=21a7zhZRluBuwcPYMT1Zbqjg6jh0IiqQQO3-ifrhtgX1nV21nxSeznyw0wjU315OOdvKAD0fK1ZH7zHw0w4H1bCwNubriavsTl_PUCrd7pcK5SEP0vEaRkXz6KxoHJeoXLx3RzZaQA_dkTH9UOUz6P8esoMgpUxkJwm-f7AnV9bxHkzcJVUGwy-WUfDwqSwjsSolZSM31aOEtEuffc5Da0JIHLKwlh7WLBXPTR9yR39HiIFATjymB_nSvDNChrqOLrRZlUqG3NYj80LNbvhvTg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Friend, Veterans Day is a very meaningful one for me and for my family. As an Iraq War veteran, having served four tours in the Middle East, having been deployed in support of Operation Enduring Freedom and three times in support of Operation Iraqi Freedom, my family and I know the sacrifices that every single veteran makes for their country. Today, it's worth taking a moment to honor our loved ones, friends, neighbors, and generations of Americans who served in our armed forces, keeping us safe. These men and women are the patriots who proudly served our country in its hours of greatest need, and who continue to serve our communities in different ways. Today, I hope you join us in heartfelt appreciation for the men and women who made it possible for us to celebration Veterans Day in a free, open, and prosperous country. _Kelly Tshibaka and her father Bill Hartline remember Veterans Day_ _ _ Alaska Republican U.S. Senate candidate Kelly Tshibaka today issued the following statement regarding Veterans Day: “The United States of America is the greatest country the world has ever known, and we would not have the freedoms we enjoy if not for the men and women who served this nation in uniform. I come from a family of veterans – both of my grandfathers and my own father served with honor – just like so many Alaskans. We are a proud people, fiercely protective of Alaska and America, and it shows through the willingness of our people to make sacrifices so that we may remain free. “We owe a debt to our veterans that we cannot fully repay, and we must do better when it comes to showing our gratitude. Our VA hospitals are not what they should be, and too many vets suffer from lack of services or interminable wait times. We have too many homeless veterans and others who can’t find adequate employment, and we must take bold action to end the national tragedy of veteran suicide. Our veterans were heroes at war, and we must support them like heroes at home. When I’m a U.S. senator, I will fight for our veterans and ensure that this country always takes care of those who made us great.” ###

clean_body: | | | | Kelly Tshibaka statement on Veterans Day Kelly Tshibaka and her father Bill Hartline remember Veterans Day Alaska Republican U.S. Senate candidate Kelly Tshibaka today issued the following statement regarding Veterans Day: “The United States of America is the greatest country the world has ever known, and we would not have the freedoms we enjoy if not for the men and women who served this nation in uniform. I come from a family of veterans – both of my grandfathers and my own father served with honor – just like so many Alaskans. We are a proud people, fiercely protective of Alaska and America, and it shows through the willingness of our people to make sacrifices so that we may remain free. “We owe a debt to our veterans that we cannot fully repay, and we must do better when it comes to showing our gratitude. Our VA hospitals are not what they should be, and too many vets suffer from lack of services or interminable wait times. We have too many homeless veterans and others who can’t find adequate employment, and we must take bold action to end the national tragedy of veteran suicide. Our veterans were heroes at war, and we must support them like heroes at home. When I’m a U.S. senator, I will fight for our veterans and ensure that this country always takes care of those who made us great.” ### www.kellyforak.com | | | | ==

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Thank you, Veterans!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
Today, we remember all of the veterans who have served in our military to protect our great country. From World War I, World War II, Korea, Vietnam, I God bless America, and God bless every soldier who has stepped up to put their life on the line to serve and to defend our great country. |
---
Peter,

Today, we remember all of the veterans who have served in our military to protect our great country. From World War I, World War II, Korea, Vietnam, Iraq, Afghanistan, and countless other conflicts, **we owe a deep debt to the soldiers and their families who have sacrificed so much for our country.**

This Veterans Day, I specifically remember those who I served with in Afghanistan, those who were injured or gave the ultimate sacrifice in Afghanistan, and especially the 13 service members that died because of Joe Biden's disastrous exit from Afghanistan.

**God bless America, and God bless every soldier who has stepped up to put their life on the line to serve and to defend our great country.**

Respectfully,

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=6d1a808f910742b7a0ab8609eb7942f7&_e=R4mRYQhkm1wBzhnoj7lnMMVvvlMo6g1nT4QNEBO0Y1NHb_pP82d9n4-Mbhy2WSduG4wSfRyoxT1S8hOeeb9xw4o8MUI5qXB3bYmqoNmr41NTbJZrv4V0KWpdrEY-uK97sg5Ox94vAAURncVBxsQ0VVpnggm0hQH-tqla1sK3th7F0cawi7P7X2HrSK3aNpg2e9eb2ordzS5MNa63_T5LkoOC0xTTf4IKZSmH8IgbvfY4eo43izz-6lKh66hrFS2i3DYg733twNCINRsvKp9bakdIqzCgi5yFvHuMs3N4gLboWS-HoFgHc39ZEezSkmmDRUk5LVJXPakWZjftlqLqpkzRXWcwyi7rS3RB1eSglS4-EC67SEnu0pvAUkpSQYGizKa3HuWBp6OwRoMJ72nN2tPmC9ut89qb2lEGUXLA7oWPozjZPY-vm2JpCYxhmF_MTwKUt4yO8-d7Cm9J778tnQ%3D%3D)

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Antifa Leftists Arrested
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, bec
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcr79ji6j3i30antfgmjcfc8hu5li5343er88p7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm2ob2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65thksuqeedhgeconadjlm9r7cdpke5ir2cjlchr6ep1geapbapj564rmfdpkc9o6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbcphh62qr4pti69j38o5ic8r749fg)
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6v9ate6too98e0g5ct629g1oa5vonjib0opdbpo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm2ob2c1h2bs) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr89ccdddp71nujn8i1c0lklo1jdl8ojc1iu1hp0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm2ob2c1h2bs)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zff5bb7ua43861ii0f2qnchc749k7skgfh17dr6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm2ob2c1h2bs) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zld0dj0amhvr0975iit169iktp6dvb1tdbj2bcd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm2ob2c1h2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd8lf051orfet1tpg59dreb9hua7344o80cso3q8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm2ob2c1h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlr097d4a3jhocavtn15381orpul3028ibqcalo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm2ob2c1h2bs) | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgknr1da875cfokrj79bi8ejjag8soaeh2bsr4c8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm2ob2c1h2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z83o2t0f6jg9d9dbvi91tb5pe7qsshp38uqa2phg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm2ob2c1h2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv04g7ej0a9g8a5dhcv3t3icaaqbmhjeifdt5f48_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm2ob2c1h2bs)
---|---|---

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvn2rlt4nu14bghfu5i69u9i4fenkbc40hok6qng_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm2ob2c1h2bs) **

(In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!) And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments. No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation. That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events. They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro | | | | ---|---|--- 11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Colin Schmitt
subject: Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schmitt for Congress
body:
Honoring Those Who Served

|
---
Friends and Family —

On Veterans Day, we salute all the brave men and women who served our country in the greatest armed forces the world has ever seen.

As a Sergeant in the Army National Guard, I’m proud to serve alongside talented soldiers who have dedicated themselves to our country.

Thank you to everyone who has worn a uniform for the United States. You have defended our freedom and enabled America to be a force for good across the globe.

Please accept the gratitude of a grateful nation as we honor your service this Veterans Day.

Colin Schmitt
_Republican Candidate in New York’s 18th Congressional District_
| Paid for by Schmitt for Congress
---

name: Mike Braun
subject: Honoring All Who Served
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
Mike Braun for Indiana 🇺🇸

<>
Fellow Patriots,

Today is a day we take the time to show how thankful and appreciative we are
for all of the sacrifices that our Veterans have made. We wouldn’t be the
nation we are today if it weren’t for their service and sacrifices.

Please take a moment today to thank our incredible Veterans and think about
all that they sacrificed to make the United States of America the place that it
is today. Our Freedoms and Liberties are because of them, and that is something
to be incredibly thankful for.

Thank you so much to every single one of our brave patriots. It is because of
our Veterans that we can live the American Dream and enjoy our liberties and
everyday freedoms.
<> God Bless 🇺🇸

Mike Braun

Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana

body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=8039249493&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

| | | Please join us for a family-friendly fundraiser in West Philly featuring hot apple cider, adult beverages, snacks, and a reading of "Sofia Valdez, Future Prez." We'd love to [hear from you](mailto:dejaforpa@gmail.com) if you are interested in joining our host committee! Please [RSVP online](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=3f55b5e63f&e=3f8e2ea1e3) and share with local family and friends!

House that Represents You?

---
| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=d2a74cc7cb&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: David Palmer
subject: More than Thank Yous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
https://palmerforillinois.com/ [https://palmerforillinois.com/]
Peter,

Two of the most important men in my life are my father and grandfather. I still talk with them both daily and without them I have no idea where I would be. They are both veterans and I couldn’t be prouder to pay homage to them and to all the other veterans who have served and continued to serve. Thank you for your sacrifices to keep us safe and free!

Today as we celebrate our veterans, I am proud to honor my father and grandfather, and more than half a million veterans in Illinois. I thank them for their military service and their commitment to making our nation safe for us all. But more than just offering thank yous, we need to truly support our military personnel.

My grandfather resides in a VA home, where he can receive care and treatments he needs. So many of our veterans who have returned from across the globe, or those who served a bit closer to home need mental and physical health resources. Our thank yous can come in the form of quality health care and prescription access.

It is also so important that we recognize that our veterans are not just an older population; they are people in their twenties, they are parents, they are people of color, they may identify as LGBTQ, they may experience homelessness or joblessness, different physical abilities, and their needs are not the same. Our thank yous can be to support all all veteran needs.

Veterans make over lives after their service, and become business owners, first responders, teachers, medical professionals, builders, and so much more. They are the people in our community. Our thank yous must help our veterans thrive.

So today, I ask you to join me in saying thank you to our veterans, and following it with our support every day.

Happy Veterans Day,
David Palmer
David Palmer is running for Congress in Illinois’ 13th Congressional District. After years of hearing from entrenched D.C. politicians who care more about re-election than sticking up for the people they represent, David is ready to serve, listen, and do everything he can to make life better for the people here in Central Illinois. Our campaign runs on support from people like you, not special interests, so anything you can chip in will help give Illinoisans a leader they can count on. Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/sqIEO42bkkSnOJ23w8ohrQ2] , or you can unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9b302201-3443-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/11f619d5-3643-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWY2MTlkNS0zNjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rr4Q8LOKzq0KxMN54zW2LxUNA1FMMui71_bC6SlR5Do=&id=125088311 .Paid for by Palmer for Illinois

body:

Stacey Abrams and her team of far left socialists are doing everything they can to keep socialist Lucy McBath in Georgia's 6th Congressional District.
They're pouring MILLIONS of dollars into this race because they know lefty Lucy supports dangerous election bills like HR1 and HR4.
If Stacey Abrams and Lucy McBath get their way, our elections will be taken over by the corrupt Washington, DC Swamp.
I am running as a bold and unafraid conservative trailblazer who will stand up to the left's attempts to weaken our elections and expose Georgia to fraud.

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8093%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fDPfsUgX%2fsleEDfAVngu3A&sysid=1)
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17245%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SQo7DaxJJRmcYIA3D9ZKxg&sysid=1)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this - Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17246%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5AosHBRA234wL2YUXy4%2f6g&sysid=1)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17248%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hhNWo01%2bzhntMKMQF20Hpw&sysid=1)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd63t2isc9vku6a5bal9jse6iv97sau7l9o50njg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm6oj2c5h2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8efouprk5aj7g1j2gv385n0rht35jro131ktcv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm6oj2c5h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zugqgmcsdahc5s6afna1ejmbcipa1hfp7to6miqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm6oj2c5h2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zea7ktjodd0a9qtfg3hoc5j3l84796j5sdoqd0fg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm6oj2c5h2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: What I Don't Tell People About Myself
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_veteran_s_perspective&n=1)
---
Peter \-- What is this country becoming? We've fought wars over the ideas that are growing mainstream amongst our Political Elite. Many of you don't know, but I served 12 years in the Army as an infantry officer. I did two tours of duty overseas and at one point, sat in the chair of a tyrant, who Veterans before me overtook and defeated. At 12 years I realized the battle for American liberty wasn't on the battlefield of Iraq, instead it was against the Political Elite who were shredding our Constitution and destroying our dollar. So I got involved in politics. In 2005, then Master Sergeant Tim Walz, was tapped to lead soldiers on the 1st Brigade, 34th Infantry Division's deployment to Iraq. Before the unit mobilized, Walz saw an opportunity to join the ranks of the Political Elite in Washington D.C., so he retired, dodged the deployment, and ran for Congress.
## Walz abandoned troops for a conquest in political power.
In 2020, Walz the traitor, showed his true colors. He unilaterally declared an emergency, put COVID patients in nursing homes, locked Minnesotans in their houses, shut down businesses and eventually mandated masks. He took on the same kind of powers of tyrants who our Veterans have fought against. **Now Walz joins the ranks of the Political Elite who are trampling on the health freedom of Americans - and even our children. Forced vaccinations are an unAmerican ideal. We are witnessing an unprecedented attack on our liberties.** It's getting so bad, that in Queensland, Australia, unvaccinated citizens are being denied health care and restricted from going to bars, restaurants, and other public venues. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/unvaccinated_in_queensland_denied_hospital_care?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_veteran_s_perspective&n=2) But don't think this erosion of liberty only happens across the ocean from us. Denial of service is happening in our own country from New York to California due to government dictates. **And if we had not Ended Walz' Emergency Powers in June, this may have been our fate as well.** But the battle is not over. Traitors to the Constitution like Tim Walz are not done trampling on our rights. If he sees an opportunity to gain more power at the mercy of our liberties, he'll take it. That's why Action 4 Liberty is so important. My team of young liberty professionals and patriotic volunteers are the defenders of liberty in Minnesota. And I could not be more honored to lead this team! **Peter, I want to make an appeal to you on this Veteran's Day. We are losing this country that was fought on many battlefronts by our veterans. Because of traitors like Tim Walz and his buddies in the Political Class, we are constantly needing to defend liberty.** I need your help to keep pressuring the Political Elite and hold Walz accountable. They want us to go away. They want us to fail. But we will not give up on our mission to protect liberty. **Please support my team, which includes Ryan, a Navy Veteran - they are fighting every day for your freedoms against the Political Class who want to destroy this country.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_veteran_s_perspective&n=3 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_veteran_s_perspective&n=3)
---
The results of Virginia's election are huge. Patriots are waking up to the tyrannical overtaking of our country and our schools. They are poised and ready to hold the Political Elite accountable.
Minnesota needs a major course correction like Virginia. Walz must be held accountable for what he did. And his desire to continue to erode our liberties and health freedom must be STOPPED!
You have a say in this whole battle. By supporting my team, you can fund the resistance to the Political Elite and Tim Walz!
**But I have to be blunt with you. We have had to exhaust our resources fighting against Walz and the Political Class this year and we may not be able to continue this mission without your support.**
If we can keep these young liberty professionals on board, fighting in the trenches, the Political Elite will not beat us. Please help us out.
[**Make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 to support our operations so we can STOP Tim Walz' attacks on our freedoms!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_veteran_s_perspective&n=4)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_veteran_s_perspective&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_veteran_s_perspective&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_veteran_s_perspective&n=7), software for leaders.

Because of traitors like Tim Walz and his buddies in the Political Class, we are constantly needing to defend liberty. I need your help to keep pressuring the Political Elite and hold Walz accountable. They want us to go away. They want us to fail. But we will not give up on our mission to protect liberty. Please support my team, which includes Ryan, a Navy Veteran - they are fighting every day for your freedoms against the Political Class who want to destroy this country. | "Donate" The results of Virginia's election are huge. Patriots are waking up to the tyrannical overtaking of our country and our schools. They are poised and ready to hold the Political Elite accountable. Minnesota needs a major course correction like Virginia. Walz must be held accountable for what he did. And his desire to continue to erode our liberties and health freedom must be STOPPED! You have a say in this whole battle. By supporting my team, you can fund the resistance to the Political Elite and Tim Walz! But I have to be blunt with you. We have had to exhaust our resources fighting against Walz and the Political Class this year and we may not be able to continue this mission without your support. If we can keep these young liberty professionals on board, fighting in the trenches, the Political Elite will not beat us. Please help us out. In Liberty, ** Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · United States

name: Matt Jacobs
subject: Thankful for our Veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Our veterans represent the very best of America. Today we thank them and their families for their service and many sacrifices. [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=e73b974454b44d23ba1dc156f8d680b9&_e=5XzgMbQQ2We-J7e6W3KhI325SGQudToQ4ZjtLf-TDWxVQwdFVG8UkZ3vAO_2JPDf2bH4LGOlFDVyF925p7B3HJdmeHui79wOaOP5YGL--UxbAHVONCjJcqpRuJnnaW3BNLqFP1dztd24o_NwxSBL4CgatS9HkFWIcL66qQjQ7JwAfpaiSM0CDGb23beXl-6Z_nkFwOfalzQQAMwPV23lraC75Uz-mpLOQvAzVJ317KhQGuBWoyLNCbt1wurIZKi5Dp5JarvUnA3Jxo2q9wgk5Q%3D%3D) Peter, Our Veterans represent the very best of America—and all the values and ideals we hold dear. **Please join me in wishing our Veterans a meaningful Veterans Day and thanking them for their service and sacrifice. ** I also want to recognize and thank the families of our Veterans, whose sacrifices know no end. I am committed to ensuring that our Veterans get all the support they need and deserve, especially while transitioning back into civilian life. On a personal note, I want to acknowledge the service of my grandfather Sandy, a WWII Veteran. As a descendent of Holocaust survivors, I would not be here today were it not for the bravery and sacrifice of millions of U.S. and Allied soldiers – like my grandfather – in the Second World War. I also want to acknowledge the heroism of the servicemembers and veterans I came to know during my years as a federal counter-terrorism prosecutor. **They are America’s greatest heroes, and I will always be grateful for their selfless service.** God bless our Veterans and America. Matt Jacobs | | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=e73b974454b44d23ba1dc156f8d680b9&_e=5XzgMbQQ2We-J7e6W3KhIzTbpQi0yTwIOI1oWgXJKIQisVwu9WuIg4qNnlvynkKcVWdc8IpTFpKcRr4wQiWbOcTQu7m7l5VpepSDD5cJ-aeUZUamL18ELiVsttTtsjUghcDJav-19CUpQOhpD8q2mDj9_WYDo-7rTvJxD832ZWTLKzsf-aa7eZ0wo2mcp4vCjItxVoS8I14lkb0y_8TjPBGzeJc0LTuB3DO2Z4sfa4_QhloTOULDVPpDTJnI08fhhLGklLMQ3OKh95a3OSh1eA%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=e73b974454b44d23ba1dc156f8d680b9&_e=5XzgMbQQ2We-J7e6W3KhIzt7QRxULXByf1aQfjjlPNjIcPmTyYuDraMfxMj59evcQELTCOmlg1th7Ycg-FD3ioo4-GqQcto6_stNyIINUfQQO9aaEKLamaim9h0cIH4PLuHTiZShYtnlNc_XjlNxzbTJyxHrXxSSqHBkzf4jTP_76uDcl3wpQX9a7wRFhwmn7ZEp7MJ_NCXYEPIk517BOg-65e59l6t4XlDE8ZPl6F4Hz2hKxLnne4gT_soU8iOmc87A_CP_N6Wj8QHFKEi3Vg%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=e73b974454b44d23ba1dc156f8d680b9&_e=5XzgMbQQ2We-J7e6W3KhI5YCMy5DTfDr-bAbzNbRmHhachbZ4egRr2x_iwsffLeiiNPPhF1VoqY6btQuEMU-n0GgD-WUQf6UbWxTbhD9JBgtI-Eh2UUpLUiC49kkg8GV3B3y1VUER_JOpXVwAnRGgdtmRAUCEhLnevi8ktF4PeWOanVvJvn_iOp0LecJQ3poLUkcgMHPtouzdA33J7heslLsf_AyPk6GZGOxtxJ_3Lp_0OjdfcKnwndd12DHshWWHc5IFim-ZRq8ElFG093uQLB165UwsfGCPbqUlI3GL2Q%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=e73b974454b44d23ba1dc156f8d680b9&_e=5XzgMbQQ2We-J7e6W3KhI6eAHb0X1itG-TvUBEw_QU547kbuGynNMBk565Awec7-xya86Y0oJTMv4iCtHl2yz51tbWycvfweTvG7toas8Jz5vRW7uZ6HZXSWDYGxCMqq_H82JK0mOH_znQJO3XJXSzWa6nOtNSOlLN0kV6JPOXedzjEpTPn3Urx5kf7Bnj9x12572XGx8SXqGBcahXvh4sJ1554hnYXvrE9kKrSMaPLvmPALFd-7Vg3jnf-ehNBaW0t0wQ_nZzV6PBgdqnynbfgUwS6nnfKbQ_junzVFQfQ%3D)

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: I hope you’ll join me in honoring our veterans today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC
body:
| | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDM-EBQfsbGG-s9DaLmbUEihpOkig6mNguK8yZijudTPis4F4Mj8IH3nnr6OeImF8tMAs0CyzkY1kT5Ibz-xHNlRjU2B2mHOaE7LEbUlT6W9zK0h99Hg4rb4cqqloViZQbeYrkxhchbwRtbVYeCZ74wlnh9mdliHwKlcXJwHJRBroL40dXwF9cN2iL9IwgVvy22yKqkpTLSFy97aOwfmXjA1I_RWnp0suZdOZUzF2CGIOsiTFn7NxXHglwl7P44bswF8MqssBFZmowFti--69RKdjxnyDoXS8qnElMMqr6bJz0Zv0tzl-00apgfl5EIlQzQ/3gx/pCKgyLLsTvSziP7axzYYFA/h0/BhQYAuJYWJOIfF9VCCgwwwQkkKlwbhnx2YZKChBQoR8)
---
Hello,
Veterans Day is an occasion that means more to me than just my military service.
The Franken family has tallied veterans of the U.S. Navy, Air Force, Army, and the Marine Corps, all tallying well over a century of service – and from WWI to WWII, from Vietnam to today, that service continues.
My grandfather and his brother set aside their recent German heritage to become American Expeditionary Forces during WWI. Both men suffered grievous injuries leading to early deaths, but quietly so, they remained proud of their service to their new nation. (Thank you for my mother, grandpops!)
My father signed up right after Pearl Harbor, and three and a-half-weeks later, he reported to the USS Vincennes on New Year’s Eve, 1941. He survived the ship’s sinking at Savo Island, spent 13 long hours in the water, recovered from his wounds, and continued his service to war’s end. He saw some of the bloodiest operations first-hand, such as Doolittle’s Raid, Midway, and the Battle for Guadalcanal. He never discussed his involvement, but no tougher or more honorable man lived.
I’m grateful to all of my family members and to every American who has protected our country. And I’m grateful to their immediate families. Military service means not only a daily knot in the stomach for loved ones, but also raising a family, mostly alone, amid cross-country moves and lengthy deployments.
Veteran’s Day for me is about honoring those who gave, those who endured, and the families who persevered. I salute them!
I hope you’ll join me in honoring our veterans today.
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

Friend,
The Biden administration is the most radical and destructive administration in American history. The sad part is, they are just getting started. **Joe Biden’s nominee** to regulate the banking systems, Saule Omarova, has said she **wants to “starve” our oil and gas industry** of money in order to bankrupt them. Yes, you read that right: Biden has nominated a person to oversee our banking industry, WHOSE STATED GOAL IS TO DESTROY ONE OF THE MOST IMPORTANT INDUSTRIES IN THE STATE OF WYOMING AND IN OUR COUNTRY. These people are sick.

This administration is responsible for the record-high gas prices, and hardworking Americans are struggling to pay at the pump. As we head into the winter months, families are struggling to budget for what will be skyrocketing home heating bills. clean_body: | | | | Re: Saule Omarova wants them gone. Friend, The Biden administration is the most radical and destructive administration in American history. The sad part is, they are just getting started. Joe Biden’s nominee to regulate the banking systems, Saule Omarova, has said she wants to “starve” our oil and gas industry of money in order to bankrupt them. Yes, you read that right: Biden has nominated a person to oversee our banking industry, WHOSE STATED GOAL IS TO DESTROY ONE OF THE MOST IMPORTANT INDUSTRIES IN THE STATE OF WYOMING AND IN OUR COUNTRY. These people are sick. This administration is responsible for the record-high gas prices, and hardworking Americans are struggling to pay at the pump. As we head into the winter months, families are struggling to budget for what will be skyrocketing home heating bills. Put bluntly, the American people cannot afford another radical nominee like Saule Omarova to control our banks in order to make this energy crisis even worse. Not only would Omarova’s confirmation crush Americans’ wallets, but it would also kill tens of thousands of jobs in the energy industry, including many right here in Wyoming.This must be blocked. We must be united to fight back against the radical transformation of America led by Joe Biden and radicals like AOC and their Green New Deal. It won’t be easy, but together we can save our energy industry and our country by taking back the House and electing America First candidates to Congress. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcusfki7nid0ia77lu5q0oiadvut35sk3544393o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrmcc71mphj6srkmphnbd9h6aojac5nm8rm4sdiedj66pllepj69dhichh37d70cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3impj32c5lmhjrcob666ob4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6cdhm6o70chim49fg)
| | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1mjcr8d628ionb97luqo1aupisb2v9ggo91sero_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34clh2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zifugvbs90ndm90en73duam73ol670cjg90m2ii0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34clh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpn7ki1lo0t5ra9be23tggmoit8tsrevb8qldlp0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34clh2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq3jopo5bm9u7nf3ivmn7fibnrfmd5fpspjggtg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34clh2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze6h2ndqs6529oajmofdtou5urcc9v7lv376pv5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34clh2bs)

name: Team Holly
subject: #MackPack
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack
