clean_body: [] Dear Peter, I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [] I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories. Rush a donation today: $5.00 [] $50.00 [] $10.00 [] $75.00 [] $25.00 [] $100.00 [] [ Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress. We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work. Check out our Website [] , Twitter [] , and Facebook [] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [] In solidarity, Holly McCormack DONATE [] Join the #MackPack [] [] [] [] [] Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: 3,000 Churches shut down, but Casinos are open
body:
Dear Peter, The radical left is doing everything it can to destroy the First Amendment and religious liberty. From vaccines mandates that don't allow religious exemptions to shutting down churches, leftists are STILL using COVID-19 as an excuse to attack people of faith. We are fighting back. But we can't do it without your help! [**Will you stand for religious liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745538:6QcAXX2oN:m:1:3298722022:C66D0219E3D30318D75C74BF4AEB6BED:r) You see, once the left had an excuse, they attacked religion. It began with politicians using the pandemic to shut down places of worship and to threaten and persecute people of faith. Of course, at the same time they kept abortion clinics, liquor stores, marijuana dispensaries open... _but they shut down churches and threatened pastors with massive fines!_ Now, they're using mandates to force people to get a vaccine and, in many cases, not allowing for ANY religious exemption! And if people choose their faith, they're being fired or suspended and cannot provide for their family. It's a disgusting and unconstitutional attack against people of faith. **These mandates are NOT about the "science" - they're a direct and blatant attack on religion from the radical left!** And I have bad news for you.... These attacks are just beginning. With this radical, anti-religious liberty administration in the White House, it's open season on our First Amendment rights. People or faith are under attack, and the radical left is not going to stop until they completely stamp out our freedoms! If we don't act now, the government will decide if your church is allowed to meet, if your child's school will be able to open, and how you get to exercise your religious liberties. [**That 's why it so urgent that you join the fight with a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or more right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745538:6QcAXX2oN:m:1:3298722022:C66D0219E3D30318D75C74BF4AEB6BED:r) **Here at the Center for American Liberty we aren 't just fighting back - WE'RE WINNING!!** My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on _**Newsmax**_ and _**Fox News with Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson, Shannon Bream, and Fox and Friends**._ I've been on a lot lately talking about our many battles and **_victories_** against the radical left and their attempts to destroy our religious liberties -**_including the United States Supreme Court!_**
* This year alone, we've had three victories at the U.S. Supreme Court that forced radical governors to open Houses of Worship and to stop unconstitutional rules targeting people of faith.
* We've forced public schools in Montgomery County, MD to allow religious exemptions for their vaccine mandate!
* And right now, we're fighting for parents' right to choose where they send their children - including private and religious schools.

**And that 's just a few of our victories, and ongoing cases!** [**Help us keep winning and defending our freedoms with an urgent gift of $35 or more today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745538:6QcAXX2oN:m:1:3298722022:C66D0219E3D30318D75C74BF4AEB6BED:r) We've seen these awful attacks in just about every state, across different religions, and even in "conservative" states. **This isn 't just a New York or California problem... This is a problem for EVERY American.** It's something I never thought could happen in the United States, but it is. The minute this pandemic began, the radical left decided to use it as a weapon. And now, after almost 2 years of this INSANITY, they're still using COVID-19 to increase the size of government while eroding our freedoms. Now, I know that's a lot of bad news.... But the good news is that the founding fathers designed our government using a system of checks and balances. When the people stand up and hold public officials accountable in court, our liberties are being restored. That's why we must stand up together today. We have a chance to end the left's targeting of our religious freedoms. If we don't take immediate action on this.... TODAY, the America we pass to the next generation will not be the America that you and I know and love. [**So please join me to protect our liberty with a tax-deductible donation today!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745538:6QcAXX2oN:m:1:3298722022:C66D0219E3D30318D75C74BF4AEB6BED:r) **My goal is to have as many patriots as possible on board** , so that the next time a crony leftist politician tries to attack religious liberty, I can leverage our support at a moment's notice! [**STAND FOR RELIGIOUS LIBERTY TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745538:6QcAXX2oN:m:1:3298722022:C66D0219E3D30318D75C74BF4AEB6BED:r) To win this fight, before it even hits the court room, we need your help. I hope you'll join me! Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745538:6QcAXX2oN:m:1:3298722022:C66D0219E3D30318D75C74BF4AEB6BED:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745538:6QcAXX2oN:m:1:3298722022:C66D0219E3D30318D75C74BF4AEB6BED:r) **[Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745538:6QcAXX2oN:m:1:3298722022:C66D0219E3D30318D75C74BF4AEB6BED:r)** The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745539:6QcAXX2oN:m:1:3298722022:C66D0219E3D30318D75C74BF4AEB6BED:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re gerrymandering me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again. RINOs and special interests in
_Sponsored message_
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z86tj7k6744fk7bd0mldsmub2hjf9qarbdkvqj5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34c5h2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9090sqqunkf6p5gkkf0n9ssupiindhdker8t6bo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34c5h2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zt4b41e25ubqe95s589g50p0sp505cb9kmlrparo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34c5h2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlivf7q0js4t1fnu30ji8hdgabjd1m2ieq89s0gg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34c5h2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq0e5vkn0tgodqo4g78tv9laoucunm6nmm63lnqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34c5h2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z33fsi8qs0kbds8tun85b5vcgfpobbuv6u43tgf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34c5h2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zd14urep45st5uie7ar7gbdjo86f0kr156od45bo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34c5h2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbsuk8e6kulaiqck3ftshn3vma6lq9lccgcnt4co_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34c5h2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zo4bl3ggr8ihpfv6qvbh7a4e054pmj4hqu2382u8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34c5h2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgicl5a33tqneckt9ghph78sh8c2qp3na7q3pgu8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o34c5h2bs)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

body:
I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkpm63ho1n3d59qehfmi28vagtouadmi2hqbvg1g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfep36ecrm8s9gchrr9opiemqj1p35m3h7dcljckpm6dthm3ij2dr5eeobep3hmsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0ear6cc9gmmq6fdj6coq61cj26pp238h1e8he4933cphm6or0s1hm0oh5u)

This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

**[Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zk72d21an1deadmrvuabcrtl89hgb3bs02feodbo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o33c1h2bs "Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.")**

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

**[BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmrt51k1l03m1umi7ud4e6drsa5eeqta6imbltoo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o33c1h2bs "BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched")**

---
| | | [300% MATCH NOW](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvlsrplvvh76cql6mh6mb36sgccob6297a9eudmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o33c1h2bs "Generic Button")
---

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking._

_She 's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks.

And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._

**Pelosi 's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you, Fellow Conservative.

**[I can't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn5tir0rh4h3q9613kvpik76lkoo7o7fphm081io_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm1o33c1h2bs "I can’t extend this deadline again – even for Top Patriots like you. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I'm thinking about my grandmother today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
This Veterans Day, I'm thinking about my grandmother.

During World War II, she left her life in Hudson, Wisconsin to serve in the Navy as part of a WAVES unit — Women Accepted for Voluntary Emergency Service — blazing trails few women before her had. She never waited for a tap on the shoulder to make a change.

I'm sure I'm not the only one thinking about a veteran who has inspired them today. A lot of us have a loved one who served our country and made us proud. We owe them all our endless gratitude — and not just in the form of a "thank you" but with action.

Thousands of Wisconsin veterans live in poverty and hundreds are experiencing houselessness every night. Nationally, more than 17 veterans take their own life every day. We owe those who have served our country so much more.

As Senator, I'll fight to ensure our service members, veterans, and their families have access to the support they need after they hang up their uniform. That means working to end veteran homelessness and making the VA more accessible. I'll also advocate for the best physical and mental health care our country can provide, and work to create more employment opportunities and workforce training. We can — and must — do more for those who bravely served our country.

My grandmother would always tell me, "Ask for forgiveness, not permission." I still carry those words with me today, and I'll take them with me to the U.S. Senate to fight for our veterans.

Thank you, and have a safe and healthy Veterans Day.

— Sarah Godlewski
Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: 3,000 Churches shut down, but Casinos are open
body:
Dear Peter, The radical left is doing everything it can to destroy the First Amendment and religious liberty. From vaccines mandates that don't allow religious exemptions to shutting down churches, leftists are STILL using COVID-19 as an excuse to attack people of faith. We are fighting back. But we can't do it without your help! [**Will you stand for religious liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745275:6TqT_X2PN:m:1:3253819041:451773E030BFC5A36E489A3C0C40C485:r) You see, once the left had an excuse, they attacked religion. It began with politicians using the pandemic to shut down places of worship and to threaten and persecute people of faith. Of course, at the same time they kept abortion clinics, liquor stores, marijuana dispensaries open... _but they shut down churches and threatened pastors with massive fines!_ Now, they're using mandates to force people to get a vaccine and, in many cases, not allowing for ANY religious exemption! And if people choose their faith, they're being fired or suspended and cannot provide for their family. It's a disgusting and unconstitutional attack against people of faith. **These mandates are NOT about the "science" - they're a direct and blatant attack on religion from the radical left!** And I have bad news for you.... These attacks are just beginning. With this radical, anti-religious liberty administration in the White House, it's open season on our First Amendment rights. People or faith are under attack, and the radical left is not going to stop until they completely stamp out our freedoms! If we don't act now, the government will decide if your church is allowed to meet, if your child's school will be able to open, and how you get to exercise your religious liberties. [**That 's why it so urgent that you join the fight with a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or more right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745275:6TqT_X2PN:m:1:3253819041:451773E030BFC5A36E489A3C0C40C485:r) **Here at the Center for American Liberty we aren 't just fighting back - WE'RE WINNING!!** My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on _**Newsmax**_ and _**Fox News with Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson, Shannon Bream, and Fox and Friends**._ I've been on a lot lately talking about our many battles and **_victories_** against the radical left and their attempts to destroy our religious liberties -**_including the United States Supreme Court!_**
* This year alone, we've had three victories at the U.S. Supreme Court that forced radical governors to open Houses of Worship and to stop unconstitutional rules targeting people of faith.
* We've forced public schools in Montgomery County, MD to allow religious exemptions for their vaccine mandate!
* And right now, we're fighting for parents' right to choose where they send their children - including private and religious schools.

**And that 's just a few of our victories, and ongoing cases!** [**Help us keep winning and defending our freedoms with an urgent gift of $35 or more today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745275:6TqT_X2PN:m:1:3253819041:451773E030BFC5A36E489A3C0C40C485:r) We've seen these awful attacks in just about every state, across different religions, and even in "conservative" states. **This isn 't just a New York or California problem... This is a problem for EVERY American.** It's something I never thought could happen in the United States, but it is. The minute this pandemic began, the radical left decided to use it as a weapon. And now, after almost 2 years of this INSANITY, they're still using COVID-19 to increase the size of government while eroding our freedoms. Now, I know that's a lot of bad news.... But the good news is that the founding fathers designed our government using a system of checks and balances. When the people stand up and hold public officials accountable in court, our liberties are being restored. That's why we must stand up together today. We have a chance to end the left's targeting of our religious freedoms. If we don't take immediate action on this.... TODAY, the America we pass to the next generation will not be the America that you and I know and love. [**So please join me to protect our liberty with a tax-deductible donation today!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745275:6TqT_X2PN:m:1:3253819041:451773E030BFC5A36E489A3C0C40C485:r) **My goal is to have as many patriots as possible on board** , so that the next time a crony leftist politician tries to attack religious liberty, I can leverage our support at a moment's notice! [**STAND FOR RELIGIOUS LIBERTY TODAY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745275:6TqT_X2PN:m:1:3253819041:451773E030BFC5A36E489A3C0C40C485:r) To win this fight, before it even hits the court room, we need your help. I hope you'll join me! Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745275:6TqT_X2PN:m:1:3253819041:451773E030BFC5A36E489A3C0C40C485:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745275:6TqT_X2PN:m:1:3253819041:451773E030BFC5A36E489A3C0C40C485:r) **[Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58745275:6TqT_X2PN:m:1:3253819041:451773E030BFC5A36E489A3C0C40C485:r)** The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Honoring our nation's veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Today is Veterans Day -- a time to honor the brave service members who answered the call to protect our country and our freedom. We owe the nearly 300,000 veterans here in Kentucky and the millions across the nation a great debt of gratitude. They and their families made tremendous sacrifices to keep us safe, and many face unique challenges even after their service ends. Peter,

Today is Veterans Day -- a time to honor the brave service members who answered the call to protect our country and our freedom.

We owe the nearly 300,000 veterans here in Kentucky and the millions across the nation a great debt of gratitude. They and their families made tremendous sacrifices to keep us safe, and many face unique challenges even after their service ends.

Our veterans deserve more than just our gratitude -- they deserve access to the resources and care they need. That's why as governor, I'm working to expand medical and mental health services, secure money for VA facilities, adopt veteran-specific training for medical professionals, and more.

Our veterans fought for us and now we must fight for them. This Veterans Day, I hope you'll join me in honoring those who have served and recommitting to looking after our veterans across the Commonwealth.

Have a safe and happy Veterans Day,

Andy

| PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
---
Andy Beshear for Governor
PO Box 4278
Louisville, KY 40204
United States
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59129370:sh-26yHNk:m:1:2247059263:DED4DD65AE42E6730ADC37DEF896F6AE:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59129370:sh-26yHNk:m:1:2247059263:DED4DD65AE42E6730ADC37DEF896F6AE:r)**

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59129370:sh-26yHNk:m:1:2247059263:DED4DD65AE42E6730ADC37DEF896F6AE:r)**

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59129370:sh-26yHNk:m:1:2247059263:DED4DD65AE42E6730ADC37DEF896F6AE:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,

Jim

Peter - Herschel Walker's far left leaning Democratic opponent in the Georgia Senate race is raising millions of dollars.

name: Nina Turner
subject: Courage Under Fire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
We Stand with the Squad and demand Congress pass the Build Back Better package.
#

Friends,

Over the weekend, Congress passed a 1.2T Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework (BIF), an important measure that will infuse unprecedented investment across our nation’s infrastructure impacting everything from bridges and roads, to strengthening water and energy systems and expanding access to broadband. While BIF did pass, and there is some good in this bill, there are glaring deficiencies including the opportunity to end taxpayer funding of the oil and gas polluters most responsible for the climate crisis.

This critical infrastructure bill is an important part of the Biden Administration’s agenda but unfortunately does not fully address the social spending and safety net investments included in the Build Back Better reconciliation package that working families desperately need.

That is why the Squad and the Progressive Caucus stepped up and insisted on both the Infrastructure framework AND the historic Build Back Better package passing together. The Progressive Caucus, the Speaker, and the President all agreed this was the right thing to do.

Unfortunately, last Friday, instead of passing the BIF and BBB together, ensuring essentially that the investment in our human infrastructure was tied to physical infrastructure, only the BIF was voted on.

Understanding that this move to decouple the BIF and the BBB puts the BBB package at risk for significant policy cuts or that it could die altogether, our Squad had the courage under fire to act in the best interest of the people who need it most — the working families of our country - and voted NO on the infrastructure bill as a separate measure.

We salute the work of the Squad for having the courage to ask for more on behalf of the people.
* Rep. Jamaal Bowman of New York
* Rep. Cori Bush of Missouri
* Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez of New York
* Rep. Ilhan Omar of Minnesota
* Rep. Ayanna Pressley of Massachusetts
* Rep. Rashida Tlaib of Michigan

Now, these courageous fighters are taking criticism for holding the line for us. We must stand in solidarity with them to make sure the important measures in the Build Back Better package are not gutted out, or unnecessarily stalled before the holiday recess. The poor, working poor and barely middle class cannot settle for just the Infrastructure bill alone.

There is already a push to delay the vote on the Build Back Better Package until a review from the Congressional Budget Office is completed. We must urgently continue to organize on the outside to keep up the pressure and ensure the BBB passes without compromise.
[**Will you chip in today to help amplify the message of our progressive movement in support of BBB?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38541152/315911459/1761773496?refcode=211111_FR_bifvotesquadbbb&refcode2=9e533c24-3f43-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTUzM2MyNC0zZjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sqTFPoFC4xdTfgtYjqpB0sJ1hDg5Yeys9kKsrIGytq4=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38541153/315911460/1761773496?refcode=211111_FR_bifvotesquadbbb_ELothr&express_lane=true&refcode2=9e533c24-3f43-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTUzM2MyNC0zZjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sqTFPoFC4xdTfgtYjqpB0sJ1hDg5Yeys9kKsrIGytq4=)**
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38541154/315911461/1761773496?refcode=211111_FR_bifvotesquadbbb_footer&refcode2=9e533c24-3f43-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTUzM2MyNC0zZjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sqTFPoFC4xdTfgtYjqpB0sJ1hDg5Yeys9kKsrIGytq4=)**

Cleveland, OH 44101
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e5e6c490-1543-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/9e533c24-3f43-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTUzM2MyNC0zZjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sqTFPoFC4xdTfgtYjqpB0sJ1hDg5Yeys9kKsrIGytq4=&id=113311558) to unsubscribe.

name: Great America Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6570%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=kGw1pKhEdoAJODKQVQvWOg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67918%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qP4umnOJAw0KuhOY3AgCKA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67910%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7hHycC4EfeiqAE1uGWka3Q&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67912%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PH9vBApF8y7b%2bGERIY71ww&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6570%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=kGw1pKhEdoAJODKQVQvWOg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6570%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=kGw1pKhEdoAJODKQVQvWOg&sysid=1)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re gerrymandering me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6574%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZMym6UEn8sKrLVUjtQVVXg&sysid=1)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67919%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hvtljUJXlFED7%2bkVuO%2fkqg&sysid=1)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67911%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cOS6xLopa4StjYyfjVDHEA&sysid=1)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office - I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67913%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i16%2bOFfyGQ86rjKC0bxu%2fg&sysid=1)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67925%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FK7Yka4aAP6avRpFY1Gsyg&sysid=1)

**[Your donation,](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67927%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jfqCVn4MkWAySP6lqb25Vg&sysid=1)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies. And now that trial has
| | | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zffkba14riq8d0gipqbavvc94avthfke0aimptjg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm9o76c1h2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zn9f1e73ul62ijdtihdj96o77l7ev6lhvhe9rac0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm9o76c1h2bs)**
|

[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z00bntct297lv53fp0bail46qna208q7biqqt7to_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm9o76c1h2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlb4g1doldsndgh25pv6o507ahmp1ocb85gm5k10_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdhm9o76c1h2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---

subject: Record-breaking number of Texans registered to vote

body:
[1]Powered By People

Exciting news, for the first time ever Texas has over 17 million
registered voters!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48781?refcode=ema20211111-162223&t=1001&akid=162223%2E444211%2E1XxZaX ]Houston Chronicle Headline

With every new voter registered in Texas, we move one step closer to
making the change we want to see. And this is in no small part thanks to
the work of Powered by People volunteers and supporters like you!

Since 2019, Powered by People has registered over 250,000 likely
Democratic voters. And right now, volunteers are on the ground registering
new voters wherever they are – college campuses, community events, even
their own doorsteps.

This is
how we win. One new voter at a time. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48781?refcode=ema20211111-162223&t=1002&akid=162223%2E444211%2E1XxZaX ]Please, if you want to support
Powered by People's work to fight against voter suppression and register
hundreds of thousands of new Texas voters, will you chip in
$3 or more today?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48781?refcode=ema20211111-162223&amount=3&t=1021&akid=162223%2E444211%2E1XxZaX ]Contribute $3

All year, Texas Republicans have been trying to take away Texans' votes.
Led by Governor Greg Abbott, the GOP state legislature passed one of the
most extreme voter suppression laws in the country. But we haven't let
them stop us. We've rallied, trained to become Volunteer Deputy
Registrars, and registered new voters in every corner of the state.

The Texas GOP wants nothing more than for us to surrender to their power
grab, but these voter registration numbers prove that we're building a
movement powerful enough to overcome any attacks on our democracy.

Thank you for your support,

Kate Roberts

name: Tom Perez
subject: Veterans Day
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38541186/315911717/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmZhZDExMy00MTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqXydEhuizzyyPPNrmNKz9QBeReBhRyXb8Zky7_fDXI=)

Peter,
Today, we thank and honor the generations of courageous Americans that have answered our nation's call to serve, to keep us safe, and to protect our freedoms. We thank these patriots for putting their lives on the line in the name of liberty, justice, and equality for all people.
As we celebrate today, I think of John F. Kennedy and his words:
**_"As we express our gratitude, we must never forget that the highest appreciation is not to utter words but to live by them."_**
While we pay tribute to our veterans today, we must always be mindful of our moral responsibility to serve them as they have served us. As Governor, I will ensure that Maryland's veterans never have to worry about transitioning to a good-paying civilian job, pursuing higher education, or receiving quality mental and physical health care.
**To our veterans: I thank you, and I promise to serve and honor you as you have served us.**
Thank you,

Tom

Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer.
Tom Perez for Maryland
PO BOX 5389
TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389
United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3a61b9a6-3143-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/3ffad113-4143-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmZhZDExMy00MTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HqXydEhuizzyyPPNrmNKz9QBeReBhRyXb8Zky7_fDXI=&id=116402624).
**** ********

name: Karen Bass
subject: Our city should be there for our veterans like they were for us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Friend --

Today we honor the selfless veterans who served our nation both overseas and here at home.

Our veterans make a great personal sacrifice that we can never take for granted. They serve not only to protect the American people but to defend all that our country stands for: freedom, democracy, and justice.

Los Angeles has the second largest veteran population in the country with over 200,000 veterans. Right now, roughly 3,900 of those veterans are homeless. No veteran should go to sleep hungry or without a roof over their heads, which is why last month I worked with the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to assist those sleeping outside the West LA VA Medical Center. When he came to visit our city, we urged him to take action, and following our meeting, he did.

Tackling this crisis will require leaders who can bring change and action at every level of our government. I believe our city has an obligation to be there for our veterans like they were for us. As mayor, I will fight to make sure our veterans aren't left behind when they come home, and they receive the help they need -- be it jobs, health care, mental health services, or any other kind of support.

To all our veterans, you deserve our recognition, admiration, and gratitude -- but most importantly, you have earned a city government that takes care of YOU. **Thank you for your service and your sacrifice, today and every day.**

In solidarity,

Karen

Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
---

Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022
777 S Figueroa St
STE 4050
Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States

clean_body: Friend -- Today we honor the selfless veterans who served our nation both overseas and here at home. Our veterans make a great personal sacrifice that we can never take for granted. They serve not only to protect the American people but to defend all that our country stands for: freedom, democracy, and justice. Los Angeles has the second largest veteran population in the country with over 200,000 veterans. Right now, roughly 3,900 of those veterans are homeless. No veteran should go to sleep hungry or without a roof over their heads, which is why last month I worked with the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to assist those sleeping outside the West LA VA Medical Center. When he came to visit our city, we urged him to take action, and following our meeting, he did. Tackling this crisis will require leaders who can bring change and action at every level of our government. I believe our city has an obligation to be there for our veterans like they were for us. As mayor, I will fight to make sure our veterans aren't left behind when they come home, and they receive the help they need -- be it jobs, health care, mental health services, or any other kind of support. To all our veterans, you deserve our recognition, admiration, and gratitude -- but most importantly, you have earned a city government that takes care of YOU. Thank you for your service and your sacrifice, today and every day. In solidarity, Karen Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328) Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 777 S Figueroa St STE 4050 Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States Additional information is available at =. = | = | = ---|---|--- We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please =.

name: Team AOC
subject: Destigmatizing trauma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Today on Veterans Day, as we thank each of our nation’s veterans, active service members, and their families, we want to share these stories with you in an effort to support all survivors and deconstruct the stigma around trauma.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211111-2640-header&t=1&akid=2640%2E2526796%2EN4hIAx)
Earlier this year, [Alexandria joined with Congressman Jason Crow, a combat veteran, on CBS to tell their stories of how they experienced the events of January 6.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10135?t=2&akid=2640%2E2526796%2EN4hIAx)
**And today on Veterans Day, as we thank each of our nation’s veterans, active service members, and their families, we want to share these stories with you again in an effort to support all survivors and deconstruct the stigma around trauma.**
309 days ago, our nation’s Capitol came under attack. That was the big story, and inside that big story lies thousands of individual accounts, just as valid and important as the other.
Congressman Jason Crow shared that his experience of the events brought back memories of combat in Iraq and Afghanistan, while Alexandria shared that she experienced the events through the lens of being a survivor of sexual assault. They both agreed that there’s a legacy to trauma, and that it compounds. Here’s what Congressman Crow had to say:
_“What is important to understand about trauma, whether it’s combat trauma or sexual assault trauma, is that it is outside the realm of normal human experience. And everybody is impacted, whether they know it or not. And they’re impacted in different ways, on different timelines. And we are not good as a society with dealing with trauma._
_One of the biggest problems is the stigma society puts on survivors. And it prevents survivors from coming forward and getting the help they need. And it's killing people. We have over 20 veterans a day that die by suicide because of the stigma that prevents them from getting help. And other survivors deal with that stigma too. And it has to stop._
_I never imagined that I would be put back in that scenario of being an Army Ranger in Iraq and Afghanistan where I would feel fearful for my life or having to fight for my life, but that’s what happened on January 6.”_
Telling our stories, especially right after the event transpired, is an important part of healing. And this applies to all survivors. Telling your story allows you to move through the emotions, revisit and process that fear, and move past it.
Alexandria decided to share her story about surviving sexual assault, because when survivors walk into a room they bring their whole selves. When we have new experiences, we respond and experience them with the entirety of our life story. And her experience with sexual assault informed her experience on January 6.
**Alexandria and Congressman Crow shared their stories because they want to start to destigmatize trauma and getting help.** When survivors have their experiences minimized, it’s extremely damaging. So many survivors around the country don’t get the help they need because they internalize people telling them that their trauma isn’t “big enough”.
**If you are a survivor of trauma, need help and have a story to tell, please reach out.[The National Suicide Prevention Hotline is available 24/7 to help you access help right now: 800-273-8255](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10136?t=3&akid=2640%2E2526796%2EN4hIAx)**
As we have seen time and time again, the trauma of service impacts every veteran differently, and we must strengthen the support we offer to those who have committed their heroism to defending our country.
Alexandria is committed to improving the care we provide for those who have served. This year, Alexandria and Democrats in Congress fought for billions of dollars in funding for our veterans: $2.2 billion for homelessness prevention programs, including support for veterans reentering the workforce; $2.2 billion for expanded services at VA facilities; and $97.6 billion for boosts to veterans healthcare, including opioid abuse and suicide prevention programs.
We can, and must, continue this work by increasing funding for the VA, improving access to mental health resources, and fighting for the women and gender-nonconforming service members who face healthcare discrimination.
On all days, but especially today, we thank all military members and their families for their service.
Team AOC

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=4&akid=2640%2E2526796%2EN4hIAx) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=5&akid=2640%2E2526796%2EN4hIAx) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=6&akid=2640%2E2526796%2EN4hIAx)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=7&akid=2640%2E2526796%2EN4hIAx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2640%2E2526796%2EN4hIAx)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Today we are announcing them as our first slate of SAP Challenger Candidates running for Congress. These candidates are running in some of the most important races in the country. **Bottom line: if Democrats want to hold the house: these are the races that matter.** Here are our new Challenger endorsees who [**you can support right now:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38541254/315912086/-491556796?refcode=email_20211111_SA_endorsements&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yzk0NzJlYS00MTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c__CdOzGXEwv1yr5vi2hlzqUzqmP2wYXa4S2OtZ8OEo=) **Joseph Rocha (CA-50)**
Joseph joined the Navy on his eighteenth birthday, quickly advancing to become a bomb dog handler, tracking down explosives in the Persian Gulf. After he was discharged under Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell, he became an advocate for repeal, swearing he would re-enlist and keep fighting to protect his country as soon as it would let him. Following the repeal of Don’t Ask Don’t Tell, Joseph kept his word, rising to the rank of a Marine Corps Captain and serving as a JAG, continuing to fight for justice.
**Quaye Quartey (CA-25)**
Quaye Quartey is a first-generation Ghanaian-American, former Naval Commander, and proud husband and father. Quaye served as an intelligence officer in the U.S. Navy, supporting counterterrorism operations on five continents before becoming a military diplomat. After retiring from the Navy, Quaye enrolled in Stanford University's Graduate School of Business, where he earned a Master's degree in Business Management. On January 6th, 2021, as Quaye watched as extremists carried out a Trump-fueled insurrection at our nation’s Capitol, he felt a call to serve his country and his community at home.
**Jay Chen (CA-39)**
Jay Chen is running for Congress in California's 39th Congressional District. The son of Taiwanese immigrants, Jay grew up in the district and attended local public schools, was twice elected the President of the Hacienda-La Puente School Board, and currently serves as the President of the Mt. SAC Board of Trustees. As a Lieutenant Commander in the United States Navy Reserves, Jay has served honorably from the Korean peninsula to the Middle East and is committed to bringing courage, compassion, and respect for our Constitution, back to our Capitol.
**Jonathan Logemann (IL-17)**
Jonathan Logemann is a teacher, Rockford city alderman, and Illinois National Guardsman. Inspired by the example that his parents' set and the impact they had on their small town as educators, he has served students from distressed neighborhoods, served his country in Afghanistan, and served his community by supporting projects that created jobs and improved education in Rockford.
Congressman Seth Moulton, the founder of Serve America, said: _“Jonathan, Quaye, Jay and Joseph have served America honorably in the military. They are exactly the types of leaders Congress needs right now, in an era where members of Congress are making death threats against each other and where a large number have chosen to serve their party rather than the voters. These four leaders will help unite America and end the division that is paralyzing Congress in a moment where the people are desperate for leaders. They’ve led in harder circumstances, and I am proud to support them.”_ [**Will you stand with Seth Moulton and Serve America by making a contribution today to help us support our endorsed candidates running for Congress in 2022?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38541256/315912088/-491556796?refcode=email_20211111_SA_endorsements&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yzk0NzJlYS00MTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c__CdOzGXEwv1yr5vi2hlzqUzqmP2wYXa4S2OtZ8OEo=) To learn more about Serve America’s work and view our full candidate slate, [visit our website here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38541258/315912090/-536114170?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yzk0NzJlYS00MTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c__CdOzGXEwv1yr5vi2hlzqUzqmP2wYXa4S2OtZ8OEo=&emci=288515c4-3e43-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5c9472ea-4143-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=194769). name: Roger Stone
subject: A message from Roger Stone
body:
| |
---
**ROGER STONE**
Ft. Lauderdale, Florida
---
| Dear Friend, **I am worried.** As you know, my wife of 30 years, Nydia Bertran de Espinosa Stone, has been diagnosed with stage four cancer and is waging a brave and remarkable spiritual, medicinal, holistic and homeopathic fight for her life. **It is essential that she utilizes every possible, effective, all-natural cancer therapy and treatments to win this struggle.** Let me be clear, I believe that my wife's shocking cancer diagnosis is based on PTSD and the relentless stress of being smeared, hounded and lynched by the vicious, malicious leftists in Robert Mueller's witch-hunt to destroy the President. I have learned so much at the [TruthAboutCancer.com](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0powkkxaok2o2wkpm&linkid=0&link=532b6ede3e1149bb8548c423f09cef96) which is run by my good friends Charlene and Ty Bollinger and we are utilizing this knowledge now. **Because we do not believe that chemotherapy can kill the cancer stem cell, my wife is utilizing all-natural therapies including Vitamin C and D infusions, certain peptides, specially formulated THC and CBD oil which are designed to fight cancer, B17 therapy, a regimen of different mushrooms, blood oxygenation and certain legal FDA-approved drugs which Big Pharma denies are effective in the treatment of cancer, but which nonetheless have helped my wife immensely in her fight for life.** Needless to say, what is left of our insurance after the Mueller witch-hunt and the financial pressure it put on me and my family, no longer allowed me to pay premiums on some policies that only pay for conventional medical establishment recommended cancer treatments. **Now is the time when it is absolutely essential that my wife ramp up her natural immunity so that she may be healed. The anti-cancer regimen that she is using costs $28,000 a month -- money we do not have for November.** My wife was my rock during the epically corrupt and vicious Mueller witch-hunt which is only now beginning to be more fully exposed as the complete fraud that it was. I lost my home, my car, my savings, most of my insurance and my ability to make a living because I was unconstitutionally gagged by a vicious, partisan deep state judge for over a year. I have always said that as long as I have my wife; I have everything. We want to thank the thousands of people who are praying to God to heal my wife and I am confident that just as he delivered me from my persecutors, giving President Donald Trump the strength and courage to see through the corrupt politically motivated lynching I was subjected to and grant me a full and unconditional pardon that he will restore my wife Nydia to health. **Your contribution to the[Stone Family Fund](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0powkkxaok2o2wkpm&linkid=1&link=a31f675ff8da416282557cee2045edc6) to help support my wife in her fight against cancer at this crucial time is vitally appreciated.**
Sincerely, Roger Stone **PS -** If you are more comfortable mailing a check than utilizing a credit card or PayPal to make a contribution to the [StoneFamilyFund.com](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0powkkxaok2o2wkpm&linkid=2&link=2a8aaf7400a74dbe86523a3db2a87a17), please make your check payable to "**Stone Family Fund** " and mail it to _1007 N Federal Highway #405, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304_. God Bless You.
---

[One-Click Unsubscribe](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/unsubscribe/?sid=00ab0c0powkkxaok2o2wkpm) [Report Spam](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/unsolicited/?sid=00ab0c0powkkxaok2o2wkpm) [Web Version](https://www.directiq13.com/IO/viewer3.aspx?sid=00ab0c0powkkxaok2o2wkpm)
---

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6585%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=tUmBwSaDII%2fx9WC0mw1FiQ&sysid=1)
| | | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67922%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kk56LnXX3OCIizcu8P3YoA&sysid=1)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this - Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67923%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ji2WcAvxHAOK49USIgVSBw&sysid=1)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67935%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y6toWgulK62UGVq6r27%2fKQ&sysid=1)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67936%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2%2bUZ4uQQmD7ehKhS0Ts7rA&sysid=1)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67935%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y6toWgulK62UGVq6r27%2fKQ&sysid=1)

Fellow American - Herschel Walker's far left leaning Democratic opponent in the Georgia Senate race is raising millions of dollars.

Every Democrat donor in the country is sending money to him because they know he's been called the "most vulnerable Senate Democrat."

Take a look at his fundraising numbers, which are the best in the country:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=76082737567e4cc9a789606d52f215a7&_e=V8zT7Jy3DZs3RakWnGpWgQgsfSvPpVl91NpxQfu02tw5ghoPOhKCnGYTcaRjCwhl0HdYy9chfvy5OYs9eKxCKjdvxZpQWCGbX72Od-EueDO9ZgqRkVKRxTW8KFD3MIx6VYKsbXfdgRSnSP5yyLZH9IhDS-p-bEPm83QiEhDBYvePDE1pL4vLSOqjr7L_s1X1QEfleo5cs7Y3h0Ur20aDPG2jDe6htwQxcldZVlWG-8YA83RGXM_Qv3li0G256zJDiIP3mcPLMom_9bzNQtQQmeH6URzSMWpRKF_eaBYgOTDJvTT9dihshmGbNjvTdYgOZrztN-IdZ-13VtonJWNoVU9ZuJmTuIKoBnfJIkqBd0zXpSmMzTefT8b0d7BDBczpPqzvhXoyQzRCCPuYsMRddI7RPKqJ1FNubkTAZcnOPSgrjjdwSYjEgyPMNhfnMgDZ)

subject: Joe Biden Wants to Kill the Oil and Gas Industry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Biden's assault on the Oil and Gas Industry has been relentless, and there seems to be no end in sight. During an interview earlier this year, Saule Omarova, a Joe Biden Treasury Nominee, stated that _"a lot of the small players in the [coal and oil and gas industry] are going to probably go bankrupt in short order, or at least we want them to go bankrupt if we want to tackle climate change." _What Saule Omarova doesn't comment on is the millions of jobs around the country, including in Houston, that will be lost due to their blatant disregard for American families. Gas and electricity prices will also increase tremendously, even more than what we've seen over the past year, further harming millions of hardworking Americans.

It is clear that Joe Biden and his radical allies in Congress will stop at nothing to implement their Green New Deal, even if it hurts the very people he is supposed to represent. This madness has to stop, and the best way of ensuring it does, is by taking back the House in 2022.

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies. And now that trial has
_Sponsored message_
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zekcroc21vl99357t49k0iv15md7g5id4pn3f510_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdjm8ob0cjh2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhg9p7r5sm627b8g34gq5kpl8mlldj75ue6qs4b8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdjm8ob0cjh2bs)**
|

|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhm72c16ftq7dpg4pgn1gts02p9402kjiut04ndg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdjm8ob0cjh2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)

name: =?utf-8?q?Team_D=E2=80=99Arrigo?=
subject: 5 ways to thank our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | Today, we honor the veterans who put their lives on the line to serve this country and defend our sacred, democratic values that we hold so close to our hearts.
We must thank our veterans with solutions that center their success and solve the complex problems they often face. We can:
**End veteran homelessness.**
There are over 40,000 homeless veterans in the U.S. right now. We could end homelessness in the U.S. for $20 billion, which is less than 3% of our proposed 2022 military budget.
**Guarantee veterans access to high-quality healthcare.**
1.53 million veterans are uninsured and 2 million avoid seeking care because of cost. Medicare For All would guarantee every veteran (and American) high-quality healthcare.
**Guarantee veterans a high-quality education.**
Tuition-free public college would allow veterans, their partners and children to receive a college education and lower the barrier for those enlisting in the military to become officers. For just 10% of our 2022 military budget, we could provide tuition-free public college to every American.
**Guarantee veterans a successful civilian transition.**
One of the toughest parts of the transition to civilian life is starting a career. The Green New Deal includes a federal jobs guarantee which, paired with a living wage, helps veterans start their post-service life on the right foot while giving a permanent boost to the economy.
**Honor veterans by working towards peace.**
Defense lobbyists have an outsized influence over our government’s decisions to go to war. We can honor those who served by ending our forever wars and the lobbyist pay-to-play that allows them to continue.
In Congress, Melanie D’Arrigo will fight for these sound policies that truly help our veterans.
**This Veterans Day, offer your gratitude to those who fought for us, but also thank them by fighting for them.**
Thanks for honoring our veterans today and every day.
\-- Team D’Arrigo

clean_body: | | | Today, we honor the veterans who put their lives on the line to serve this country and defend our sacred, democratic values that we hold so close to our hearts. We must thank our veterans with solutions that center their success and solve the complex problems they often face. We can: End veteran homelessness. There are over 40,000 homeless veterans in the U.S. right now. We could end homelessness in the U.S. for $20 billion, which is less than 3% of our proposed 2022 military budget. Guarantee veterans access to high-quality healthcare. 1.53 million veterans are uninsured and 2 million avoid seeking care because of cost. Medicare For All would guarantee every veteran (and American) high-quality healthcare. Guarantee veterans a high-quality education. Tuition-free public college would allow veterans, their partners and children to receive a college education and lower the barrier for those enlisting in the military to become officers. For just 10% of our 2022 military budget, we could provide tuition-free public college to every American. Guarantee veterans a successful civilian transition. One of the toughest parts of the transition to civilian life is starting a career. The Green New Deal includes a federal jobs guarantee which, paired with a living wage, helps veterans start their post-service life on the right foot while giving a permanent boost to the economy. Honor veterans by working towards peace. Defense lobbyists have an outsized influence over our government’s decisions to go to war. We can honor those who served by ending our forever wars and the lobbyist pay-to-play that allows them to continue. In Congress, Melanie D’Arrigo will fight for these sound policies that truly help our veterans. This Veterans Day, offer your gratitude to those who fought for us, but also thank them by fighting for them. Thanks for honoring our veterans today and every day. \-- Team D’Arrigo | is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo | | Sent via . name: Rabine for Governor
subject: 11/11 Newsletter
body:
The Illinois Department of Public Health is signaling there likely will not be an end to the current indoor mask mandates.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_11_newsletter_1&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_11_newsletter_1&n=2) Dear Peter -- The Illinois Department of Public Health is signaling there likely will not be an end to the current indoor mask mandates. We are being told the COVID-19 numbers are just too high. The Governor really, really, really wants to lift the indoor mask mandates, but he just can’t do it right now. These mandates and restrictions have been in effect for nearly two years now. There is no justifiable reason to continue these mandates especially now that so many Illinoisans have been vaccinated. The mandates, of course, are not about public health. They are about control and the Governor is unwilling to give up his newfound power so easily. My approach to governing will be vastly different. I view governing as a public service. My focus will be on empowering working families instead of waging on them as our current Governor is doing. I will be the voice Illinois families need. Stand for working families by standing with me! Join our movement today. Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker. | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_11_newsletter_1&n=3 "Join Team Rabine") [Join Team Rabine](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_11_newsletter_1&n=3)
---
Best Regards,
Gary Rabine

### Turning Point USA’s Charlie Kirk to headline Fundraising Event 11/14
I am pleased to announce Charlie Kirk will be joining me at a rally for freedom on Nov. 14th. I hope you consider attending this exciting event as Charlie Kirk and I talk about the important issues we face nationally and right here in Charlie’s home state of Illinois.
**About this event****:**
* **When:** Sunday,**** November 14th, 2021
* **Where:** Renaissance Schaumburg Convention Center, located at 1551 Thoreau Dr N, Schaumburg, IL 60173

**Additional details:**
* 3:30-5 PM _VIP Meet & Greet, including photo with Charlie_

* 5:00pm - 7:00pm _Charlie, Gary, and additional speakers_

* $500 per person - VIP Meet & Greet + VIP Seating
* $300 per person - VIP Seating
* $150 per person - Standard Seating

**_***Student Discount- $50 off all tickets - APPLY "Students" at checkout_**** _.***_**
