## Illinois Right to Life Action 48th Annual Banquet (11/12)
Illinois Right to Life Action is the legislative arm of Illinois Right to Life. As the state’s go-to organization for pro-life lobbying and information on defeating pro-abortion bills, Illinois Right to Life Action is highly trusted by pro-life political leaders and citizens alike to be their life affirming voice in the Illinois General Assembly.
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=RGUkXI_LnCSi4lDYFZJCAj9cwUDYbefO1DxuYLmEawaVAQDvlbOZY51nZLQgHwj7OaSJ6sFwiiz2e2BiePCC3w&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_11_newsletter_1&n=5 "Event Details Here") [Event Details Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=RGUkXI_LnCSi4lDYFZJCAj9cwUDYbefO1DxuYLmEawaVAQDvlbOZY51nZLQgHwj7OaSJ6sFwiiz2e2BiePCC3w&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_11_newsletter_1&n=5)
---
* * *
##
### Pritzker signs bill taking aim at Right of Conscience Act
The Governor this week signed legislation into law to limit the state’s Right of Conscience Act. I released the following statement on this legislation becoming law.
“The Right of Conscience has long been a part of our nation’s heritage. Going all the way back to the American Revolution, the Colonial Army made allowances for conscientious objectors. The Right of Conscience is engrained in our American heritage and our way of life.
The idea that employers can mandate a vaccine and be protected from lawsuits ought to frighten us all. If we cannot make healthcare decisions for ourselves, what other ways can government limit our freedoms?
Governor Pritzker may not like the choices people make, but he should respect their right to make decisions for themselves. The courts will ultimately decide the legality of this new law, but there is no denying our individual rights and freedoms were dealt a major setback today.
Illinois does not need a despot. The residents of our state need and deserve a Governor who will listen to them and treat them with dignity and respect. Unlike JB Pritzker, I will put the rights and liberties of Illinois citizens first. I will end the war on families, and I will protect the Right of Conscience for all Illinoisans.”
### Rabine Group of Companies joins JCN lawsuit against Biden Administration
Last week, the Rabine Group of Companies joined the Job Creators Network (JCN) lawsuit against the Biden Administration’s vaccine mandate on companies with 100 or more employees.
The [Job Creators Network](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=fuVJOTS7ma5HUWnAwpKOBZButmzrKUIfAm4acu4F5gdoNY-LGuyXQoOaaCdTQNQtSheHnN9NXan11BBqEMyQp-PsdO2UN2hC_810GAluvNZamDdH-1QNhxATtoIE1Tc1xrDbCxzwfosCoSJ_P_Uqd8Cyhuc48cv5oO06H7q-SLLvhjsjKvoj8-cqwlZgZOPrVWVJrXO4LbAdsF6cKvs2MroU9fB8kLecG3z4fYtw9AtEcjNOqDBj9KGTeLlVwSHLjTd1Nv9j8N859xRIKWrIgUfSHqL1eqpM4JeUq5b-bmS30YXq46R30CmjfZB0aGdT7nBmRoI3LF8KWr7zRnm2B_s0eZsJf596pEaF60hMMuYUnVVA65bXAINEu6tqmfBqa8MNQFMQC3aFTsSwa31U5w&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_11_newsletter_1&n=6) (JCN), the nation’s leading small business advocacy organization, today filed a lawsuit in the United States Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit against the Biden Administration to block the implementation of its vaccine mandate on small businesses.
These mandates are an assault on our freedoms and an attack on working people. If we do nothing, these mandates will stand. I cannot sit by and do nothing. We must stand up for our rights as Americans or risk losing our freedom in the name of security.
It is time we all stopped standing on the sidelines and fight to preserve the freedoms guaranteed to us in our Constitution.
Many of our employees have been with us for decades and are like family. They do their jobs efficiently and competently and they do not deserve the fate being handed to them by the Biden Administration. It was OK for our employees to go to work during the worst days of the pandemic, but now they won’t be allowed to go to work unless they get the vaccine? This is an affront to the men and women who went to work every day to keep our country going during the pandemic.
### Downstate visit
This week, I had the privilege of speaking at the Madison County Lincoln Day in Granite City. I talked about my vision for turning Illinois around by lowering taxes, creating jobs, and standing up for Illinois families.
The day after the dinner, I had met with Pastor Barry Simmons of the New Visions World Ministries in Cahokia Heights, IL.
Pastor Simmons is looking for help to mentor and train young people in his community to get good paying jobs and turn away from a life of crime. He is doing some amazing things there, but he needs help. He needs a Governor who will put rhetoric into action. I look forward to working with good people like Pastor Simmons to help them continue to provide services to troubled youth. We can’t let these kids fall through the cracks.
* * *
## [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_11_newsletter_1&n=7)

clean_body: The Illinois Department of Public Health is signaling there likely will not be an end to the current indoor mask mandates. | | | ---|---|--- Dear Peter -- The Illinois Department of Public Health is signaling there likely will not be an end to the current indoor mask mandates. We are being told the COVID-19 numbers are just too high. The Governor really, really, really wants to lift the indoor mask mandates, but he just can’t do it right now. These mandates and restrictions have been in effect for nearly two years now. There is no justifiable reason to continue these mandates especially now that so many Illinoisans have been vaccinated. The mandates, of course, are not about public health. They are about control and the Governor is unwilling to give up his newfound power so easily. My approach to governing will be vastly different. I view governing as a public service. My focus will be on empowering working families instead of waging on them as our current Governor is doing. I will be the voice Illinois families need. Stand for working families by standing with me! Join our movement today. Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker. | "Join Team Rabine" Best Regards, Gary Rabine Turning Point USA’s Charlie Kirk to headline Fundraising Event 11/14 I am pleased to announce Charlie Kirk will be joining me at a rally for freedom on Nov. 14th. I hope you consider attending this exciting event as Charlie Kirk and I talk about the important issues we face nationally and right here in Charlie’s home state of Illinois. About this event: When: Sunday, November 14th, 2021 Where: Renaissance Schaumburg Convention Center, located at 1551 Thoreau Dr N, Schaumburg, IL 60173 Additional details: 3:30-5 PM VIP Meet & Greet, including photo with Charlie 5:00pm - 7:00pm Charlie, Gary, and additional speakers $500 per person - VIP Meet & Greet + VIP Seating $300 per person - VIP Seating $150 per person - Standard Seating *Student Discount- $50 off all tickets - APPLY "Students" at checkout . "RSVP TODAY!" Illinois Right to Life Action 48th Annual Banquet (11/12) Illinois Right to Life Action is the legislative arm of Illinois Right to Life. As the state’s go-to organization for pro-life lobbying and information on defeating pro-abortion bills, Illinois Right to Life Action is highly trusted by pro-life political leaders and citizens alike to be their life affirming voice in the Illinois General Assembly. "Event Details Here" Pritzker signs bill taking aim at Right of Conscience Act The Governor this week signed legislation into law to limit the state’s Right of Conscience Act. I released the following statement on this legislation becoming law. “The Right of Conscience has long been a part of our nation’s heritage. Going all the way back to the American Revolution, the Colonial Army made allowances for conscientious objectors. The Right of Conscience is engrained in our American heritage and our way of life. The idea that employers can mandate a vaccine and be protected from lawsuits ought to frighten us all. If we cannot make healthcare decisions for ourselves, what other ways can government limit our freedoms? Governor Pritzker may not like the choices people make, but he should respect their right to make decisions for themselves. The courts will ultimately decide the legality of this new law, but there is no denying our individual rights and freedoms were dealt a major setback today. Illinois does not need a despot. The residents of our state need and deserve a Governor who will listen to them and treat them with dignity and respect. Unlike JB Pritzker, I will put the rights and liberties of Illinois citizens first. I will end the war on families, and I will protect the Right of Conscience for all Illinoisans.” Rabine Group of Companies joins JCN lawsuit against Biden Administration Last week, the Rabine Group of Companies joined the Job Creators Network (JCN) lawsuit against the Biden Administration’s vaccine mandate on companies with 100 or more employees. The (JCN), the nation’s leading small business advocacy organization, today filed a lawsuit in the United States Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit against the Biden Administration to block the implementation of its vaccine mandate on small businesses. These mandates are an assault on our freedoms and an attack on working people. If we do nothing, these mandates will stand. I cannot sit by and do nothing. We must stand up for our rights as Americans or risk losing our freedom in the name of security. It is time we all stopped standing on the sidelines and fight to preserve the freedoms guaranteed to us in our Constitution. Many of our employees have been with us for decades and are like family. They do their jobs efficiently and competently and they do not deserve the fate being handed to them by the Biden Administration. It was OK for our employees to go to work during the worst days of the pandemic, but now they won’t be allowed to go to work unless they get the vaccine? This is an affront to the men and women who went to work every day to keep our country going during the pandemic. Downstate visit This week, I had the privilege of speaking at the Madison County Lincoln Day in Granite City. I talked about my vision for turning Illinois around by lowering taxes, creating jobs, and standing up for Illinois families. The day after the dinner, I had met with Pastor Barry Simmons of the New Visions World Ministries in Cahokia Heights, IL. Pastor Simmons is looking for help to mentor and train young people in his community to get good paying jobs and turn away from a life of crime. He is doing some amazing things there, but he needs help. He needs a Governor who will put rhetoric into action. I look forward to working with good people like Pastor Simmons to help them continue to provide services to troubled youth. We can’t let these kids fall through the cracks. * | Paid for by Rabine for Governor | PO Box 59183, Schaumburg, IL 60159 A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the Board’s official website (www.elections.il.gov) or for purchase from the State Board of Elections, Springfield, Illinois.

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: The Trump Republicans’ Lessons for Democrats
body:
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ceea8f326f134b0a8ff5f1d71dc2596f&_e=NayHKs4fJBRh9xAdRu757M1GavFEtmf3ajgzYJ8yfFEB4B0Qg8RWqx26ie7KCLTB1fbTeg4W1L54TopmFPFSsDv4BN16jg2aEk7SoCFCD0Pcou0kX-qTHQNeq_k3bvOV42XQKWEBkSO_9OEmDn-E2LdsSGSnSO86ZQ8XVeF9j46AyUkB6QgJE3dHUNZtx-O6OfDrwKOa_rsfCFfoxzMDh_s1LU-M7b6M1ROtbnNDTNt8xYo03xsSV8TWPt_wYJfseHG3JMuCrgcsXFMejSmgFA%3D%3D) The Trump Republicans’ Lessons for Democrats By Bobby Jindal and Alex Castellanos Both parties often mistake voter frustration with the other team for devotion to their own cause. | |
---
Hungry true believers tend to energize political parties, but their habit of putting purity above pragmatism leads to impatience with moderate colleagues. Eventually the young purists cannibalize the majorities they need to govern. As defeat looms, they announce dramatically that it’s their “last chance” to pass historic legislation. They argue that real conservatives or real progressives would accept nothing less.

Republicans have been where the Democrats are headed—with absolute power comes absolute overreach. In 2016, Republicans ran the table, winning control of the presidency, House and Senate. While they had control of Washington, many Republicans refused to accept victories they didn’t consider “conservative enough.” But total control of the federal government apparatus is rare. Republicans should have found a way to compromise on the speed and size, not the direction, of their reforms. Persistence and ideological consistency would have been rewarded over time with big, enduring changes moving the nation in a more conservative direction. Instead, Republicans bickered among themselves and went for big victories that either failed completely or provoked electoral backlashes.
_Read more_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=ceea8f326f134b0a8ff5f1d71dc2596f&_e=NayHKs4fJBRh9xAdRu757Jq2U7HTP6zt_ehDvOS3Ei4MAZlc436j12Cb4seHAoO9RB5J0-d9FN0RE0_2ldisys3Jlq4zPoJCYM6axRP1HtHow5vTFrNinso77xMEQfTONj7C6I9xcyXuLw37d4u96SuKonctEmRcxZN5kT9k2d2bJNjNQp0dJL0wh6Bo7KuyuO5NFsMGyaP102SkBgdGKJ-_XB3CD6sSlb6D3cdgwgONaheaexPtH_aCdZ-vl2xDhk6F6GP_1PDfUbcaJE2komaLzuB2Q6R2OTvwgrN1-hlZViHfKCiFUASH51TAtATTX0kdbbC8RYBZL6cWfrPliJP7DAFE0W3aCobrhB7JEIq9AUAUh6AJ89r2bjf5e46ckjw6jhBOwC7hYEaBWDmaUw%3D%3D)**.

name: Congressman Tony =?iso-8859-1?q?C=E1rdenas?=
subject: This Veteran’s Day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P
body:
Stand with me with a renewed commitment to our service members.

| Happy Veteran’s Day, Peter.

Today, we honor our brave servicemembers who protect our country, advance freedom, and put their lives on the line to keep Americans safe at home.

This Veteran’s Day, we as a country cannot rest on our laurels or deliver empty rhetoric to our veterans and their families.

**Instead, I ask you to stand with me with a renewed commitment to our service members.**

Let today be a reminder that we must prioritize and take action to provide our Veterans and their families with the care and support they deserve upon their return.

**To our Veterans,** I thank you, I salute you, and I commend your bravery. I promise to be your fiercest advocate in Congress.

Thank you again.
_Congressman Tony Cárdenas_
---
| | Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P.O. Box 15320, Washington, DC 20003
www.tonycardenas.com

name: Jim Jordan
subject: This is a political hit job

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
_Sponsored message_
| This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zl615tt5glnh9p2oqlsfst04g32l6r8gg2m8k3co_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdjmaoj2cph2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zn3uq98599290gd0tv9ip7871lsm5pkemge3r440_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdjmaoj2cph2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhdvbb51uso03ebnv1rj5rva1kgmt11hqoainiuo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdjmaoj2cph2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8b6lheg6rh1jseuajjgi8u2l5hi6pdsm8rh4740_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdjmaoj2cph2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0m8ea29ed1n33oio76dd1tnb0a21bqfvirt32q8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cdjmaoj2cph2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

2,600 votes. We could have made up that difference if we had the money,
support, and momentum just a bit earlier in that campaign. But we have a
rematch coming in less than 100 days!

Henry Cuellar is the most conservative Democrat in the U.S. House. He
voted against abortion protections. He voted against a pro-union
organizing bill called the PRO Act. He goes on Fox News to fuel extreme
right-wing rhetoric about immigrant ‘caravans.’ He opposes progressive
policies like Medicare for All and action on climate change because he
takes money from Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Wall Street.

We’re mounting a campaign against him again with Justice Democrat Jessica
Cisneros — a progressive immigration attorney fighting for Medicare for
All and a Green New Deal. If Jessica’s going to win this time, we need
your help right now — more than 400 supporters have stepped up just in the
last week.

When AOC, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman won their primaries, we helped them
hire staff, develop organizing plans, and communications plans. We helped
them build winning campaigns. And that’s what we’re doing for Jessica
right now (and a slate of 4 other progressive primary challengers).

As challengers, AOC, Cori, and Jamaal were all outspent by the corporate
incumbents in the primary. We still won. The thing is, nearly 90% of
Congressional races are won by the candidate who spends more money. It’s
just the reality. We know Cuellar has millions in the bank, and more $ to
come from Exxon, private prison CEOs, and Wall Street. Now is the time we
have to bring in a flood of support to try and close the spending gap with
Cuellar.

We know the donor class and political establishment will do everything it
can to re-elect Henry Cuellar. In 2020, Nancy Pelosi flew to South Texas
to support Cuellar, even though he is AGAINST abortion rights, immigrant
justice, union organizing, and climate action. Corporate Democrats will
always protect corporate Democrats. That’s why we have to mount a campaign
to close the money gap, and ensure Jessica wins this time around.

Can you chip in your
first $3 to Justice Democrats today so we
can help Jessica mount a winning campaign in 2022?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83259?refcode=em20211111-20445&t=1004&akid=20445%2E1203867%2E3KQlES ]→ Yes, I can donate $3 to Justice Democrats today to
fight back against Henry Cuellar, the political establishment, Wall
Street, Big Oil, and Big Pharma.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83259?refcode=em20211111-20445&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=20445%2E1203867%2E3KQlES ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1006&akid=20445%2E1203867%2E3KQlES ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1007&akid=20445%2E1203867%2E3KQlES ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211111-20445-footer&t=1008&refcode2=20445_1203867_3KQlES&akid=20445%2E1203867%2E3KQlES

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=20445%2E1203867%2E3KQlES

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: John Castorani
subject: A Veterans Day Message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
Vet and Virginia Congressional Candidate John Castorani On The Crisis Of LeadershipFor six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=661859e72d3d4f70b8738c552463f3d4&_t=4s9w9Qi3kkDgZd9ci0NQDVQYcO6UR-GFNrilWKEc8sw1T1e7fkvGOWC3GJ5_gish-S84zyInMGITjC5AHEAUrcKRqoDChuVQy66NYMBeTxUlO1LqUDb5SI8UODUFwBv4AUf3fRYycZREmVKxKObQ-VBYgbGptoPK92cZtvXt4Ys%3D) | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=661859e72d3d4f70b8738c552463f3d4&_e=IrM4iQwVxmKdNTfHHC2uTuEDLJVHkVFp0YnrmxO6C5rGjjkTAmGoU4ToKNNw1CxvfbBmcr3EROAFheXtaeemKuixqbHYEwo9qcFLbyKlUeJ9-jXq5flkYr1j5rFZnGmiixBt3r5NMkP4JqamF8LteI1TMQDtKmUmMsNQkYAaLig3PDqJYkXFAD-LhtBBhzzX4gbRmCaZolumOpLauisUV0T3ARvO-w-0QW-C6HQq3_C7d3L-3N-8TGIkp7sK-X5sgBZ7n5pVbos1JmGXv2lBCkJFV2VswPd5vBIIOjx2aj2w8nrbp6gH3B2L6sTRfHyDgtRkNuC-U-h-9e9LeMk3yc-2iKEezajk_0HUQPnjZp3O0uBh45i6xqwgJSdTvPLw5MpO3SyEoGFg982C_UwtUXRHejIGX4rx3x6uee_KtRKP4hwGyC959r25knlQpVdcKG3gzWvD2rgxI7Ul9skvwiLxN0e2N7UKgqVwHEOaHGI%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

From the bottom of our hearts here in the Castorani Family and the John Castorani for Virginia Campaign – we’re want to express our gratitude for all the veterans of our great nation, past and present. If you’re reading this and you’re a veteran, thank you for your service. Myself and my entire campaign staff – along with my family – are working tirelessly around the clock to ensure that one day soon you’ll have another member of Congress who also happens to be a veteran of the United States Armed Forces.

I volunteered to enlist in the Army at the age of 17; I did not do it for the free meals or any form of recognition from the public – I joined our armed forces because I wanted the opportunity to follow in my grandfather’s footsteps; I wanted to join a storied institution -- like millions who came before me-- who have served this nation honorably and safeguarded not only our nation’s freedoms, but the freedoms of so many around the world.

I owe my entire life to this nation, I would not be the man I am today without my service that afforded me the opportunity to meet my beautiful wife, Krissy who is also a veteran.

| [**SEND A VETERAN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY** ›› ](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=661859e72d3d4f70b8738c552463f3d4&_e=IrM4iQwVxmKdNTfHHC2uTuEDLJVHkVFp0YnrmxO6C5rGjjkTAmGoU4ToKNNw1CxvfbBmcr3EROAFheXtaeemKuixqbHYEwo9qcFLbyKlUeJ9-jXq5flkYr1j5rFZnGmiixBt3r5NMkP4JqamF8LteI1TMQDtKmUmMsNQkYAaLig3PDqJYkXFAD-LhtBBhzzX4gbRmCaZolumOpLauisUV0T3ARvO-w-0QW-C6HQq3_C7d3L-3N-8TGIkp7sK-X5sgBZ7n5pVbos1JmGXv2lBCgAK2lcZWXR9A4tqm1lQDo2DULVr2O8bLDaa2nIi_4uAukmSNuGotouYSWDfBsWtShP6P5RqzxlwLPFnTNXXRP5rcdDYWJBx1ncSFJGtffzdqEYoEfIvLBW9JY8INTFTN0syHWvAWbcPdtmhV-TPbnF6ZQezoEZHg5ohfps-zmc7GFniBArmACtbyQ0-AwnydQ1UOqIjbQnRH6IJhT6pWl0%3D)
---

Serving our nation taught me many valuable things, one of those being the first Army Value of “Loyalty” which rings louder than most right now during our nation’s struggles. That first Army value declares in part that you must, “bear true faith and allegiance to the U.S. Constitution”.** In a time where we have the lowest number of Veterans serving in Congress** is it no wonder that we sometimes questions Congress’ allegiance to our Constitution? Through mask and vaccine mandates, the DOJ targeting parents who simply want what’s best for their children and canceling our US pipelines rendering us energy dependent and begging at the feet of OPEC+.

Enough is enough, it’s time we support and elect more battle-tested proven leaders to Congress.

In recent years it’s become increasingly difficult to spot a veteran on Capitol Hill. Did you know that as of today only one in 6 members of Congress are veterans? That’s the lowest number since WW2!

Everyone knows that veterans make the best members of Congress, so**[if you’re reading this and you’re able to make a small donation to my campaign today, please consider doing so right now.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=661859e72d3d4f70b8738c552463f3d4&_e=IrM4iQwVxmKdNTfHHC2uTuEDLJVHkVFp0YnrmxO6C5rGjjkTAmGoU4ToKNNw1CxvfbBmcr3EROAFheXtaeemKuixqbHYEwo9qcFLbyKlUeJ9-jXq5flkYr1j5rFZnGmiixBt3r5NMkP4JqamF8LteI1TMQDtKmUmMsNQkYAaLig3PDqJYkXFAD-LhtBBhzzX4gbRmCaZolumOpLauisUV0T3ARvO-w-0QW-C6HQq3_C7d3L-3N-8TGIkp7sK-X5sgBZ7n5pVbos1JmGXv2lBCui6g9VQjQBn0v7mNFoKEFyTN5Bs78yvjJvUlGzgwFW49cB97ZhI0yG6Z4bu0_oQYO9Kzwew_a4NvwMTsLq7VAYEo3ytPDUKt2588vMyzP34lA_uZW7zyWLPiKOiqhR7wrSaMbXPYSaGOgnRdd8vk_5254ZE1DSjNbuq94uQ536cg79A2xfbkW3W4XQsScwdIMA5heUPz1wNKL2BIr3SCF4%3D)**

[**SEND A VETERAN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY** ›› ](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=661859e72d3d4f70b8738c552463f3d4&_e=IrM4iQwVxmKdNTfHHC2uTuEDLJVHkVFp0YnrmxO6C5rGjjkTAmGoU4ToKNNw1CxvfbBmcr3EROAFheXtaeemKuixqbHYEwo9qcFLbyKlUeJ9-jXq5flkYr1j5rFZnGmiixBt3r5NMkP4JqamF8LteI1TMQDtKmUmMsNQkYAaLig3PDqJYkXFAD-LhtBBhzzX4gbRmCaZolumOpLauisUV0T3ARvO-w-0QW-C6HQq3_C7d3L-3N-8TGIkp7sK-X5sgBZ7n5pVbos1JmGXv2lBCo9PRBFZ8tMRRB0IPGieI8ecLaLT6_WAXTdlCLgIKNAkGTlUMrne0udctk5ohC5153zUUIB2tkAETAKL0hpT8feUG1LX9y-QVRIkBfPkckOIeQ3QgHOjp-HGp0j_HLKo7v8xSq2uGmDuOmt9c5JM8V7WTtSxqau9-4MaY42RebXoaz2bFtudM_xB17uFs7B5BsigfceX-PpRPRXGiyanN2g%3D)
---

If you know a veteran – give them thanks today and always, remember their sacrifices and their dedication to our country; it’s truly a debt we will never be able to repay.

Very Respectfully,
John Castorani

[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=661859e72d3d4f70b8738c552463f3d4&_e=IrM4iQwVxmKdNTfHHC2uTuEDLJVHkVFp0YnrmxO6C5rGjjkTAmGoU4ToKNNw1CxvfbBmcr3EROAFheXtaeemKuixqbHYEwo9qcFLbyKlUeJ9-jXq5flkYr1j5rFZnGmiixBt3r5NMkP4JqamF8LteI1TMQDtKmUmMsNQkYAaLig3PDqJYkXFAD-LhtBBhzzX4gbRmCaZolumOpLauisUV0T3ARvO-w-0QW-C6HQq3_C7d3L-3N-8TGIkp7sK-X5sgBZ7n5pVbos1JmGXv2lBCr_FgPGW9K-HtZiMY4ZWG_3v1uvl_qQSnQtgx8sEIRXgPXkLkx8LckD3tnWKI2vCkel3TBCH6AAfeseOQG5ihpkwKIz0AjGh4jKd983FUxnpL71Mpz_qwMRTPLjy9BT49OnLNqjIughvVzbdQWxuUTFnmhaaod_68rBJY5gJdrweQcSk8G9xejJ0LYMr9uc47R7jwG9KtTGTj9B1HGZ3rbE%3D)

[**DONATE TODAY** ›› ](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=661859e72d3d4f70b8738c552463f3d4&_e=IrM4iQwVxmKdNTfHHC2uTuEDLJVHkVFp0YnrmxO6C5rGjjkTAmGoU4ToKNNw1CxvfbBmcr3EROAFheXtaeemKuixqbHYEwo9qcFLbyKlUeJ9-jXq5flkYr1j5rFZnGmiixBt3r5NMkP4JqamF8LteI1TMQDtKmUmMsNQkYAaLig3PDqJYkXFAD-LhtBBhzzX4gbRmCaZolumOpLauisUV0T3ARvO-w-0QW-C6HQq3_C7d3L-3N-8TGIkp7sK-X5sgBZ7n5pVbos1JmGXv2lBCvDAmrrl2c3c_ikj7-uIfplM_y_trXy3bND_GMb1IsfCcJyM7f5JARxUJWYY0CG1WHDyuZL6YPASegSoPIi2J8-5tqJEw2I_oiypUhMFLAfRpFk6cKwenrMkOFfPLT-5SqPcQhJRBXsr3C3SaXCl57F2aNS86cgGDRassWjD6zMmJq6zDwEZDMXAL_lA-4r-Ju4kRoT4Hm6U7Tp7ZnjAgoo%3D)

ORANGE, VA 22960

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9bab30bd72644e57929480a1ca83a930&_e=RgH5dwdHHvlUTcXPJYGznmTXPuQbe3zfIQJw1q5KpLJBDd48K0gYZGqVX4SK-6HrK6kCl34nz-vlI45lD4wIe2z0wnBB30uEtJIlKs-AkkVG1g-8MlOjAfEfnhufke_Oynw-TJyfOPRcxe7Sn3BTPq1Q-qI-LSg__VhkxIlIZVczz5ZoZ2NSw1pt-3g3JE1ntUUHoqJO0hZauoocr1G_ciOrm8uWM5YVIffR4R0rShKxnl3-bY0Yxxz17jtlfPL-gBZ2LIQtb0xw3x6EUb6Pb25936A3Na8DYv9z83awuCJjmcqWDuihaZCgZZWoVfADT5ZwA9sLHarlynjB4cuYkBjXbxOjZX-qLGMDOdw0UcfiX4n5JgJBf0NKZku3GUZY)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9bab30bd72644e57929480a1ca83a930&_e=RgH5dwdHHvlUTcXPJYGznmTXPuQbe3zfIQJw1q5KpLJBDd48K0gYZGqVX4SK-6HrK6kCl34nz-vlI45lD4wIe2z0wnBB30uEtJIlKs-AkkVG1g-8MlOjAfEfnhufke_Oynw-TJyfOPRcxe7Sn3BTPqqxJgyT-NZlrmi-tEqrbEOSzrgvl1OLAMrNIcE9fIgNkaIopDxskTF9Wh-WxJKAH0aTwdYjUICVCICcPTrcGDBjcGjL4-B8jFVsX3zXoTS5537cqavFvQh2fvGGKkNkF3pByX-zV0Lkird1JIUuvjg-WYlPeEiLzNoQQ_V4QtgksDYNQCsM8u-meUKJpdeLJRSjQFzFwpvfVpB-Hymem2N44UCC_i3eQD5UsCkLD35q)**

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9bab30bd72644e57929480a1ca83a930&_e=RgH5dwdHHvlUTcXPJYGznmTXPuQbe3zfIQJw1q5KpLJBDd48K0gYZGqVX4SK-6HrK6kCl34nz-vlI45lD4wIe2z0wnBB30uEtJIlKs-AkkVG1g-8MlOjAfEfnhufke_Oynw-TJyfOPRcxe7Sn3BTPo7wSSTrubuqY4NS9J3JPOEqsE9pPo71HZJ5s3Fqb_50-Y5SF54BmXUkmERXo-iuLOF0skpNR6WGuqtgaes4k_t_iKdoc6L3zoDFUzp8m8IRTzNc3cbfKPQhYbQU3ayfCt-YOxCBoayP4axu5VsJ_c5XAiBTR8rQWOu51W4ljIU8HGF9ljM4zcCvAcAjW4GQx9pyZtFgYA5znqQx1pyRlvoVCzp2xn95W4eNISeVwi_j)**

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job. I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic. Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down. No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built. Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by: Forcing critical race theory into our schools. Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts. Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY. That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that ** You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country. I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people! For Liberty, Jim | | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: Happy Veterans Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtmEfGB8YWhzh1TFdE2u9VNW6_nhjN6OUqrqYagiS3GlgYjswIrhkhVsvLgUqsvkoO8qk-74Osv-M7qE-Ov8QIZ8x6b6m4p_I2dqHDZWNkh1mGT4glIg3WhN4719-zVL5GyDQ32JyyEzuEXBAamwCob4xFkyw8zHeUDA5wTqR4aUuKW8l6fixh4IwtZFK8auUpqcZgoWXJp4cdSO5kRLXreX6civQWeHlQN-zzdnoGynbgP5p_uDk7YcoFVFVzV-CpWoh-iivTzdU7jL2qyVQPb5B-wROJb6LR5lW27I37gwpPziEUve2qYu2xazSmwBaNU_ykMEyR2CMPMxzuokYNtvKB2NPjvNmV3mv_OeDMaEI13dzpUVmqj1PgRbjO89xU/3gx/iGS3qxe8SyKcWeUopa-lYw/h0/YjyrfTcS7nAs80ie7K002d1GyKsyknUk54Cw3-5bXjc) Folks — Today, our nation honors military service members and veterans for their commitment and service to our country. To all of you who are serving or have served our great country, thank you for everything you’ve done. Nevada is home to over 200,000 veterans representing every branch of the military — this is a statistic that makes me enormously proud. For individuals who served in World War II to those who served during peacetime, we’re enormously grateful for your service as you represent what makes our state so great. Coupled with our gratitude today is the commitment to doing everything we can to ensure that our veterans can live a dignified life after their service to the military. This includes access to affordable health care, mental health services, job security, and a smooth reentry into civilian life. To me, it’s simple: ensuring a quality life for our veterans is a small repayment for the sacrifice they made in serving our country. That’s exactly what I’ll continue to fight for as Governor. Let’s take today to express our thanks to the veterans in our lives. Without them, Nevada — and the country as a whole — would not be as secure as they are today. With immense gratitude, Steve Sisolak

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Bittersweet Veteran’s Day
body:
Nineteen million Americans are veterans of our Armed Forces.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/NFh4ESA8HMImIFBltgt7wg/ziPxE89yeFw0Z0GJlUbQKw)
Patriot,

Nineteen million Americans are veterans of our Armed Forces.

We owe them everything.

And while today is the day that we honor our veterans, we need to be doing more to protect them along with active duty and reserve personnel from the woke mob that controls the Biden Regime.

Just the other day, our newest ship was christened for the U.S. Navy.

It was named after gay rights activist Harvey Milk. While Milk was a Navy veteran himself, he was discharged from the service under “other than honorable” conditions.

At the ship’s christening, a transexual navy veteran, Paula Neira, smashed a bottle of champagne on the bow of the ship.

The entire display, from the ship’s naming, to its launch wasn’t to honor our nation’s heroes. It was to appease a small subset of American culture to increase the “wokeness” of the United States Navy.

And this doesn’t just end with the Navy. Biden’s Regime is working to dishonor all branches of our Armed Services by infecting them with the cancer known as “wokeness.”

That dishonors our veterans and all of our service members.

Patriot, we have to do better.

We have to elect leaders who respect our members of the military, rather than those who diminish the character and fighting spirit of our service men and women.

I’m one of those leaders, and [**I ask for your support today**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Q6gH892tRGkPyUeaNNoFMn7g/ziPxE89yeFw0Z0GJlUbQKw), so that I can continue to honor our veterans the way they deserve to be honored when I get to Congress.

Thanks so much for your time.

Happy Veterans Day,

Laura Loomer

P.S. If you or a family member served in our Armed Forces, thank you so much for your sacrifice! America owes you an eternal debt of gratitude.

clean_body: Nineteen million Americans are veterans of our Armed Forces. | | | Patriot, Nineteen million Americans are veterans of our Armed Forces. We owe them everything. And while today is the day that we honor our veterans, we need to be doing more to protect them along with active duty and reserve personnel from the woke mob that controls the Biden Regime. Just the other day, our newest ship was christened for the U.S. Navy. It was named after gay rights activist Harvey Milk. While Milk was a Navy veteran himself, he was discharged from the service under “other than honorable” conditions. At the ship’s christening, a transexual navy veteran, Paula Neira, smashed a bottle of champagne on the bow of the ship. The entire display, from the ship’s naming, to its launch wasn’t to honor our nation’s heroes. It was to appease a small subset of American culture to increase the “wokeness” of the United States Navy. And this doesn’t just end with the Navy. Biden’s Regime is working to dishonor all branches of our Armed Services by infecting them with the cancer known as “wokeness.” That dishonors our veterans and all of our service members. Patriot, we have to do better. We have to elect leaders who respect our members of the military, rather than those who diminish the character and fighting spirit of our service men and women. I’m one of those leaders, and , so that I can continue to honor our veterans the way they deserve to be honored when I get to Congress. Thanks so much for your time. Happy Veterans Day, Laura Loomer P.S. If you or a family member served in our Armed Forces, thank you so much for your sacrifice! America owes you an eternal debt of gratitude. body:
Glorifying violence against a co-worker should be a fireable offense.

| This week, Paul Gosar tweeted a horrifying video of him KILLING Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38543311/315940759/180241529?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjkxM2MwOC01NjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7M6CC1PLtyyHg-bCBjHgCqCV5zrAZPkcBNhke0tZJA4=&emci=40791b38-6e42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2f913c08-5643-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=29183203)
| [EXPEL GOSAR ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38543312/315940760/180241529?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjkxM2MwOC01NjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7M6CC1PLtyyHg-bCBjHgCqCV5zrAZPkcBNhke0tZJA4=&emci=40791b38-6e42-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2f913c08-5643-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=29183203)

Hello Patriot -
Nearly 300,000 illegal immigrants were released by the U.S. Border Patrol over the past year. 300,000! That's an entire city's worth of people.
**Around 100,000 were released with only a piece of paper telling them to report to a local ICE office. They aren't being tracked at all!**
This has to end. The Biden Administration must stop releasing illegal immigrants into the interior of our country.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Fraud Uncovered: 25,000 dead on voter rolls
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Audit Michigan |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b801f17618&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
While I am enraged at the never-ending stories of voter fraud arising around the nation, [I am nonetheless proud that I have been central to launching this nation-wide movement for Election Integrity! ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=dc85d82a61&e=44b8c466b0)

**Patriots around the country are looking, and finding, more evidence of voter fraud. All eyes need to be open and we need to stay on high-alert!**

Look at what just happened in Michigan.

Just Wednesday, a lawsuit was filed against the Michigan Secretary of State revealed more that more than 25,000 dead Americans were left on the voter rolls!

**This was discovered after cross referencing voter rolls with commercially available databases. Tens of thousands of names were left on the books post-mortem.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8c11147486&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Moreover, the Public Interest Legal Foundation, the plaintiff’s law firm, uncovered that there were at least 334 registered to vote _after they had died_._

**There’s a reason we have laws, folks. Simple laws, when broken, can have disastrous consequences.**

The National Voter Registration Act of 1993 clearly states:

_“Conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove the names [of deceased voters]._

We are far beyond the times where some things just don’t need to be said. _This was said, was broken, and now we have President Biden._

**This lawsuit represents an important strike against the thieves who stole the 2020 election and an important milestone for the Election Integrity movement.**

_The Federalist_ reports:

_In its 20-page complaint, the PILF detailed efforts it had made beginning in the run-up to the 2020 election to ensure Michigan voter rolls did not include deceased individuals. After obtaining data from the state in early 2020 and then hiring a data analysis expert who cross-checked the data against commercial databases and information obtained from the Social Security Administration, the PILF determined the current Michigan rolls included approximately tens of thousands of individuals who appeared deceased._

_After providing that information to the Michigan secretary of state, the PILF re-ran the data at several junctions to determine if Benson had addressed the problem, but 94 percent of the individuals identified remain on the official rolls. Yet when the PILF sought to inspect the state’s records under the provisions of the National Voter Registration Act, Michigan’s secretary of state refused them access._

_Further investigation by the PILF revealed evidence indicating 334 individuals had registered to vote after their deaths. “Without further inquiry,” the nonprofit’s claim says, “there is no way to know for certain whether these post-death registrations are the result of identity theft, data input error, or for some other reasons.”_

**While it is necessary that this lawsuit bear fruit to bring to justice those who have wronged American Democracy, it is by no means sufficient.**

My plan as the Conservative, pro-Trump, Election Integrity candidate for Secretary of State of Arizona is to not only hunt down and investigate past fraud, but to prevent future fraud.

**This is why there are two critical pieces of my campaign.**
1. **We MUST Audit Pima county. There is substantial evidence of fraud in Arizona’s second largest county, and we cannot allow this crime to remain uninvestigated. _Help us Audit Pima!_**
2. **We MUST secure future elections.** **I have pioneered and developed in conjunction with third party developers a highly secure, currency grade, authentication process for ballots. This will guarantee that future elections are secure. [_Join my Arizona Ballot Integrity Project!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bcf79a9b35&e=44b8c466b0)**

---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b3df21238e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Through this two pronged approach of punishing past crimes against American Democracy and taking every measure possible to lock down and protect future elections, this will make Arizona the safest state in the Union for American elections.

**I have been a businessman and a process engineer, and I know that it is not enough to identify the problem. We must bring a solution. And that is what I am doing in my campaign for Arizona Secretary of State.**

[**Can you help me make Arizona the safest place in America for Democracy?**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4d8b8e0200&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cb12a030dd&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6119dc6b30&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ef0c342a2f&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=6832522081) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=6832522081).
---

body:
The official Congressional map is here — and our district can potentially lean Democratic. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynpQyDRB3rJEZeQn0LFIXVsTjN42yK5GrRjm5AvG6QvALNns54omIkVZX5qaM9k_Zeknz9SEL0-HtW0f6KkFpzoS-_mi8OjlHbHGZj8gV3xgq3VK2sKBlqoC0X-MxNhPVlAiq2e42LxEiNFYxXr7S1PWh-rn2d1qo44HSasBRxqH528PZg4e-rOXX6MpbUYh1Awt1syWGbY5OYzirzx1TmSe8sxai4FJhCDEsNotrfeVmjWh_4VOTRn6YwEr6WRZFNUf7E0mn-JeFd0orpAN51nHi9G-CD0tmMBBEok-m2rbFRglC0PYJduSCDpNsth066cg4eM_RMJ_nRTViIl2Mrm1VJMWdAaN42fxM3RLhf97eVkCB6AW77bk8WBEO_XnGybwhe9vzXUpJ2yz8QKUHotvkDw1IYVgccUFPdifobiA/3gx/_SoPOQ7kTMadbVLDi50Fzw/h0/TPCxGVL1c04vR-T5zOq2rMm6BlWJhf8EiXuUDU6XDLA) Friend,

The new Congressional map for Montana is here, and I am thrilled about this opportunity.

I am the only candidate in the Democratic primary race for this seat that’s won a +11 Trump district within Western Montana that is similar to the makeup of our new district — and this version of the district will officially be a competitive 50-50 toss-up that can lean Democratic if we activate the right voters.

Now that the map is solidified, it’s game time. We need to send a message that progressives are picking up steam in Montana. We’re already halfway toward our goal of raising $5,000 in the first two weeks of the campaign. Will you help us reach and exceed that goal?

**_[Contribute $3 before November 17 to join us and help reach our $5,000 grassroots launch goal. We can do this.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynpQyDRB3rJEZeQn0LFIXVsTjN42yK5GrRjm5AvG6QvALNns54omIkVZX5qaM9k_akAc_DF_npJMWznWfWTqL5mmR0rqvrZrtVn0qpxcwQZAR2RztQEd83zIzZIrjwLSd_0yxikxC1RAwAvbnCOALMqZO-O-H5LzVX0xQggObP4J17rtXlx4pLz_tkjxNcCBCsrKI8nYE3nE1QCeD9N4UL1Er3dRpZIAYgT6A9y3Z9mndsxe6wiOHICguPc1856kdnpPyC-c1SX8eMSrKAAZbYz68l3TF6wKJWCLfYKmDXTJLYePXMJRy_69RluOXEW_rpKqDynCL0cJQ9OZbP_kQztJLtytGj3YO1VTvx9OBg4BviY9CRu20umksRKg9N0aIZ36N4GSlbWNV9uxrb7OFRHwImoPnGWtDWcOj_YMr5rg/3gx/_SoPOQ7kTMadbVLDi50Fzw/h1/aPHSq6oGd3enU0zBhizPyqk4uG9l17YvrGrpDIXgBBg)_** | [ CONTRIBUTE >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynpQyDRB3rJEZeQn0LFIXVsTjN42yK5GrRjm5AvG6QvALNns54omIkVZX5qaM9k_akAc_DF_npJMWznWfWTqL5PmH0WOcTQcW_kzLn9TViI7o5B2yc9pFrwUeOT6iBVF3fILu14FX7QgF-N9NjBqjP0ytvPwCsZcHNT60wVfrlR6x8X9-BwJJA-cOWNKojrHxMkC74d5txZbxuHYQC_6dWpDMLy4QV8rbPibuKbjAE6LL9aermgdLM49c5BIcXEcIbESrLfX_7WYnfFvH7jbbUJy9GrTSq6MqfPZNFbRmpd7hTFCND9UBsxdG94ePAhqXVvvonTp-fnzbcKVXcyzbG5Ghwjlzh1fBsBQV5v1AmyX_-DLb7gwEWVriE2JshFBkh3eIxiMl2L8v7nSdo7dKnBdWiNNDGZc-UmUGTQfhuMA/3gx/_SoPOQ7kTMadbVLDi50Fzw/h2/QMzACaHlKE_yLgqUEcuAG40jsp0QfsxEXJplVGygUOU)

This new map places Bozeman and the Blackfeet Nation in our new Congressional district but keeps Helena in the East, which presents a unique challenge for Montana Democrats.

But it also creates a unique opportunity. These are places I know. These are places where I recognize the people, and I know so many who are just as frustrated as I am that the Montana working people built is under attack. These are places where life has become more precarious — and where we can make life better.

I know we can do this — but only if we work together, starting right now as we get this campaign off the ground.

**_[We won’t have a second chance to get this campaign off the ground. Will you contribute $3 to Winter for Montana today to help reach our goal before the deadline?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ynpQyDRB3rJEZeQn0LFIXVsTjN42yK5GrRjm5AvG6QvALNns54omIkVZX5qaM9k_akAc_DF_npJMWznWfWTqL5drLBY0PnS3ejVX47DDxfYw_qY3l34CrqkDxYLrOakCGkco3Htu74QsukoGInuYz9MxW-PsSk0SaG4xwPwRevZfRN8yQUMJyDezek-EtDGoQkWAj534-SjRAc7YUcbMJJ1rAawG8dmBLHXRMu1Bu0AvXmGp_CT5cT47Vom80xB3U9QcSIIX5GStFJl0osSnA-yUKwlhMPma7dvYT_6f5YBHUDM5sorIrw8iB6EYMA5QSLpsXymWXUwS7pa-EjlgIVz3kKYyHMY1QvOpswp5FsTlFuFaOTrA-9wUVqz8Dwzeq8u-7hChKjkRR7Z3UdeVSSTxL1wE8h1n1RYAqtjfVK0g/3gx/_SoPOQ7kTMadbVLDi50Fzw/h3/AazEfWA_LwjEzolM4D60gnyTov7i6ujkiKCRwPVi8QU)_**

From the Rocky Mountain Front to Bozeman’s breweries, I’m excited to fight for the working Montanans who have made our part of the state the beautiful place that it is today.

I’ll see you on the campaign trail,

Tom

Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good. | | | "Generic Button" I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request: "Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap." I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. "BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we’ll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. | | Friends,

We are thrilled to announce the official opening of our campaign headquarters, and we would like YOU to join us in celebrating! I personally would like to invite you to our campaign office launch party scheduled for next weekend, November 20th from 4:00 PM -7:00 PM.

Kelvin and I will be there, and we would love to meet you. Kelvin is excited to personally shake your hand, and share all that our team is doing to defeat Raphael Warnock, take back the Senate, and #WinforAmerica. Check out the details below, and feel free to contact our team with any questions.

Hope to see you there!

With the Utmost Respect,
Janelle King

**> >> BREAKING: YOUTUBE CENSORS REP. ISSA <<<**
Fellow Conservative,

Hours after posting a video declaring Pres. Trump's Operation Warp Speed superior to Russia's vaccine program, **YouTube and Google took down my video with zero explanation or warning!**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ee6ef7f6ed544de3819aa9e90157017e&_e=nAvRE_Ur3eKccnRaZrDkHyEROpIqy7wc4JkRqCu0T5V2UGO49_KY_h2ZF8_K_horz4zZ4AW-8glDQ0JkjQDFsXrb2s2kbTeD72znn4TOxW8Rizy7lcnYR6-3xDXcfya2w4m-Yy0PvNAavWeXExuXmSJJj_Mz9SiPXkGxi_g0gUmlBygLeWRlExC2TGPo9LTATxB7T0sQ51_vz8Bu40WIEf_UOdJV2bk_Re1y8kkk3iJKAeEHYUiJZIwY3q7iLrJz79sNdLvRWq6zWLbRuXxF-j6BmF7OIZTDUo1yhG90hAbO85GQ370NUkF8JrzeltYRYobwyYlHyKIdgZZyYSBMgE-dAVRdubLmmL0SRg2Wp2g-Al-FpgL8N9XSgRipmz1ujE7R0sF7XACnsBF6l7UvTM2WdlvQSGZT8ms-0l9aiYE%3D)

**EXCERPTS FROM REMARKS OF PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP**

_**ON THE COMING RED WAVE** _
* I stand before you this evening to say that if we do our jobs, and if we stick together, then exactly one year from today, we are going to be watching a massive RED WAVE sweep across this country—and we are going to be celebrating the election of the largest House Republican Majority in AMERICAN HISTORY!

* What we saw last week was just the beginning—in Virginia, New Jersey, Seattle, and very importantly, Ohio with the Election of Mike Carey to Congress last week.

* Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the entire Radical Democrat Party are headed for a political meltdown of unprecedented proportions. If Republicans can stick together, we can beat them in deep blue cities and states, and we can beat them ANYWHERE—but we must stay UNIFIED. If we are united, we will end Nancy Pelosi’s political career once and for all.

_**ON THE FUTURE OF THE REPUBLICAN PARTY** _
* To save our country, the Republican Party must be the party that fights fiercely for the ECONOMIC interests of American Workers—the party that speaks boldly for the SOCIAL interests of American Families—and the party that stands proudly for the CULTURAL values of God-fearing American Patriots.

* Some call this American populism, some call it National Conservatism, I call it putting AMERICA FIRST. But whatever you call it, it is here to stay—and it is not just the BEST way to win, it is the ONLY way to win.

* The old Republican Party is gone FOREVER. The days of fighting endless wars, supporting nation-building, loose immigration policies, idiotic trade deals, and surrendering our culture to left-wing arsonists are OVER—and they are not coming back!

* We are now the Working People’s party. We will be tough on crime, strong on borders, strong on trade, proud of our heritage, and proud of our American values. We will defend our citizens’ jobs and wages. We will protect our people’s homes and communities. And we will defeat the Woke Zealots trying to destroy our country.

* Here is the critical lesson for the Republican Party: In the face of this dangerously extreme, incompetent, and disdainful political opposition, we should not concede the Radical Democrats a SINGLE VOTER. Their party has declared war on police, war on energy, war on jobs, war on work, war on parents’ rights, war on women’s sports, war on borders, war on the Second Amendment, war on free speech, war on American Culture, and even war on Thomas Jefferson, George Washington, Abraham Lincoln, Old Glory, and the National Anthem.

* So do not listen to ANYONE who tells you that the REPUBLICAN Party needs to be “less divisive”—let’s be clear, it is the Radical Left Marxists and Socialists who are DIVISIVE, and it is by DEFEATING their intolerance and aggression that we will UNITE America.

* The Democrat Party is a house of cards ready to come toppling down.

_**ON THE REPUBLICAN AGENDA** _
* But to win the landslide victory that is within our reach, it is not enough just to make the argument. The People don’t just want to see us WIN power, they want to see us USE power.

* At the first possible chance, the Republican Party should END Joe Biden’s border crisis. It’s very simple: until they end catch-and-release, stop asylum fraud, restore Remain in Mexico, allow ICE and Border Patrol to do their jobs, and finish the wall which could take one month, not a SINGLE Biden political appointee at the White House or the Department of Homeland Security should get paid. NO BORDER, NO PAYCHECK.

* The opportunities for a new House Republican Majority will be truly endless:

* You should pass a plan to make China pay trillions of dollars for unleashing the virus.
* You should pass new tariffs on foreign trade abusers to re-shore our supply chains.
* You should insist that children be taught that biological sex is determined at birth—there are Men, and there are Women.
* You should cut off all Justice Department grants to local DA’s who refuse to prosecute shoplifters and other criminals, but are willing to spend millions and millions of dollars to prosecute Republicans who happen to be leading monumentally in the polls.
* Just as I did in my executive order last year, you should ban Critical Race Theory.
* You should save America’s Suburbs from Biden’s CRT-inspired housing agenda.
* You should force the Interior Department to build the National Garden of American Heroes that I announced in my speech at Mount Rushmore—it was going to Tennessee.
* You should stop all federal taxpayer dollars from going to Big Tech Monopolies.
* I congratulate Kevin on his announcement that the House GOP will be introducing a Parents’ Bill of Rights. I hope it includes a right for any parent to OPT OUT of the indoctrination and send their child to the public, private, charter, or faith-based school of their CHOICE.

* These are the kinds of bold ideas House Republicans should RUN on and WIN on.
* But none of it will matter if we do not do one thing: pass a comprehensive election security overhaul that includes nationwide photo ID, chain of custody protection, signature verification, citizenship confirmation, and importantly, ensuring that every election can be fully and quickly AUDITED. And especially, if you could get it, same day voting. One day, you vote, and the election’s over. We have to make elections UN-RIGGABLE.
* Remember, we are not the ones trying to undermine American Democracy—we are the ones trying to SAVE American Democracy.

* We are not a fifty-fifty country. With their policies of open borders, defund the police, destroy the Second Amendment, no energy independence, no voter ID, high taxes, and rampant crime, there are FAR more of us than there are of them. They’re just great at rigging, cheating, and stealing elections.

* Our movement did not start the culture war—but we are going to WIN it.

_**ON THE DEMOCRAT’S INSANE SPENDING BILL** _
* NEVER before has a political majority in Congress shown such contempt for the citizens they serve.

* The bill includes MASS AMNESTY for millions of illegal aliens. In addition, the bill is ECONOMIC SUICIDE for our manufacturing base, shipping all our jobs to China by massively boosting taxes on manufacturers and punishing businesses that bring jobs back to America. It includes a global minimum tax that makes it impossible for us to outcompete other counties.

* And the bill is also loaded with toxic Critical Race Theory provisions—they use a different term, “equity,” but it’s the same Marxist ideology, and they want to spend billions of dollars imposing it everywhere they can.

* This bill will make America weak, poor, divided, and unsafe. We have to get out there EVERY SINGLE DAY and fight it—and the more we fight it, the more seats we will win in 2022. So until that vote, there is only one goal: we must KILL THE BILL, which will set the stage for a political earthquake next year.

* The bill will reduce the incomes of 80 percent of Americans, cost an estimated $4.5 trillion dollars, and fuel more inflation.

* The new and ridiculously large Democrat bill gives illegals welfare and government benefits, and free child tax credits. Trump November 11th, 2021 The great people of Serbia and Kosovo have overcome tremendous obstacles in their pursuit of economic normalization. The agreements my administration brokered are historic and should not be abandoned, many lives are at stake. The region is too important and the people have waited too long for this work to be cast aside. Today, my Envoy Ambassador Ric Grenell visited the Kosovo-Serbia border to highlight this important agreement. Just like we proved in the Middle East with the Abraham Accords, peace and economic normalization is possible, but it takes a sincere effort and unwavering leadership. Peace is possible, don’t give up—long term prosperity for those two nations is at stake! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump November 11th, 2021 | ---|--- Donald J. Trump November 10th, 2021 “If we do our jobs and stick together, one year from today we are going to be watching a massive red wave sweep across our entire country and we are going to be celebrating the election of the largest house republican majority in American history.” “The democratic party is a house of cards ready to come tumbling down.” EXCERPTS FROM REMARKS OF PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP ON THE COMING RED WAVE I stand before you this evening to say that if we do our jobs, and if we stick together, then exactly one year from today, we are going to be watching a massive RED WAVE sweep across this country—and we are going to be celebrating the election of the largest House Republican Majority in AMERICAN HISTORY! What we saw last week was just the beginning—in Virginia, New Jersey, Seattle, and very importantly, Ohio with the Election of Mike Carey to Congress last week. Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the entire Radical Democrat Party are headed for a political meltdown of unprecedented proportions. If Republicans can stick together, we can beat them in deep blue cities and states, and we can beat them ANYWHERE—but we must stay UNIFIED. If we are united, we will end Nancy Pelosi’s political career once and for all. ON THE FUTURE OF THE REPUBLICAN PARTY To save our country, the Republican Party must be the party that fights fiercely for the ECONOMIC interests of American Workers—the party that speaks boldly for the SOCIAL interests of American Families—and the party that stands proudly for the CULTURAL values of God-fearing American Patriots. Some call this American populism, some call it National Conservatism, I call it putting AMERICA FIRST. But whatever you call it, it is here to stay—and it is not just the BEST way to win, it is the ONLY way to win. The old Republican Party is gone FOREVER. The days of fighting endless wars, supporting nation-building, loose immigration policies, idiotic trade deals, and surrendering our culture to left-wing arsonists are OVER—and they are not coming back! We are now the Working People’s party. We will be tough on crime, strong on borders, strong on trade, proud of our heritage, and proud of our American values. We will defend our citizens’ jobs and wages. We will protect our people’s homes and communities. And we will defeat the Woke Zealots trying to destroy our country. Here is the critical lesson for the Republican Party: In the face of this dangerously extreme, incompetent, and disdainful political opposition, we should not concede the Radical Democrats a SINGLE VOTER. Their party has declared war on police, war on energy, war on jobs, war on work, war on parents’ rights, war on women’s sports, war on borders, war on the Second Amendment, war on free speech, war on American Culture, and even war on Thomas Jefferson, George Washington, Abraham Lincoln, Old Glory, and the National Anthem. So do not listen to ANYONE who tells you that the REPUBLICAN Party needs to be “less divisive”—let’s be clear, it is the Radical Left Marxists and Socialists who are DIVISIVE, and it is by DEFEATING their intolerance and aggression that we will UNITE America. The Democrat Party is a house of cards ready to come toppling down. ON THE REPUBLICAN AGENDA But to win the landslide victory that is within our reach, it is not enough just to make the argument. The People don’t just want to see us WIN power, they want to see us USE power. At the first possible chance, the Republican Party should END Joe Biden’s border crisis. It’s very simple: until they end catch-and-release, stop asylum fraud, restore Remain in Mexico, allow ICE and Border Patrol to do their jobs, and finish the wall which could take one month, not a SINGLE Biden political appointee at the White House or the Department of Homeland Security should get paid. NO BORDER, NO PAYCHECK. The opportunities for a new House Republican Majority will be truly endless: You should pass a plan to make China pay trillions of dollars for unleashing the virus. You should pass new tariffs on foreign trade abusers to re-shore our supply chains. You should insist that children be taught that biological sex is determined at birth—there are Men, and there are Women. You should cut off all Justice Department grants to local DA’s who refuse to prosecute shoplifters and other criminals, but are willing to spend millions and millions of dollars to prosecute Republicans who happen to be leading monumentally in the polls. Just as I did in my executive order last year, you should ban Critical Race Theory. You should save America’s Suburbs from Biden’s CRT-inspired housing agenda. You should force the Interior Department to build the National Garden of American Heroes that I announced in my speech at Mount Rushmore—it was going to Tennessee. You should stop all federal taxpayer dollars from going to Big Tech Monopolies. I congratulate Kevin on his announcement that the House GOP will be introducing a Parents’ Bill of Rights. I hope it includes a right for any parent to OPT OUT of the indoctrination and send their child to the public, private, charter, or faith-based school of their CHOICE. These are the kinds of bold ideas House Republicans should RUN on and WIN on. But none of it will matter if we do not do one thing: pass a comprehensive election security overhaul that includes nationwide photo ID, chain of custody protection, signature verification, citizenship confirmation, and importantly, ensuring that every election can be fully and quickly AUDITED. And especially, if you could get it, same day voting. One day, you vote, and the election’s over. We have to make elections UN-RIGGABLE. Remember, we are not the ones trying to undermine American Democracy—we are the ones trying to SAVE American Democracy. We are not a fifty-fifty country. With their policies of open borders, defund the police, destroy the Second Amendment, no energy independence, no voter ID, high taxes, and rampant crime, there are FAR more of us than there are of them. They’re just great at rigging, cheating, and stealing elections. Our movement did not start the culture war—but we are going to WIN it. ON THE DEMOCRAT’S INSANE SPENDING BILL NEVER before has a political majority in Congress shown such contempt for the citizens they serve. The bill includes MASS AMNESTY for millions of illegal aliens. In addition, the bill is ECONOMIC SUICIDE for our manufacturing base, shipping all our jobs to China by massively boosting taxes on manufacturers and punishing businesses that bring jobs back to America. It includes a global minimum tax that makes it impossible for us to outcompete other counties. And the bill is also loaded with toxic Critical Race Theory provisions—they use a different term, “equity,” but it’s the same Marxist ideology, and they want to spend billions of dollars imposing it everywhere they can. This bill will make America weak, poor, divided, and unsafe. We have to get out there EVERY SINGLE DAY and fight it—and the more we fight it, the more seats we will win in 2022. So until that vote, there is only one goal: we must KILL THE BILL, which will set the stage for a political earthquake next year. The bill will reduce the incomes of 80 percent of Americans, cost an estimated $4.5 trillion dollars, and fuel more inflation. The new and ridiculously large Democrat bill gives illegals welfare and government benefits, and free child tax credits. It eliminates caps on Green Cards, allows unlimited chain migration, and grants unlimited numbers of foreign nationals the ability to PURCHASE permanent U.S. residency for just $2,500. It allows the Big Tech giants to replace qualified Americans with cheap foreign workers. It issues diversity visas SPECIFICALLY to the people who were rejected by our Travel Ban because they came from the most dangerous places on earth. It’s the most pro-China bill ever put forward. It will crush retirees and Middle-Class Americans with new taxes on their pensions and retirement accounts. It includes $80 billion dollars to DOUBLE the size of the IRS, with 87,000 new IRS agents to attack you and your family. In the midst of an energy and inflation crisis, the bill raises taxes on American Energy. The bill forces states to use taxpayer-funds to subsidize abortion. * And it spends billions of dollars on illegal racial discrimination. | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. Folks,

When I served this country in the Navy, I took an oath to protect America against enemies both foreign and domestic, and right now, some of the gravest dangers to our democracy are sitting in Congress.

**Two of the worst offenders are Madison Cawthorn and Kevin McCarthy.[This Veterans Day, can you split a donation between my campaign and Madison Cawthorn's opponent two help us take down these two insurrectionist caucus members?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x3bcR-QxFodqqxhtuTBAOJ2W-1u_sOoy0tdScI-1Nv7nj6CAfHWAT-RkEnLlDcKI3Nc_M3fBLfpSnV8wVd9HpGkILR5sx4Md_LCDuFcge4mLYSu1239hSAcFzBoz2le7dPc4SLBlLuJeV6D2z_cTG1yBaMaFhZEDEKg-cgq-u7t7NJ1fEQnN63mYTbEthaPZPjcf6cfE7dBF6PagDSoM5OpBNAEgnqxR7XHitz-tTOLVn9AyrBp31ynTv2TCMsElVxryHu474fb2jp6SyiqiiozyTXFKVnp16j1Is3nOa1ZH5VwVc4J3aWzsD9RrSiyzZEyyC2v3hb0zusuiKeWJj-GMR8Wu2TpkjQn2fA7eAdghbMZE61ox1XmqGSEwi_c3u2GPtoYHpQgq_AqbN7ZMGAIVtzHtpeUfUAqrQ3Eknmwb6hGjlUai1ENgaE-RqCwFdGhGSTL2mTLvoLM5bgSnKlzC7Im7dH7mN49e2C97_K1A/3gx/aDARJxx2SNy8kvoZLHvadQ/h1/Z9XAa44VDIPrf6mR0anepjXGK3v0pKWux9lnOBwwAZw)** [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x3bcR-QxFodqqxhtuTBAOJ2W-1u_sOoy0tdScI-1Nv7nj6CAfHWAT-RkEnLlDcKI3Nc_M3fBLfpSnV8wVd9HpGkILR5sx4Md_LCDuFcge4mBSmfh5j9YWXiiJ7yUn34v-FEDbAhnb79-UvGkzTk0FH5i8wiiOAuzyWZt83il5VbJUKiM6NKdDxMKSGjPIWLOqQwCiBEQc-NqfgDdxtSKt4xFouBU1pwIpD1u3fu2HtXJNzgCk3zTPLpSYoP-9ABIIkI2ODeNG_Zrck42BxYThE8MC7o24JnKXZzu-FjZ_KUXpj_r6Wgz5c9ahv1mJnsSM-vXLCMQrqATvlk8D7gLOlvHX0RftYDrBoyRj-T-NbDtdnwv8s6RMsguWK1lSN419dFt2UzxoOWq05B7LFhDnPix4eENCxIF9UOSEND4cyS-zswGpgiakzfngnNChR_kVnyEKNpWpx3Kr-TmTu46ZOFypOZs36WKpvDb-1Ugk_dVvs6NBUE5pA11bf_fqWBcQ/3gx/aDARJxx2SNy8kvoZLHvadQ/h2/NGi04iLYdQdB4eVMKSUkFCXzmY1kUQU7h_ChY3r27Ik) Madison Cawthorn is proof that the next generation of GOP leaders is going to be just as bad -- if not worse -- than what we already have, and Kevin McCarthy... don’t get me started about Kevin McCarthy.

These two talk about service, but they don’t know what it means to serve. **They’re more worried about keeping in the good graces of Donald Trump to actually get something done to help our Veterans.**

10 years ago, Kevin McCarthy promised the veterans of this district that he would build a new VA clinic. **_Has he delivered on that promise? NO._**

Veterans deserve better than having to drive hours to enter a hospital. When I’m Congress, I will advocate for a VA hospital, not just a clinic.

**[We need more Veterans in Congress, so this Veterans Day, can you help two service members unseat far-right Republicans who have repeatedly broken their oath of office?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x3bcR-QxFodqqxhtuTBAOJ2W-1u_sOoy0tdScI-1Nv7nj6CAfHWAT-RkEnLlDcKI3Nc_M3fBLfpSnV8wVd9HpGkILR5sx4Md_LCDuFcge4mCns5bxjWhdlEIp-3xk1U_0oxIbPkTv6Kfr-WUiaUZ18PovnDD8AWyyO4vVITrbmKFgX8LwxFdToHGUJDi92VxUP2MyO8y7W_r10R8L0bltRcC-2ZY6g_zFQZQV2mz16YixnVQTPVmKmemXArcusTN6m96jbdNsUeJUM8kTxWW9WivNUPaNrSuW7Mhr7Q0B88bFE4-q4lHG1AdZcdbLOloKe07bhrMz0lDFagBopTq4zSPPOjA9zHzTwwd30dvfxYB3pLDJsT7KMT7QhlCTCfy02kHJxueSMJ6w4f2yUBSlOCv1KmtqwcddGTYnfrH9Y2JGKEEp6XiYm47WZnqmMrQrOA0rxVu3CuiZdGdsTJ8nLHO3ysx7mgTik5WEGdQoePA/3gx/aDARJxx2SNy8kvoZLHvadQ/h3/AX3TIufPhPcv9pmCUeSGHQB2jysgGMi31_mkrNMsyR0)** clean_body: I’m not the only veteran running against a pro-insurrection Republican | | | Folks, When I served this country in the Navy, I took an oath to protect America against enemies both foreign and domestic, and right now, some of the gravest dangers to our democracy are sitting in Congress. Two of the worst offenders are Madison Cawthorn and Kevin McCarthy. Madison Cawthorn is proof that the next generation of GOP leaders is going to be just as bad -- if not worse -- than what we already have, and Kevin McCarthy... don’t get me started about Kevin McCarthy. These two talk about service, but they don’t know what it means to serve. They’re more worried about keeping in the good graces of Donald Trump to actually get something done to help our Veterans. 10 years ago, Kevin McCarthy promised the veterans of this district that he would build a new VA clinic. Has he delivered on that promise? NO. Veterans deserve better than having to drive hours to enter a hospital. When I’m Congress, I will advocate for a VA hospital, not just a clinic. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. Over and out, Bruno Amato | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

name: Jack Ballard
subject: A very important day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA
body:
Dear , I’m writing to you to wish you a happy Veterans Day! I hope you’ll join me today and everyday | | | [](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=f221a3c0c94d42fa8b03fa91dada2360&_e=q1P9DsEIHMkMi1hqctkJ1CwE4yISAZD_7MfxB4ojiFh5jrShk1Rw76xy80bbicLzifGBTHiyHcWrte3esKKavm0kyTQwXAv5dO0lpT_uSFjrP2Lpzq12YlP7kUmoQQ-GDF1pp6m3uMbdvfILMnl6JL5LmaTow2Vl6NS_KYXcc3MREb8eaOBQJIz8zBghh8Vc39cFCHtIdnCxCJ6cvFR1vFqMuJy_Kdx8FxSnlg65JoCR-7TPtejGkBvefifTZVUjx5Vdzvlgf9OhhBrRyRwhjHOjnzWfOshKF4xlr6bAxMYgsIEMpwwzc_w2DmEpR8HfE77QqIVQ5LP1pQDSTaQJTD-VFL0fq0XKt4mI0MUPuWxYmx25MxIuK6HkggN3lcVuPeca_BWuCavN_i6bJkWdIg3B_DO-YrlCj-gHt77BMOOh-9JLdjU43fBb16PBCy1poaDvG_yhIWrpfkUs_H2sijU1M6vo9Isqt5e5YZ02wZU%3D) Dear I’m writing to you to wish you a Happy Veterans Day! I hope you’ll join me today and every day in recognizing and honoring the many Veterans from Montana and across the United States who gave so much in service to our nation. I know firsthand the pride that Veterans take in serving their country. Both my father and uncle were combat-wounded World War Two Veterans who, when they were called, stepped up to defend our country and our freedoms. A friend and supporter of mine is a Marine Veteran who served in Afghanistan. While picking up a cord of firewood from him a couple of weeks ago, he showed me a memorial he crafted to commemorate the lives of the 13 U. S. Servicemembers who were killed in the suicide bomb attack while evacuating American citizens and military personnel from Afghanistan earlier this year. The memorial has the fallen soldiers’ names, the boots my buddy wore while he served overseas, and a rifle he carved from wood. His memorial is an inspiring testimony to the bonds forged between military folks who serve our country, and the debt of gratitude we owe to all of them.

So to all of our Veterans and their families, Happy Veterans Day! _\-- Jack_ Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and MT-01 in Washington D.C. **[CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=f221a3c0c94d42fa8b03fa91dada2360&_e=q1P9DsEIHMkMi1hqctkJ1CwE4yISAZD_7MfxB4ojiFh5jrShk1Rw76xy80bbicLzifGBTHiyHcWrte3esKKavm0kyTQwXAv5dO0lpT_uSFjrP2Lpzq12YlP7kUmoQQ-GDF1pp6m3uMbdvfILMnl6JL5LmaTow2Vl6NS_KYXcc3MREb8eaOBQJIz8zBghh8Vc39cFCHtIdnCxCJ6cvFR1vFqMuJy_Kdx8FxSnlg65JoCR-7TPtejGkBvefifTZVUj6ysmIsMkr5unuiHdriq0S_1K3KuYsTx9zSd_uuzMJGHmna1xbyaJ_x1PSnTmkAxJy59Y_h4z9l41WpL4LHjHtV0K6tKBanebk7t5PKsKp9O82_fiJbgrgqRQqR5ehsreUB06KhYHJcHvAd8vGzHxX7v8vfk_7AG7QJIaYr-TXGOs4lj2E24xE_MdYaOolPsZVEmVcCcP0km-z0hj21o5vqRbjAch_CS5qepOHjR5i1oJ3hHT8FY-EKnmxbEFnSDk)**** ** PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.
** **
---

name: Erika Benfield
subject: Thank you for your service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erika Benfield for Congress
body:
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=a061853d44fe4b7ea31062c572ee5faf&_e=5Ob-Ka996bxMPAXNh4m1DxrvOW_LJQwDAUo4Y_RiYP0DSQ_ZUPlqi0ah6ujaIKBPMYMkAimPp2S0DFwYVW4z3TYDQvrQlfcW2CwJ_GclfU16PZZcPHwG0oytT0NukZ6ZIN_vq3cFYp92OiNayx4ZU4SzOlKWMs1bL-jExF6kDjRqvRdqGDyZEG7vpkNwJ7XSx7tijTShMOioLDcGcOJJz7tBCi_KHnTMgTuuYYz7f0rA29HVpXfVCarrqe3TZ_e5RMADWCEHpePehxxMFyy0w5OBcfXk6qAV-BoIKkYiBpU%3D) Hi friend, I want to send a personal **THANK YOU** to our brave veterans today. There are no words that adequately express our gratitude for your sacrifice. **As Floridians, we feel the call to serve our country.** Our state has the third highest population of veterans of any state.
Our veterans embody the brave spirit and patriotic values that make America the greatest nation on earth, but this spirit comes with sacrifice. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=a061853d44fe4b7ea31062c572ee5faf&_e=5Ob-Ka996bxMPAXNh4m1DxrvOW_LJQwDAUo4Y_RiYP0DSQ_ZUPlqi0ah6ujaIKBP1KfVhPvvWGPyG0NjEz-8MfaO3jc3ld7Y407BZN7_PqWc7nezZW3QpqKIUU4S2m2ylQvG9UdN9AXpDDkGzVe5JKmzIdoC5IEkzNh34M2tNNqczuJhUdzH8bfFPC6pIU0MG8kU_drADEeCpXHrByBUFi9CeV4Nj1ZJPLeMeWJrvqceTMmUmzlV_Nu5x0KKqopt2mdnmfzo8J2qOPvq9qtFX_X8T5f27Wvq1JUoKzeYNxs%3D) Today I honor our great veterans and everything that you sacrificed to keep us safe here at home. _Thank you for your service,_ **Erika Benfield** _Candidate for Congress (FL-07)_ | | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=a061853d44fe4b7ea31062c572ee5faf&_e=5Ob-Ka996bxMPAXNh4m1D6ZDoh6pasndfPNI7AjWIzQTFcnBqf4YEwQQ5ZiQ0jBSFwSSK47cKHyEmtFjYAwiStAMiiBVTCWZHOIYlUGzI0gSXeGUrG7LlI8s13unQcSTF2quYVjxAv46Qu4wr8FdHdFS-BLEMX7SH7FREenvy_tazrjCEN4hKIdCn8hRLV2m2mvZQQdVY7Z9DnfwdqBM4qJZgSMKzxxeT0PwS6fxyjqV93Gs2HFx4rEccifH_SRkp4MoKVFdk_MoK9w0y2UZU2Sgx1UNKNGVa6JHwp4aiqE%3D) | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=a061853d44fe4b7ea31062c572ee5faf&_e=5Ob-Ka996bxMPAXNh4m1D9Pvqg2yuLobH3yNjLkoJz0WamlYqzg-Zwc_7CZMQ25Csm65oMkEX9iFSdLDIJUPQ7oPqLkLno75lbQFwITJ-4OMgomJj8LSnUJmAIQJh4EaDOYJOEyd4XulWigOdsO2Uwk6U1k7mfdXjxsqvs2zVlddCMpfjEAj9Kckz9cExPO4FeuTt-0K0f0jfY2rwN4gn1Z2EAn-uXn9wc2g_7JUgbVczFMU9sqmNwqFItaychn7XBKeYj24v6ZGqn_DPViRtA%3D%3D) | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=a061853d44fe4b7ea31062c572ee5faf&_e=5Ob-Ka996bxMPAXNh4m1DxrvOW_LJQwDAUo4Y_RiYP0DSQ_ZUPlqi0ah6ujaIKBPvUv2H68J8eMsfvDQvRkos1zO7HRt6PA6PBwdVA1FxtFeEW393qthCqeqyPvYU_PTMa8LynwoJDGlRs1xtXvaIqTGfc6hs7zPP4z3OFZT8oOtg5-AGae-9c-wozjXMUvVPJEWjMe42JHcfHpAj9FeHQLoQE6GGtMUeTgGLO-XOuzp2nTr0-kgJTUrOEZsQh0ly2ruoVpjydyqTrvCUCPVM29ObXoX09fAZH01_2m6v54%3D)
