name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Beverly Young Endorses Amanda Makki on Veterans Day
body:
Beverly Young is the widow of the late Congressman Bill Young | | | |
---
| | |
# Beverly Young, the widow of Congressman Bill Young, endorses Amanda Makki on Veterans Day
---
|
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=a1f95b84de&e=c2296cffff)
---
|
---
|
---
| [Join Beverly in Showing Your Support for Amanda](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=b81b3a2438&e=c2296cffff "Join Beverly in Showing Your Support for Amanda")
---
| Hi Friend,

First, on Veterans Day, we want to honor all those who have served.

Beverly Young, a champion and advocate for decades for our veterans in Pinellas County, announced on Veterans Day that she is endorsing Amanda Makki for the seat her late husband, Congressman Bill Young, held for more than 40 years.

**“Amanda Makki is an advocate for veterans and Pinellas County residents and she will restore this seat to the days of my husband, Congressman Bill Young, who spent his life advocating for this beautiful place we call home,”** **said Beverly Young.**

If you have attended Amanda's events then you have probably met Beverly or heard her speak. She is passionate about CD 13 for obvious reasons but she is just as passionate to help Amanda win it for conservatives.

**“After staying out of politics for the last eight years, I can’t sit on the sidelines anymore," said Young. "Especially after I saw the terrible campaign Luna ran last year and lost this seat for Republicans when we picked up seats all across Florida. We need to win and Amanda Makki has the energy, dedication, and perseverance to take back CD 13.”**

Beverly Young and Amanda Makki had the privilege of wishing 165 soldiers from the 53rd Infantry Brigade Combat Team in Pinellas Park well as they deployed for a year in Ukraine last week.

Amanda thanked Beverly Young for her support.

**“Beverly Young, like her late husband, is a fierce advocate for veterans and her words of wisdom and experience have helped shape my understanding of veterans’ needs in Pinellas County,” said Makki. “Beverly Young is a leader in Pinellas County who has dedicated herself to serving the people here and honoring the memory of the late Congressman Young. I am thrilled to have her support and I value her voice of experience.”**

Want to learn more about Amanda? Click the links below!
* [Where Amanda Stands on the Issues](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=a42cebeeed&e=c2296cffff)

* [Amanda In the News](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=693f0aa1d7&e=c2296cffff)
* [Press Releases](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=d48239bcd7&e=c2296cffff)
* [Amanda In the Communit](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=4d32bd10c5&e=c2296cffff)

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ee105963ab794bee9099636e1ef76437&_e=7mRYgbIrbxKOOOY3lbCtNAX0_nrNCXnrwlO7lvhkGpL3FvkXruffcSkpTuaJ94ibIBTBgFZbz0gV5jzHcGnr--BkGoO43RbpwHuWz60mx3H6wq9I9VZNqYfk3yJRSCIYCp_JYn6lg_L2Sz6LVSxsBLE45ciATgNTtLjuS6e8IYjLQsCU-aKV-SH-fQeZWEaIcWZkwqp7UuabtKdkGLsQIZssxx0N-dUyvRvfp5TTDcXMMVoogGjgOTL674sag2jQ_Hr5EiHlg2U-OKNkCOJ_zCtaPrTABNLR64g565StGevPeuEwKwYkmfQBBA1gXBI4u7czegot4ZYdQUVfwb1k3ymkZFIb0fzH1RrMfdlR2_KD-NRV0xL3ce791PSqKILK)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ee105963ab794bee9099636e1ef76437&_e=7mRYgbIrbxKOOOY3lbCtNAX0_nrNCXnrwlO7lvhkGpL3FvkXruffcSkpTuaJ94ibIBTBgFZbz0gV5jzHcGnr--BkGoO43RbpwHuWz60mx3H6wq9I9VZNqYfk3yJRSCIYCp_JYn6lg_L2Sz6LVSxsBHieewAM2qs_iICewOH_HYD_uJIleGlMdPIUNRuBWsZSLXyvYDBZUw1F-7H1tr-S3_OBp5mlZtYqeCX9tou7zW1lTx33AVZQcRHNb6uInqlMXnrMCCySvEtqeXJn6ms5QQBg2ikfGPHAS3GiFcf0bJ71H9jos8rr8jKESLdC7LQwpr-x1knOtYy35tFfgOaLqycK-8Mjxmg6luja0wDCu4Qiij9bnRNWI3rqbW9WfpZz)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Veterans Day thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
Here's what's on my mind | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2f8605e0f88e/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-5311490?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=162cc7eb8c&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friends, Over the weekend I had the opportunity to attend the Major Brent Taylor Foundation Fundraiser Gala. The money raised at this event will be put to use with the Foundation's scholarship and leadership programs. Major Taylor's legacy cannot be understated, and honoring him was the perfect way to begin this week of Veteran's Day.
---
|
---
| Service has always been important in my family. My father, Alvin Price, served in the Air National Guard.
---
|
---
| My father-in-law, LaVell Edwards, began his football career on an ROTC scholarship and later served in the Korean war.
---
|
---
| My fifth great-grandfather Jacob Spitler, was a soldier in the Revolutionary War. He was a farmer who tool up arms to create and defend the new nation. And my grandfather Don Wagstaff was killed in the line of duty and honored at the Fallen Officers Memorial at the Utah State Capitol.
---
|
---
| On this Veterans Day, I am immensely proud of those who serve in the armed forces and make sacrifices each day to ensure we are safe and can enjoy life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
---
|
---
| I am also proud of the work I have done to honor and support those actively serving and our veterans. I cosponsored legislation that required a college or university within the state system of higher education to award credit for certain military service training and experience. I removed barriers to education for veterans by removing the 12-month deadline to prove eligibility to be considered a resident for in-state tuition. I also worked to improve the health of our veterans by encouraging the United States Department of Veterans Affairs to prioritize Utah for the construction of an additional veterans' nursing home. And I believe there is still work to do to honor our local military heroes. Lawmakers must build alliances within the defense community to ensure programs that support military communities remain robust. We need to create and foster educational opportunities to improve the workforce needed to maintain high-tech, in-demand, jobs surrounding the Hill Airforce Base. And we need to support and incentivize businesses in the defense community to expand capacity and capabilities to better prepare for the demands of our future security goals. I am anxious to continue honoring and supporting our active-duty military and veterans as your next senator.
---
|
---
|
# Contact Me
---
|
---
| I want to know the stories that are on your mind. I believe that the only way to truly represent you right is to know you first, so reach out! You can follow me on [Twitter](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=5744727981&e=10c1db3257), [Facebook](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=dff5c3b026&e=10c1db3257), and [Instagram](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=e4a82841ba&e=10c1db3257) where my DMs are always open, and you can email me becky@beckyforutah.com.
---

🇺🇸Thank you to all who served this great nation | | | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=b4931f48a4&e=1050d051da)

| | | Patriot,

Today is Veterans Day, so we wanted to take a minute to say _**Thank You to all who have served.**_

[Will you join us by signing our Veterans Day card?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=54aee108cb&e=1050d051da)

The heroes who fight to preserve our rights are **the best among us** , and today we celebrate them.
---
| [Help Us Tell Our Veterans Thank You](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d0fb328909&e=1050d051da "Help Us Tell Our Veterans Thank You")

| To everyone who has served and the families who stood alongside them, **thank you for your bravery, sacrifice, and dedication** to preserving what makes this nation special.

_**We owe it all to you.**_

| Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

The 2021 Election Year has now wrapped up with historic triumphs for America First candidates endorsed by **President Donald J. Trump** like Virginia Governor-Elect Glenn Youngkin -- _a certain sign of the momentum building against the Biden Democrats’ disastrous and arrogant rule._

[](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=545f5f94962d4a4ba263b96418e246e3&_e=UJoc8I8VVQuMfy91NDHBdvSl9rn941_s8URFxWZ3Jn9O3gmJUmLobADcT2tzv3fqa8RnoKL9b6TNSXNWG3TrsKbHeWy6DqrEu02UGSJ2-MtXtHASGBNBqSvMYq5WJRgXzSk3nuu_eQTKxFINzM8MrRmiJWH4QVB2IFZjIJsTQFuQiuOQarmgiYRexkduKZG534H4n8__WnYp1DL3kYQ8RG8aNcnFktjF-h1JiktFh1Rjar_LX7TJhdvHnyRXrSgdaFSre8uosS_A4e02QXlTgEyvX5x7BBSO3SFcQ_FSq9zVUio_fUIi3__USiodUOnwkcRfSlv_XjOFIDgTAmSwQ48ruVeJhQsn4J0lVWTlckUpkb7PEySPi3H03WsD-eS_15OOehjXjOJBfV1XLYvW_w%3D%3D)
Now that we have less than a year until the decisive 2022 Midterm Elections, Great America PAC is ready to carry that momentum over as we begin to focus our tremendous capabilities into electing more patriotic, America First candidates,Peter.

[**That’s why I’m contacting you today,**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=545f5f94962d4a4ba263b96418e246e3&_e=UJoc8I8VVQuMfy91NDHBdvSl9rn941_s8URFxWZ3Jn9O3gmJUmLobADcT2tzv3fqa8RnoKL9b6TNSXNWG3TrsKbHeWy6DqrEu02UGSJ2-MtXtHASGBNBqSvMYq5WJRgXzSk3nuu_eQTKxFINzM8MrRmiJWH4QVB2IFZjIJsTQFvmXz3l4TY6STmCxVEoioDpe7o4d9-lukWDoSse94VnIkaJEkaCetLpaHqaAzO_rQnsCupEXQwSseKLVpU2nGp9DXzjR4_Ogq4q9CjlQeRbNrznHK6F4U42QnQrsH5_0CceonzQkXqD7BEYxBkZzBSFzKR0_f6iKppGmXqvJLYXXQl_jeoVa5LbnaJVEPY1pzL0TKkVisVVIGqK4ymWFN5TxDISyBxSN_ZGyaWsXi5thw%3D%3D) Peter -- to tell you about the first of our Great America PAC endorsed candidates for the U.S. Senate: Adam Laxalt of Nevada!

I’ve personally known Adam and his family for many years, and I can tell you he’s exactly the kind of conservative leader we need in the Senate.

A former Attorney General of the Silver State, a U.S. Navy Officer who served in Iraq, a husband and father, Adam Laxalt has already received the endorsement of **President Donald J. Trump as well!** [**Adam’s grandfather, the late Senator Paul Laxalt, was Ronald Reagan’s best friend, closest ally in the Senate, and was Chairman of all of President Reagan’s Presidential campaigns. I had the privilege of working closely with Paul when I managed the President’s re-election campaign and when I was the President’s Chief Political Advisor in the White House. I have watched Adam grow up and develop into the outstanding leader that he has become.**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=545f5f94962d4a4ba263b96418e246e3&_e=UJoc8I8VVQuMfy91NDHBdvSl9rn941_s8URFxWZ3Jn9O3gmJUmLobADcT2tzv3fqa8RnoKL9b6TNSXNWG3TrsKbHeWy6DqrEu02UGSJ2-MtXtHASGBNBqSvMYq5WJRgXzSk3nuu_eQTKxFINzM8MrRmiJWH4QVB2IFZjIJsTQFs6uNd8wy2OPS01dGMSPld9FZPJAloijZdAB9L9eDAApgoJ3nDbmFBpFwc8_pyVk3ZpIRdlxsmubTKZH60uECoc4J38FAjuEAh0n2MUPfVXteY_-1A0We-RwCHGDhFH7agI-4A6d0GsXId_Qb9z3VYjD_BGWI5iVsUB3BcycMA7l2rTRtwhnUoMyivR_1GkmKbMwN5kwE_iAV6QzQsgnYRH5WX7jD3NJENLRFn4fA0aLQ%3D%3D)

Peter, Adam is exactly the right candidate to defeat leftist Democrat Senator Catherine Cortez Masto and help recapture a crucial Republican Senate Majority -- [**and he deserves the support of every commonsense conservative!**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=545f5f94962d4a4ba263b96418e246e3&_e=UJoc8I8VVQuMfy91NDHBdvSl9rn941_s8URFxWZ3Jn9O3gmJUmLobADcT2tzv3fqa8RnoKL9b6TNSXNWG3TrsKbHeWy6DqrEu02UGSJ2-MtXtHASGBNBqSvMYq5WJRgXzSk3nuu_eQTKxFINzM8MrRmiJWH4QVB2IFZjIJsTQFsUhzIb0J0JkHJCuBR8Jf7SL-_6H421E6Qw6iRGkjKxGZ_x9RjaaocyBPckYYPYodONsQJn3WcFcsA8kYvb2gtPw15cAlc2TUV-JsdykCn6tRvsepxFbGUa-iLcX0fQJlSw3CQJTB1JYPasZR1QvRo_--6NClAI7BgfKH5-BNhfFHr_N4vj0q2bEjV-fWwZy3z7W8bRpPOmowBoR0rZK4PKZzfojKCBEILuiwRhEDyA-w%3D%3D)

[**Will you join Great America PAC with your own endorsement of Adam Laxalt’s pivotal Nevada campaign today,**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=545f5f94962d4a4ba263b96418e246e3&_e=UJoc8I8VVQuMfy91NDHBdvSl9rn941_s8URFxWZ3Jn9O3gmJUmLobADcT2tzv3fqa8RnoKL9b6TNSXNWG3TrsKbHeWy6DqrEu02UGSJ2-MtXtHASGBNBqSvMYq5WJRgXzSk3nuu_eQTKxFINzM8MrRmiJWH4QVB2IFZjIJsTQFtSirgMM-gvkfdZ6Ndqn33u4gcyVBkamafTH5XZU-FAp65ufc35jlIGUCafddb3Vmds-xS4LIc80k9QAKn-X4y5rsGLx-nww8YUWet1-Mk9dDGpvdya590lJFgOW2YNpmDHbmsL4L5R-Ppl6ylDBsx70xu5w7Y1cFtPmcfI0MVr7WDni9VzDD6T0_U4z0Qx0dKSbBLVa0Ce7UNWjd5VYYu6zWeUes4PIp54x7DkhsA7RA%3D%3D)Peter? _He’s not yet getting the national exposure he needs and we’re working to change that._

Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e95689358d0445e380386ff1dbad8dd4&_e=oqNV0xHk3rPFdD9nsc8WaA9MojTrJ7U775_Lmd0joBJ7VP4YLu_oXN3VUaDstQx8eHYPIbVZXiuFg7GWmqPiiJh3ptcIMj6Dc64tjs2fJ5oX1IV4ay8mhV3nQh7WuUWBh_XWqz5uYJ6xF6oQmvq_dRHJ1mvlsMmj_Gj536sUv7wPuPsmKrtIaduvmpOT0mC0w4arXT6SAPSTwNih22w5ctLO2GHlQ8PaDMnKqkIT5sc6YNZxACF3LlMB6JuvI9gG3TXlqjCJkVUuE6OL_LWx60MYouCN2nOuSYeatZ-k_mot-VZXtNcgZf0EIXMmq1hxnGysjfBf968kLo5PK6I_tnmYX2IaEydKkJuVx2Bex_x2H9pOWUVwFoE-6XHxpqwrrUyti3022hCn3Uz-nyAg40HnE4opTLOOTK709WmqBEVprbBvGWVpVdRXO0TrLoEB1lr6PJJXiO_aiYviAgJr1E29OL9naV0bKqpwtA1ypm3JkjKgdr_90wy98MuSfvma)

Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e95689358d0445e380386ff1dbad8dd4&_e=oqNV0xHk3rPFdD9nsc8WaA9MojTrJ7U775_Lmd0joBJ7VP4YLu_oXN3VUaDstQx8eHYPIbVZXiuFg7GWmqPiiJh3ptcIMj6Dc64tjs2fJ5oX1IV4ay8mhV3nQh7WuUWBh_XWqz5uYJ6xF6oQmvq_dRHJ1mvlsMmj_Gj536sUv7wPuPsmKrtIaduvmpOT0mC0w4arXT6SAPSTwNih22w5ctLO2GHlQ8PaDMnKqkIT5sc6YNZxACF3LlMB6JuvI9gG3TXlqjCJkVUuE6OL_LWx60MYouCN2nOuSYeatZ-k_mrxVm7TR0TcLKZOvtJeQFVYS0gT43q88by95Tlz_urzJwzCL7c2khK-97k59inQ0KDUpscxo-j1YC5KGAd9MrY5El_Sx5IdBNro1iLFBxZ4fLcKqPOTE6alfMPGmhHBE4N4mMHdIpJx8w3iYr5moxV03Jsj3zGdbh14qYOg4VVJkyluPcxysQBh0d2gUOc2WzO59rz9c1T7hwBEWB5ud7x7)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e95689358d0445e380386ff1dbad8dd4&_e=oqNV0xHk3rPFdD9nsc8WaA9MojTrJ7U775_Lmd0joBJ7VP4YLu_oXN3VUaDstQx8eHYPIbVZXiuFg7GWmqPiiJh3ptcIMj6Dc64tjs2fJ5oX1IV4ay8mhV3nQh7WuUWBh_XWqz5uYJ6xF6oQmvq_dRHJ1mvlsMmj_Gj536sUv7wPuPsmKrtIaduvmpOT0mC0w4arXT6SAPSTwNih22w5ctLO2GHlQ8PaDMnKqkIT5sc6YNZxACF3LlMB6JuvI9gG3TXlqjCJkVUuE6OL_LWx60MYouCN2nOuSYeatZ-k_moGa3chc3Zeeb5IABw4G45oIysUUZPnG3kApg8ZYNYz0qt2Tgys1aWyXbZk4FoSPv91JHx17k-JvFTgZUAVDj3EOjon6Bhs6F-WHAMgMDy14aZB3Ndh68fiJo9zAEEVXNqroF8XwBRJ0e5zfJ25-tPk3alH4Sxnf5oDOGSldjmWn6_lM5C8nyArwVbzGnzXUo8rLSx-6oM9xRWAHbh6vBb9)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e95689358d0445e380386ff1dbad8dd4&_e=oqNV0xHk3rPFdD9nsc8WaA9MojTrJ7U775_Lmd0joBJ7VP4YLu_oXN3VUaDstQx8eHYPIbVZXiuFg7GWmqPiiJh3ptcIMj6Dc64tjs2fJ5oX1IV4ay8mhV3nQh7WuUWBh_XWqz5uYJ6xF6oQmvq_dRHJ1mvlsMmj_Gj536sUv7wPuPsmKrtIaduvmpOT0mC0w4arXT6SAPSTwNih22w5ctLO2GHlQ8PaDMnKqkIT5sc6YNZxACF3LlMB6JuvI9gG3TXlqjCJkVUuE6OL_LWx60MYouCN2nOuSYeatZ-k_mqhNK7TxSYxrGcxFi1YQlEkmFpbqxYdWvzj1GABzbg9Qv0s_sY5LsmaqvgeLbXiTH17nnZvZn1uDvXfSmyx_NjHu4ezwOZG9hCv0S70dCvFf8jcIRUloe_mhlHEJedOB3OrsGQvdZ7AnJI3mpU6AbOGiWmttAKCba0-naPLUvyOhn1_VUji_zxM92U7WUsgXby3qZpodC6jdEu_QqZ2HMpF)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e95689358d0445e380386ff1dbad8dd4&_e=oqNV0xHk3rPFdD9nsc8WaA9MojTrJ7U775_Lmd0joBJ7VP4YLu_oXN3VUaDstQx8eHYPIbVZXiuFg7GWmqPiiJh3ptcIMj6Dc64tjs2fJ5oX1IV4ay8mhV3nQh7WuUWBh_XWqz5uYJ6xF6oQmvq_dRHJ1mvlsMmj_Gj536sUv7wPuPsmKrtIaduvmpOT0mC0w4arXT6SAPSTwNih22w5ctLO2GHlQ8PaDMnKqkIT5sc6YNZxACF3LlMB6JuvI9gG3TXlqjCJkVUuE6OL_LWx60MYouCN2nOuSYeatZ-k_mpQsNiO4H2utCLl-_SUJKnmFGjwyXT5ID5dAYXGfQq6pz-JVWTsmtbRWJ9JQ_FS_PnzcXa7Ub7LwpRCzU8VSTVQZ50nodo0vBRjlODPubTMg0fuqxGRLO2UChrVpbP3ax8piBZTdRyDISlS6wmgWxP96kVh2q1fUls6EA4a6gQdzJ0NWsnWTY5FxKISSArMQ7lRU8jcfQZRqPLNE1gg-InZ)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e95689358d0445e380386ff1dbad8dd4&_e=oqNV0xHk3rPFdD9nsc8WaA9MojTrJ7U775_Lmd0joBJ7VP4YLu_oXN3VUaDstQx8eHYPIbVZXiuFg7GWmqPiiJh3ptcIMj6Dc64tjs2fJ5oX1IV4ay8mhV3nQh7WuUWBh_XWqz5uYJ6xF6oQmvq_dRHJ1mvlsMmj_Gj536sUv7wPuPsmKrtIaduvmpOT0mC0w4arXT6SAPSTwNih22w5ctLO2GHlQ8PaDMnKqkIT5sc6YNZxACF3LlMB6JuvI9gG3TXlqjCJkVUuE6OL_LWx60MYouCN2nOuSYeatZ-k_mqapQUoHCIrmCwkbMVpXWA0pnFxmPruotbRkvkW4bFMKeL817xq3OOOoP7IeTjaSnH1x3gtjyfert3CW_YTvNiciqK40vq6bqucLM-TyHLACHGXGpaOakRvnu0FboIphpKTe7EniCxLUHNC0Go2HNlOV8QEXjZEF7pL035oiA6ezF8tNS-k76rUsfjzLO3QrNwgisu1GTEEUwVmX8J7fYla)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e95689358d0445e380386ff1dbad8dd4&_e=oqNV0xHk3rPFdD9nsc8WaA9MojTrJ7U775_Lmd0joBJ7VP4YLu_oXN3VUaDstQx8eHYPIbVZXiuFg7GWmqPiiJh3ptcIMj6Dc64tjs2fJ5oX1IV4ay8mhV3nQh7WuUWBh_XWqz5uYJ6xF6oQmvq_dRHJ1mvlsMmj_Gj536sUv7wPuPsmKrtIaduvmpOT0mC0w4arXT6SAPSTwNih22w5ctLO2GHlQ8PaDMnKqkIT5sc6YNZxACF3LlMB6JuvI9gG3TXlqjCJkVUuE6OL_LWx60MYouCN2nOuSYeatZ-k_mq2DrNqhKqtLFb8Moj6awHARUOd4AJS3NZH4_WJ6KMxc74QXDvlPw8Q1QRiJhfzQ6BLDiCxXy9VQO7XOKzqFSHBzjblRRTI7_zcFSX8SWOouaUIT-R3dIknL2eC8n4GGQDlnjAc8MstEqG_R0Dr3TK051taZAZPiNdh87xAea_QqEGfIk7bkmIxFN4JRuXRpq35SPZIt8fILPu6a-GHs1Tc)

# [WATCH: Sen. Kennedy Calls Infrastructure "Stupid Stuff"](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=ef7b916f58&e=03e0a9e31b)
| Sen. John Kennedy voted against the bipartisan infrastructure bill and called it “stupid stuff,” but it actually sends billions of dollars to Louisiana to fix our crumbling infrastructure.

>From roads to coastal protection to flood mitigation to bridges, the bill will bring once in a lifetime investments to our state.

[Chip in $20 today](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=56ddf5ed5b&e=03e0a9e31b) to help me put people over politics in Washington D.C.

Learn more about my candidacy for U.S. Senate at [LukeMixon.com](https://LukeMixon.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96d8ff1e158583235f35b1ce1&id=bf49d3f590&e=03e0a9e31b).

Sincerely,
Luke Mixon
